job_detail_fetch.descriptionPlain:
TrustYou is a leading AI-driven hospitality platform dedicated to transforming guest experiences and empowering businesses to thrive. With a multicultural team of over 150 professionals working remotely across the globe, we are on a mission to help companies grow by achieving customer excellence. 
At TY, our culture continually evolves and is shaped by the people who work here.  We embrace an open feedback culture, focusing on continuous improvement and customer excellence.
Every team member's unique voice contributes to our collective success, fostering an environment where we test, learn, and improve together.
 
Our products enable our customers to make guests happier, increase customer lifetime value and save unnecessary costs.
 
Customer Experience Platform (CXP): AI-powered insights for exceptional guest experiences. Improve service quality based on surveys and reviews across the web, respond to all feedback with the help of AI, and market your reputation.
Customer Data Platform (CDP): AI-powered customer data management for more direct bookings. Merge and master customer data, manage consent, and transform insights into effective marketing, personalized journeys, and higher lifetime value.
AI Agents: Intelligent, always-on agents that boost productivity and reduce operational costs. Available 24/7, they provide instant, personalized recommendations, answer inquiries, and optimize direct booking conversions.
 
Learn more about TrustYou at www.trustyou.com
 
If you share our passion for customer happiness and believe in the power to make an impact, you're in the right place. Join us in our mission to revolutionize the hospitality industry through innovation and excellence.
 
Position: Business Development Manager - Japan
Location of the role: Tokyo
 
As a Business Development Manager at TrustYou, you are responsible for acquiring new clients within your assigned sales region and introducing them to our products. You closely cooperate with our international team and together you will be responsible for the achievement of our strategic sales goals.
 
You will be part of our international Business Development Team. As our ideal candidate, you come with extensive experience in the hospitality industry and sales experience. You convince us with your excellent communication skills (both oral and written), your resistance to stress and your positive mindset.

Position: Business Development Manager - Japan
Location of the role: Tokyo
 
As a Business Development Manager at TrustYou, you are responsible for acquiring new clients within your assigned sales region and introducing them to our products. You closely cooperate with our international team and together you will be responsible for the achievement of our strategic sales goals.
 
You will be part of our international Business Development Team. As our ideal candidate, you come with extensive experience in the hospitality industry and sales experience. You convince us with your excellent communication skills (both oral and written), your resistance to stress and your positive mindset.

lists.text: In your role, you will make an impact by….
lists.content:
• Making cold outbounds to targeted customers.
  • Owning an entire sales cycle from qualifying leads to closing.
  • Presenting and selling TrustYou Products to potential clients on the phone, in webinars and on-site.
  • Conducting negotiations and closing contracts
  • Planning and managing seminars and exhibitions
  • Attending seminars and exhibitions to generate leads
  • Optimizing the process from initial negotiations to order receipt
  • Preparing proposal materials and quotations
  • Collaborating with Marketing and Sales operations teams

lists.text: You are a perfect fit, if you …
lists.content:
• Have a minimum of 3 years of Business Development and corporate sales.
  • Have prior experience in the hospitality industry is a plus, but not a must.
  • Have business level English language skills. Fluency in Korean language is a BIG plus.
  • Possess excellent interpersonal skills with colleagues and clients
  • Possess the personal qualities of a winner – self-starter, get-it-done, energetic, persistence, confident decision maker.
  • Are flexible and eager to work in a team of young aspiring professionals
  • Enjoy using sales tools
  • Are experienced in Salesforce CRM.

lists.text: And most importantly, what's in it for you...
lists.content:
• Working in a global, diverse, and collaborative team
  • On-going career development, training, and coaching
  • Six days for learning & development 
  • Celebrate in style at our team events (in-person and virtually) 
  • Social benefits and perks based on location

Position: Customer Support Manager (German Speaking)
Location of the role: Cluj Napoca (Hybrid) 
As a Customer Support Manager (DE/EN),  you are a key partner for our German-speaking markets and global Key Accounts. You don't just solve tickets; you solve business challenges. You bridge the gap between our high-tech AI platform and the daily operations of major hotel groups. Whether you are crafting a precise technical email or leading a dedicated training session for a Key Account HQ, you act as a trusted specialist who ensures our clients achieve excellence.

Position: Customer Support Manager (German Speaking)

Location of the role: Cluj Napoca (Hybrid) 

As a Customer Support Manager (DE/EN),  you are a key partner for our German-speaking markets and global Key Accounts. You don't just solve tickets; you solve business challenges. You bridge the gap between our high-tech AI platform and the daily operations of major hotel groups. Whether you are crafting a precise technical email or leading a dedicated training session for a Key Account HQ, you act as a trusted specialist who ensures our clients achieve excellence.

lists.text: In your role, you will make an impact by….
lists.content:
• Mastering the Inbox: Expertly handling a high volume of support requests via email and chat. You maintain our high standards for speed and precision without ever needing to pick up an inbound phone call.

• Leading High-Stakes Trainings: Going beyond standard webinars to host dedicated, client-specific training sessions for our most valued Key Accounts, tailoring the content to their unique goals.

• Owning Key Account Communication: Serving as a primary support contact for Key Account HQs, ensuring their technical needs are met and their feedback is integrated into our workflow.

• Optimizing the Journey: Proactively identifying gaps in our current workflows and contributing to process improvements that make our team faster and our clients happier.

• Creating Expert Content: Translating your front-line insights into FAQ articles and video tutorials that empower thousands of users to self-serve effectively.

• Cross-Functional Collaboration: Fluent translation of market-specific needs into actionable feedback for our Product and Sales teams in both English and German.

lists.text: You are a perfect fit, if you have…
lists.content:
• Linguistic Excellence: Native or C1-level fluency in German PLUS English.

• Proven Experience: At least 2+ years in Customer Support or Client Success within a SaaS environment, with a track record of handling complex queries.

• Stakeholder Management: You are comfortable and professional when communicating with corporate HQ contacts and senior stakeholders.

• Exceptional Communication: You possess a high "written EQ"—you can deliver technical news or instructions in a way that is clear, professional, and warm.

• Presentation Authority: You are a confident public speaker who can lead engaging virtual sessions for large or high-profile groups.

lists.text: You are ideally someone who has….
lists.content:
• A Process-Oriented Mindset: You naturally look for ways to do things better, not just faster.

• Technical Intuition: You enjoy the "detective work" of technical troubleshooting and can navigate platform configurations with ease.

• Hospitality Passion: You understand the unique pressures of the travel and hotel industry.

lists.text: And most importantly, what's in it for you...
lists.content:
• Working in a global, diverse, and collaborative team. 

• Flexible working hours that allows you the freedom to shape your work-life.

• Remote-friendly environment.

• On-going career development, training, and coaching.

• Six days for learning & development. 

• Celebrate in style at our team events (in-person and virtually). 

• Social benefits and perks based on location.

Position: Head of IT, Compliance & Operational Excellence
Location of the role: Germany (Remote) 
 
As the Head of IT, Compliance & Operational Excellence at TrustYou, you will be responsible for Internal Operations and Office IT, driving the optimization of internal systems, SaaS tools, compliance, and business processes to enhance efficiency and support scalable growth across the organization. 
Reporting directly to the CFO, you will lead a small team while implementing improvements that streamline workflows, boost productivity, and enable the company to operate effectively across international teams.

Position: Head of IT, Compliance & Operational Excellence

Location of the role: Germany (Remote) 

 

As the Head of IT, Compliance & Operational Excellence at TrustYou, you will be responsible for Internal Operations and Office IT, driving the optimization of internal systems, SaaS tools, compliance, and business processes to enhance efficiency and support scalable growth across the organization. 

Reporting directly to the CFO, you will lead a small team while implementing improvements that streamline workflows, boost productivity, and enable the company to operate effectively across international teams.

lists.text: In your role, you will make an impact by….
lists.content:
• Leading internal operations and the office IT team, ensuring reliable IT infrastructure, device lifecycle management, access provisioning, and onboarding processes.

  • Owning the internal systems and SaaS ecosystem, managing tools, vendors, licenses, renewals, and optimizing operational IT spend.

  • Driving compliance and governance, coordinating SOC2 readiness, GDPR processes, company policies, and supporting internal and external audits.

  • Supporting process innovation, structuring the company’s knowledge and data, driving workflow improvements, and prototyping efficiency solutions.

  • Promoting operational excellence by identifying bottlenecks, implementing scalable processes, improving collaboration, and providing leadership with insights on efficiency and system usage.

lists.text: You are a perfect fit, if you have…
lists.content:
• Bachelor’s or higher degree in business administration, information systems, operations management, or a related field

  • 6–10 years of professional experience in business operations, internal systems, IT operations, consulting, or audit, ideally in technology or SaaS companies.

  • Proven ability to manage teams, internal systems, and SaaS tools in a global organization.

  • Experience with process optimization, AI tools, or automation initiatives is a strong plus.

  • Solid understanding of internal governance, compliance frameworks, and operational best practices.

  • Structured, analytical, and hands-on approach to problem solving.

  • Ability to collaborate across Finance, Legal, HR, and commercial teams.

  • Fluency in English (Must); German is a plus.

lists.text: And most importantly, what's in it for you...
lists.content:
• Working in a global, diverse, and collaborative team. 

  • Flexible working hours that allows you the freedom to shape your work-life.

  • Remote-friendly environment.

  • On-going career development, training, and coaching.

  • Six days for learning & development. 

  • Celebrate in style at our team events (in-person and virtually). 

  • Social benefits and perks based on location.

Position: Junior Customer Support Manager (German or French Speaking)
Location of the role: Cluj Napoca (Hybrid) 
As a Junior Customer Support Manager (DE/FR), you are the expert voice behind the screen. You love the art of a well-crafted email and the energy of a live webinar. This isn’t a traditional call center: you will focus on high-quality, written resolutions and digital education, ensuring our German or French-speaking clients can navigate our products with total confidence.
job_detail_fetch.description:
TrustYou is a leading AI-driven hospitality platform dedicated to transforming guest experiences and empowering businesses to thrive. With a multicultural team of over 120 professionals working remotely across the globe, we are on a mission to help companies grow by achieving customer excellence. 

At TY, our culture continually evolves and is shaped by the people who work here.  We embrace an open feedback culture, focusing on continuous improvement and customer excellence.

Every team member's unique voice contributes to our collective success, fostering an environment where we test, learn, and improve together.

Our products enable our customers to make guests happier, increase customer lifetime value and save unnecessary costs.

  • Customer Experience Platform (CXP): AI-powered insights for exceptional guest experiences. Improve service quality based on surveys and reviews across the web, respond to all feedback with the help of AI, and market your reputation.

  • Customer Data Platform (CDP): AI-powered customer data management for more direct bookings. Merge and master customer data, manage consent, and transform insights into effective marketing, personalized journeys, and higher lifetime value.

  • AI Agents: Intelligent, always-on agents that boost productivity and reduce operational costs. Available 24/7, they provide instant, personalized recommendations, answer inquiries, and optimize direct booking conversions.

Learn more about TrustYou at www.trustyou.com

If you share our passion for customer happiness and believe in the power to make an impact, you're in the right place. Join us in our mission to revolutionize the hospitality industry through innovation and excellence.

 

Position: Junior Customer Support Manager (German or French Speaking)

Location of the role: Cluj Napoca (Hybrid) 

As a Junior Customer Support Manager (DE/FR), you are the expert voice behind the screen. You love the art of a well-crafted email and the energy of a live webinar. This isn’t a traditional call center: you will focus on high-quality, written resolutions and digital education, ensuring our German or French-speaking clients can navigate our products with total confidence.

lists.text: In your role, you will make an impact by….
lists.content:
• Mastering the Inbox: Handling a high volume of support requests via email and chat with precision and speed. (Note: There are no inbound phone calls—your focus is on high-quality written communication).

  • Hosting Expert Webinars: Leading virtual, group training sessions and webinars for our global clients (such as Accor) to drive product adoption and success.

  • Creating Digital Resources: Identifying common questions from your tickets to help build our video library and FAQ section, making it easier for clients to self-serve.

  • Communicating Across Borders: Fluently translating client needs into actionable insights for our product and account teams in English and either German or French.

  • Maintaining Platform Accuracy: Assisting with occasional account configurations and property setups to ensure our clients’ data remains seamless.

    •

lists.text: You are a perfect fit, if you have…
lists.content:
• Linguistic Excellence: C1-level fluency in English PLUS German or French.

  • Exceptional Writing Skills: You can explain complex technical concepts in a way that feels simple, warm, and professional over email.

  • Experience: At least 1 year in a Customer Support or Client Success role, ideally within a SaaS environment.

  • On-Camera Confidence: You are comfortable hosting webinars and presenting to groups in a virtual environment.

lists.text: You are ideally someone who has….
lists.content:
• A solution-oriented mindset—you enjoy the "detective work" involved in diagnosing a ticket.

  • Experience with webinar tools (like Zoom, GoToWebinar, or Google Meet).

  • The ability to stay organized and productive in a high-volume, remote-first workflow.

lists.text: And most importantly, what's in it for you...
lists.content:
• Working in a global, diverse, and collaborative team. 

  • Flexible working hours that allows you the freedom to shape your work-life.

  • Remote-friendly environment.

  • On-going career development, training, and coaching.

  • Six days for learning & development. 

  • Celebrate in style at our team events (in-person and virtually). 

  • Social benefits and perks based on location.

job_detail_fetch.descriptionPlain:
Senior Data Engineer
Location: Germany / Spain / Romania (Remote)
The Role
As a Senior Data Engineer, you will drive the end-to-end development of our core data infrastructure through AI-native engineering. Championing our AI DevEx approach, you will orchestrate AI agents to rapidly build, scale, and refactor high-performance systems.
We are looking for a technical expert who takes hands-on ownership of distributed, real-time architectures. Leveraging your deep data engineering expertise, you will construct the robust pipelines that power our next-generation data products.
job_detail_fetch.description:
Senior Data Engineer

Location: Germany / Spain / Romania (Remote)

The Role

As a Senior Data Engineer, you will drive the end-to-end development of our core data infrastructure through AI-native engineering. Championing our AI DevEx approach, you will orchestrate AI agents to rapidly build, scale, and refactor high-performance systems.

We are looking for a technical expert who takes hands-on ownership of distributed, real-time architectures. Leveraging your deep data engineering expertise, you will construct the robust pipelines that power our next-generation data products.

lists.text: In your role, you will make an impact by….
lists.content:
• Developing and driving the architecture of complex data systems that prioritize scalability, reliability, and long-term maintainability.
  • Designing and optimizing production-grade data pipelines, with a primary focus on high-throughput, real-time streaming.
  • Driving Spec-Driven Development (SDD) using OpenSpec or GitHub Spec Kit to create strict engineering contracts that ensure predictable, high-quality AI code generation.
  • Orchestrating agentic AI workflows with Claude Code and the Model Context Protocol (MCP) to rapidly build, refactor, and scale our data infrastructure.
  • Taking full accountability and ownership of system components, working in a self-sufficient manner to solve deep technical challenges.
  • Implementing rigorous testing and monitoring frameworks to ensure the integrity of mission-critical data.
  • Mentoring junior engineers and fostering a culture of technical excellence through open feedback and architectural reviews
    •

lists.text: You are a perfect fit, if you have…
lists.content:
• 10+ years of professional experience, with 5+ years specifically focused on Data Engineering.
  • Deep technical expertise with Kafka (including Producers, Consumers, and Stream Processing) for building scalable, real-time architectures.
  • Strong experience with OLAP databases (expertise in Clickhouse is highly preferred).
  • Good fluency in Python and SQL for complex data manipulation, optimization, and system building.
  • Willingness to embrace highly agentic AI-assisted development, specifically using Claude Code to autonomously navigate codebases, execute multi-step engineering tasks, and accelerate development cycles while maintaining high code quality.
  • Strong hands-on experience with Docker, Kubernetes, and automated CI/CD pipelines.
  • Significant experience with open-source tools and technologies within the modern data stack.
  • Excellent communication skills and a desire to work in an environment based on transparency and feedback.
  • Fluency in English

• Previous experience or knowledge working with Redis or Elasticsearch.
  • A proactive approach to architectural decision-making and a history of leading complex technical projects from conception to production.
  • A collaborative mindset that values mentorship and the continuous improvement of engineering processes.
  • Experience optimizing distributed system performance at significant scale.

lists.text: And most importantly, what's in it for you...
lists.content:
• Global & Diverse Team: Work in a collaborative, multicultural environment.
  • Flexibility: Flexible working hours to help you shape your own work-life balance.
  • Remote-First: A truly remote-friendly environment.
  • Growth: Ongoing career development, training, and coaching.
  • Learning Time: Six dedicated days per year for learning and development.
  • Culture: Regular team events (in-person and virtual) and location-based social benefits.
    •

job_detail_fetch.descriptionPlain: Binance is a leading global blockchain ecosystem behind the world’s largest cryptocurrency exchange by trading volume and registered users. We are trusted by 300+ million people in 100+ countries for our industry-leading security, user fund transparency, trading engine speed, deep liquidity, and an unmatched portfolio of digital-asset products. Binance offerings range from trading and finance to education, research, payments, institutional services, Web3 features, and more. We leverage the power of digital assets and blockchain to build an inclusive financial ecosystem to advance the freedom of money and improve financial access for people around the world.
job_detail_fetch.description: Binance is a leading global blockchain ecosystem behind the world’s largest cryptocurrency exchange by trading volume and registered users. We are trusted by 300+ million people in 100+ countries for our industry-leading security, user fund transparency, trading engine speed, deep liquidity, and an unmatched portfolio of digital-asset products. Binance offerings range from trading and finance to education, research, payments, institutional services, Web3 features, and more. We leverage the power of digital assets and blockchain to build an inclusive financial ecosystem to advance the freedom of money and improve financial access for people around the world.

lists.content:
• Set the product direction and roadmap for backend trading systems.
  • Improve core systems like order management, risk engines, pricing models, and settlement processes.
  • Work with engineering and quant teams to turn complex trading needs into technical solutions.
  • Lead the full product lifecycle from planning to release and ongoing/new feature launch.
  • Monitor backend performance and fix issues before they impact users.
  • Ensure systems comply with standards, regulations, and best practices.

• Open from junior to senior levels; product experience is not a must as long as you have experience working with trading systems.
  • Deep understanding of Financial products like Margin, Futures, Perpetual swaps, options etc.
  • Technical or quantitative background (e.g., CS, Financial Engineering, Math).
  • Ability to understand trading algorithms, risk methods, and translate them into product requirements.
  • Strong analytical and problem-solving skills.
  • Proficiency in Mandarin is preferred to coordinate with global stakeholders and overseas partners.

lists.content:
• Responsible for the user experience and development of products in Futures trading
  • Define and optimize the futures trading flow by deeply understanding trading processes, user behavior, and trading logic
  • Design and enhance the portfolio margin trading mode, including user-side workflows, calculation frameworks, and system logic.
  • Develop and maintain product roadmaps, feature backlogs, and detailed product documentation (PRDs, user stories, use cases, user flows, logic flows, and functional specifications).
  • Prioritize initiatives with business, engineering teams, align on technical implementation approaches, collaborate closely with QA on acceptance criteria and testing, and lead end-to-end product launches.
  • Conduct market research and competitor benchmarking to continuously improve and deliver best-in-class trading products.
  • Drive cross-functional collaboration across engineering, design, risk, operations, and other stakeholders to ensure high product quality and timely milestone delivery.

• Minimum 3 years of proven experience as a product manager coupled with a good understanding of Futures trading
  • Sound knowledge on financial products and some personal trading experience is preferred
  • Quick learner, can pick up new concepts quickly
  • High degree of initiative to work collaboratively across the team and independentlyFamiliarity with Agile workflow and ability to work within an Agile environment
  • Bilingual English/Mandarin is required to be able to coordinate with overseas partners and stakeholders.

lists.content:
• Own the product roadmap for Margin backend systems, including Unified Trading Account (UTA) capabilities.
  • Design and improve core logic for margin calculation, leverage, collateral management, risk ratios, and liquidation.
  • Partner closely with Engineering, Risk, Quant, and Trading teams to build scalable and resilient backend systems.
  • Translate complex margin and risk requirements into clear PRDs, system flows, and technical specs.
  • Drive system optimizations to improve accuracy, stability, latency, and margin efficiency.
  • Coordinate across Spot, Derivatives, Wallet, and Risk teams to deliver seamless unified account experiences.
  • Own the full product lifecycle from discovery to launch and ongoing optimization.

• Open from junior to senior levels; product experience is not a must as long as you have experience working with trading systems.
  • Deep understanding of Financial products like Margin, Futures, Perpetual swaps, options etc.
  • Technical or quantitative background (e.g., CS, Financial Engineering, Math).
  • Ability to understand trading algorithms, risk methods, and translate them into product requirements.
  • Strong analytical and problem-solving skills.
  • Proficiency in Mandarin is preferred to coordinate with global stakeholders and overseas partners.

  • Design and enhance risk features like liquidation logic, margin system, leverage tiers, and risk limits.
  • Work closely with Quants, Engineers, Trading, and Risk teams to spot risk exposures and create solutions.
  • Maintain dashboards, alerts, and analytics tools to support risk decision-making and monitoring.
  • Track market trends, competitor risk mechanisms, and new threats in the crypto derivatives space.
  • Lead incident reviews when risk events happen and propose improvements to prevent repeats.
  • Support launches of new products by assessing risk scenarios and readiness.

• Open from junior to senior levels; product experience is not a must as long as you have experience working with trading systems.
  • Deep understanding of Financial products like Margin, Futures, Perpetual swaps, options etc.
  • Technical or quantitative background (e.g., CS, Financial Engineering, Math).
  • Ability to understand trading algorithms, risk methods, and translate them into product requirements.
  • Strong analytical and problem-solving skills.
  • Proficiency in Mandarin is preferred to coordinate with global stakeholders and overseas partners.

We are trusted by 300+ million people in 100+ countries for our industry-leading security, user fund transparency, trading engine speed, deep liquidity, and an unmatched portfolio of digital-asset products. Binance offerings range from trading and finance to education, research, payments, institutional services, Web3 features, and more. We leverage the power of digital assets and blockchain to build an inclusive financial ecosystem to advance the freedom of money and improve financial access for people around the world.

lists.content:
• This role will be belong to the growth department, responsible for user growth metrics; 所属增长部门，为用户增长指标负责
  • Responsible for exploring various growth opportunities in the exchange field and responsible for expanding user growth promotion channels; 善于钻研交易所领域的各种增长机会，负责拓展用户增长推广渠道
  • Maintain strong channel cooperation support and processes, and enhance channel growth dimension; increase channel output, and coordinate and solve various problems in the process; 维护渠道良好的合作关系，能够站在增长维度给予渠道运营支持，帮助渠道产量提升，协调解决合作过程中的各种问题
  • According to the market situation and company strategy, complete the established performance indicators assigned by the team; 根据市场情况和公司策略，完成团队下达的既定的业绩指标
  • Actively participate in various industry activities, pay attention to user growth opportunities, and continuously explore new cooperation resources; 积极参与各类行业活动，关注用户增长机会，持续挖掘新的合作资源

• 3 years experience in Internet product growth or channel development, experience in blockchain, finance, Internet product user growth or channel development is preferred; 有3年的互联网产品增长或增长渠道拓展经验，有区块链，金融，互联网产品的用户增长或者渠道拓展经验优先
  • Good at listening to customer needs, always look for user growth solutions from the perspective of user growth and channel operation; 善于倾听客户需求，时刻站在用户增长和渠道运营角度去寻找用户增长解决方案
  • Bilingual English and Mandarin is required to be able to coordinate with overseas partners and stakeholders; 熟悉中英文，了解中文市场
  • Strong self-driven mindset, strong sense of responsibility, strong ability to work under pressure and strong cross-department coordination ability; 自驱力强，有责任心，抗压能力强，有较强的跨部门协调能力

lists.content:
• Primarily responsible for answering users' questions and providing timely, accurate support to ensure a positive user experience; 主要负责解答用户问题，提供及时且准确的支持，确保用户获得良好的体验
  • Possess a solid understanding of referral and rebate mechanisms to assist Referral Pro Mode members by answering their inquiries via Telegram or internal community groups; 熟悉返佣和推荐机制，通过Telegram或内部社区群帮助超级返佣成员解答疑问
  • Collect and analyze community feedback to provide actionable insights for internal teams, supporting product development and marketing strategies; 收集并分析社区反馈，为内部团队提供可行见解，支持产品开发和营销策略
  • Monitor all affiliate and referral marketing activities to ensure integrity and compliance with company standards;监控所有联盟和返佣营销活动，确保合规和公司标准的执行
  • Continuously explore new content formats, channels, creative ideas, and other opportunities for experimentation, optimization, and growth. (Potential opportunity to transition into a Business Development or Operations role.); 持续探索新内容形式、渠道和创意，寻找实验、优化和增长的机会。（有机会转向商务拓展或运营岗位）

• Familiarity with cryptocurrency related terminology, market trends, and Referral Pro Mode program rules; 熟悉加密货币相关术语、市场趋势及超级返佣项目规则
  • Ability to work flexible hours to engage effectively with KOLs and community members across different time zones; 能适应灵活工作时间，有效与不同地区KOL和社区成员沟通
  • Bilingual English/Mandarin is required to be able to coordinate with overseas partners and stakeholders; 中英文流利，具备良好的口头和书面沟通能力
  • Excellent organizational and time management skills, capable of handling multiple tasks simultaneously; 优秀的组织和时间管理能力，能同时处理多项任务
  • Mature business experience with strong ownership mindset and emotional intelligence; 具备成熟的业务经验，强烈的主人翁意识和情商

job_detail_fetch.descriptionPlain:
Binance is a leading global blockchain ecosystem behind the world’s largest cryptocurrency exchange by trading volume and registered users. We are trusted by 300+ million people in 100+ countries for our industry-leading security, user fund transparency, trading engine speed, deep liquidity, and an unmatched portfolio of digital-asset products. Binance offerings range from trading and finance to education, research, payments, institutional services, Web3 features, and more. We leverage the power of digital assets and blockchain to build an inclusive financial ecosystem to advance the freedom of money and improve financial access for people around the world.


We are seeking an experienced Affiliate Relationship Manager with a proven track record in managing and growing affiliate partnerships. The ideal candidate will bring strong communication and crisis management skills, deep knowledge of referral/affiliate programs, and a growth-focused mindset. This role is crucial in strengthening relationships with matured affiliates (6–12+ months) and driving cross-product conversion across Binance’s suite of services including Futures, Earn, Options, and Web3 Wallet.
job_detail_fetch.description:
Binance is a leading global blockchain ecosystem behind the world’s largest cryptocurrency exchange by trading volume and registered users. We are trusted by 300+ million people in 100+ countries for our industry-leading security, user fund transparency, trading engine speed, deep liquidity, and an unmatched portfolio of digital-asset products. Binance offerings range from trading and finance to education, research, payments, institutional services, Web3 features, and more. We leverage the power of digital assets and blockchain to build an inclusive financial ecosystem to advance the freedom of money and improve financial access for people around the world.

We are seeking an experienced Affiliate Relationship Manager with a proven track record in managing and growing affiliate partnerships. The ideal candidate will bring strong communication and crisis management skills, deep knowledge of referral/affiliate programs, and a growth-focused mindset. This role is crucial in strengthening relationships with matured affiliates (6–12+ months) and driving cross-product conversion across Binance’s suite of services including Futures, Earn, Options, and Web3 Wallet.

lists.content:
• Own and manage a portfolio of key affiliate partners, serving as their primary point of contact for all commercial and operational matters
  • Monitor affiliate performance metrics (trading volume, retention, ROI) to identify trends, anomalies, and growth opportunities
  • Handle affiliate inquiries, commission disputes, and escalations with professionalism and high emotional intelligence
  • Negotiate commercial terms including tiered commission structures, exclusive arrangements, and co-marketing initiatives
  • Identify and flag risks including wash trading, arbitrage abuse, compliance red flags, and competitor poaching signals
  • Collaborate with Legal, Compliance, and Risk teams to conduct affiliate due diligence and ensure regulatory adherence
  • Maintain a deep understanding of the affiliate lifecycle, incentive design, and anti-fraud mechanisms
  • Represent Binance's affiliate program with credibility and consistency across diverse cultural contexts

• Experience in the crypto or FX exchange industry, with familiarity in affiliate ecosystems, commission structures, and rebate mechanisms
  • Proven track record in B2B sales, key account management, or channel partner management
  • Background in affiliate marketing, including lifecycle management, incentive design, and fraud prevention
  • Strong relationship management skills — high EQ, able to navigate disputes and competitive pressure with composure
  • Analytical mindset — comfortable reading performance data and identifying risks or irregularities
  • Solid commercial negotiation skills, with experience structuring tiered or performance-based deals
  • Risk awareness — ability to identify wash trading, arbitrage affiliates, and compliance risks
  • Cross-cultural communication skills; multilingual ability or regional cultural fluency is a plus

• Trading or quantitative finance background — better understanding of affiliate motivations and behavior
  • Compliance or risk management experience — ability to support legal due diligence processes
  • Community management experience — understanding of reputation dynamics in tight-knit affiliate circles

job_detail_fetch.descriptionPlain:
Binance is a leading global blockchain ecosystem behind the world’s largest cryptocurrency exchange by trading volume and registered users. We are trusted by 300+ million people in 100+ countries for our industry-leading security, user fund transparency, trading engine speed, deep liquidity, and an unmatched portfolio of digital-asset products. Binance offerings range from trading and finance to education, research, payments, institutional services, Web3 features, and more. We leverage the power of digital assets and blockchain to build an inclusive financial ecosystem to advance the freedom of money and improve financial access for people around the world.


Binance is building one of the largest internal AI agent fleets in the industry — hundreds of sandboxed agents powering automation across trading, compliance, customer service, risk, and beyond. This role sits at the core of that platform: you'll build the infrastructure and tooling that makes every agent faster, smarter, and more impactful — directly translating into operational efficiency gains and accelerating business growth.
We're looking for a strong individual contributor who stays close to the frontier and has the instinct to turn promising ideas into working implementations.
This is a builder role. You'll own the full stack from agent skill authorship to infrastructure tuning, and you'll be the person who spots a new technique in the wild and figures out how to make it real inside our platform.
job_detail_fetch.description:
Binance is a leading global blockchain ecosystem behind the world’s largest cryptocurrency exchange by trading volume and registered users. We are trusted by 300+ million people in 100+ countries for our industry-leading security, user fund transparency, trading engine speed, deep liquidity, and an unmatched portfolio of digital-asset products. Binance offerings range from trading and finance to education, research, payments, institutional services, Web3 features, and more. We leverage the power of digital assets and blockchain to build an inclusive financial ecosystem to advance the freedom of money and improve financial access for people around the world.

Binance is building one of the largest internal AI agent fleets in the industry — hundreds of sandboxed agents powering automation across trading, compliance, customer service, risk, and beyond. This role sits at the core of that platform: you'll build the infrastructure and tooling that makes every agent faster, smarter, and more impactful — directly translating into operational efficiency gains and accelerating business growth.

We're looking for a strong individual contributor who stays close to the frontier and has the instinct to turn promising ideas into working implementations.

This is a builder role. You'll own the full stack from agent skill authorship to infrastructure tuning, and you'll be the person who spots a new technique in the wild and figures out how to make it real inside our platform.

lists.content:
• Build, publish, and maintain OpenClaw skills — modular capability units used by hundreds of agents across the org to automate repetitive work and unlock new business capabilities

  • Develop CLI tooling for agent operations: deployment, diagnostics, session management, skill registry, and developer workflows

  • Own end-to-end AI agent harness engineering: lifecycle management, tool execution, context/session tuning, compaction strategies, model routing

  • Instrument the agent fleet with data pipelines and dashboards; apply data science techniques to understand token efficiency, failure modes, latency distribution, and business outcome correlation

  • Identify bottlenecks across the platform and drive measurable improvements in agent throughput, response quality, and cost efficiency — directly supporting user growth and retention

  • Track the research frontier — papers, open-source releases, community developments — and rapidly prototype integrations (new model capabilities, reasoning techniques, agentic frameworks)

  • Optimize LLM infrastructure: token budgeting, multi-provider routing, cost attribution, context window management

  • Harden agent sandboxes: credential isolation, prompt injection defense, guardrails

  • Partner with product and business teams to translate user growth goals into reliable, scalable agent workflows

• 5+ years in software/platform engineering; 2+ year hands-on with LLM or AI agent systems in production

  • AI Native mindset — you default to AI-assisted development, think natively in agent/tool/context primitives, and are allergic to doing manually what an agent could do

  • Skill & CLI development: experience building modular, composable tools or CLI utilities for developer platforms; TypeScript and/or Python fluency

  • Agent harness engineering: practical experience with OpenClaw, LangGraph, AutoGen, CrewAI, or equivalent orchestration runtimes

  • LLM infrastructure: token management, model routing, context compaction, cost optimization at scale

  • Data science capability: comfortable with log analysis, statistical profiling, SQL/Python for usage data; can translate raw telemetry into actionable insights that drive platform decisions

  • Research awareness: follows model releases, agent framework updates, and relevant literature; can quickly assess what's worth integrating and what isn't

  • Vibe coding: ships fast using AI-assisted workflows; iterative, pragmatic, high output-to-noise ratio with strong engineering fundamentals

• Direct experience with OpenClaw — session config, hooks, cron/heartbeat architecture, skill registry (ClawHub)

  • Familiarity with CLI (Command Line Interface) and the agent tooling ecosystem

  • LiteLLM / AWS Bedrock / multi-provider proxy experience

  • Kubernetes/EKS: pod isolation, resource tuning, secrets management

  • Security engineering background: sandbox escapes, prompt injection, guardrail design

    •

job_detail_fetch.descriptionBody:
Binance is building one of the largest internal AI agent fleets in the industry — hundreds of sandboxed agents powering automation across trading, compliance, customer service, risk, and beyond. This role sits at the core of that platform: you'll build the infrastructure and tooling that makes every agent faster, smarter, and more impactful — directly translating into operational efficiency gains and accelerating business growth.

We're looking for a strong individual contributor who stays close to the frontier and has the instinct to turn promising ideas into working implementations.

This is a builder role. You'll own the full stack from agent skill authorship to infrastructure tuning, and you'll be the person who spots a new technique in the wild and figures out how to make it real inside our platform.

lists.content:
• Create super-fast, easy-to-use, applications. Develop, test, deploy, maintain and optimize Binance app;
  • Build libraries and frameworks that support complex client side applications; speed- up development efficiency and improve code quality;
  • Lead Android infra team to build the next generation architecture, making it prepared for the future.
  • Collaborate with the Web team to develop hybrid frameworks, developer tools, and a JavaScript-based mobile runtime.
  • Contribute to Android development by writing high-performance code in Kotlin/Java and building shared libraries and toolchains.
  • Troubleshoot and optimize app performance using profiling tools and AI-assisted debugging techniques.
  • Continuously explore, evaluate, and implement new technologies to improve development efficiency and product quality.

• 5-8 years of experience building Android applications from scratch, high proficiency with Kotlin/Java.
  • Bachelor’s or Master’s degree in Computer Science, Engineering, or a related field.
  • Proven experience in software development and Android engineering, including architecture design, Jetpack, OkHttp, and related frameworks.
  • Familiarity with cross-platform technologies such as JavaScript/TypeScript, React, and Kotlin/Java for Android development; knowledge of C++ and JNI is a plus.
  • Strong track record in optimizing Android app performance, including networking, rendering, and memory usage.
  • Solid understanding of mobile architectures, industry trends, and emerging technologies.
  • In-depth knowledge of the full mobile development life cycle, from design to deployment.
  • Excellent problem-solving and communication skills, with hands-on experience in performance monitoring and a strong team player in an international environment.

lists.content:
• Sustainable Points System Design & Development: Lead the end-to-end development of a sustainable points ecosystem, define core rules (including points tasks, tiered levels, reward redemption, etc.) and formulate the total points issuance, as well as complete mechanisms for points acquisition, consumption, recycling, validity period and inflation control. Ensure stable value anchoring and controllable operational costs.
  • Data-Driven Operations & Risk Control: Establish a full set of core metrics (covering redemption rate, inflation rate, cost expenditure, etc.) design anti-cheating and anti-abuse strategies, and guarantee the long-term stability and healthy operation of the points system.
  • Cross-Team Collaboration & Implementation: Collaborate cross-functionally with Product, Design, business BUs, regional teams, Risk, PR, Customer Service and other stakeholders to develop benefit display and user communication guidelines. Drive the seamless integration of the points system with business activities, lower user comprehension barriers and reduce complaint risks.

• 5+ Years of Professional Experience: Proven expertise in user incentive programs, membership systems or economic system design across gaming, e-commerce, fintech and other related industries. Must have a track record of leading end-to-end successful projects, such as building a points system from 0 to 1 and driving its full implementation.
  • Strong Logical & Mathematical Competence: Capable of independently completing points balance calculation, cost budgeting and long-term inflation modeling. Proficiency in advanced Excel formulas and basic SQL is a mandatory requirement.
  • Fintech & Compliance Acumen: Solid understanding of financial product logic (including spot trading, futures, wealth management, etc.); familiar with investor protection protocols and compliance boundaries, especially in avoiding incentives for high-risk behaviors.
  • Excellent Cross-Team Collaboration Skills: Ability to efficiently align and reach consensus with cross-functional teams including compliance, risk control, product development and other core departments, driving project progress smoothly.
  • Bilingual English/Mandarin is required to be able to coordinate with overseas partners and stakeholders. Additional languages would be a strong advantage

• Prior experience in game numerical planning: Hands-on expertise in numerical design and balance adjustment within the gaming industry, which helps optimize the stability and rationality of points economic systems.
  • Fintech or securities brokerage background: In-depth knowledge of cross-regional compliance differences and regulatory requirements, capable of adapting incentive system design to diverse regional regulatory rules.
  • Advanced data analysis capabilities: Proficiency in Python or SQL, with the ability to independently build and optimize points liability forecasting models to support refined operation and risk control of the system.

About The Team
Join one of Binance's core Tech functions, the 'Home, Market & Dashboard' team, and help shape the essential user interfaces and experiences on our platform. This team ensures seamless access to market data, account details, and trading functionalities, enhancing the overall user experience. Be part of a team that drives innovation and excellence in the world of digital finance.
 
About The Role
We’re seeking a talented Senior Java Spring Engineer with 5+ years of experience to join our team. The ideal candidate will have strong expertise in Java Spring Boot and microservice development. Experience with AWS, full-stack development, and blockchain technology is a plus. Additionally, candidates must have proven experience with recommendation algorithms and large language models (LLMs), which is a key requirement for this role.

lists.content:
• Design, develop, and maintain backend services and APIs for global products using Java.
  • Build a high-performance, highly available, and secure backend system to provide robust support for business operations.
  • Working closely with team members across different time zones to ensure effective collaboration and communication.
  • Collaborate closely with product managers and project managers to own the end-to-end system architecture.
  • Optimize system performance, reliability, and scalability in a production environment.
  • Build production LLM systems to power business functions, from data to production, emphasizing automation and reproducibility.
  • Optimize and support LLM workloads in on-prem environments.

• Bachelor's degree in Computer Science, Engineering, or related field.
  • Minimum of 5 years of experience in software development and architecture.
  • Strong expertise in Java and backend frameworks (e.g., Spring Boot, RESTful APIs)
  • Experience with databases (SQL and/or NoSQL), messaging systems (e.g., Kafka, RabbitMQ), and microservices architecture
  • Experience in LLM-related project architecture design, code development, and performance tuning.
  • Experience in LLM training and development of optimization-related platform tools.
  • Bilingual English/Mandarin is required to be able to coordinate with overseas partners and stakeholders.

• Full-stack development experience is an advantage.
  • Experience with AWS cloud services is a plus.
  • Knowledge of blockchain technology is preferred.

lists.content:
• Collaborate with relevant stakeholders to convert business requirements into services with solid code and meaningful tests.
  • Proactively initiate performance tuning, troubleshoot incidents, etc.
  • Write and maintain high-quality technical documentation.
  • Write high quality code, follows best practices and advocates for engineering excellence.
  • Collaborate across other engineering teams and mentor junior members of the team.

• Bachelor's degree in computer science, engineering, or equivalent industry experience.
  • Minimum 4 years of professional experience in building high-throughput distributed applications.
  • Proficient in core Java and the Spring Framework.
  • Proficient in MySQL, and familiar with at least one NoSQL database.
  • Proficient in distributed system design, and familiar with at least one messaging middleware and the underlying design principles.
  • A quick learner with the ability to perform under pressure.
  • Able to collaborate with the remote team across different time zones.

• Performance tuning experience on JVM, SQL, RPC, etc.
  • Experience in KYC or Compliance is a plus.

lists.content:
• Design, develop, and maintain backend services and APIs for global products using Java.
  • Build a high-performance, highly available, and secure backend system to provide robust support for BigPay Fiat business operations.
  • Engage in and improve the whole lifecycle of service, from inception and design, through to deployment, operation, and refinement.
  • Develop and maintain tools, re-designing capacity planning infrastructure for greater scalability.
  • Troubleshooting, diagnosing, fixing software issues, and ensuring data security, and end-to-end system architecture.

• Minimum of 7 years of experience in software development and architecture.
  • Strong expertise in Java and backend frameworks (e.g., Spring Boot, RESTful APIs)
  • Experience with databases (SQL and/or NoSQL), messaging systems (e.g., Kafka, RabbitMQ), and microservices architecture
  • In-depth understanding of Linux and computer networks.
  • Experience in profiling, benchmarking and optimizing ML applications
  • Ability to speak in English and Kazakhstan/Russian language is required to coordinate with external Kazakhstan business partners and stakeholders.
    •  
    Middleware:
  • Java code development experience, preferably Apache open source project developers
  • Experience in high availability, high performance, and resource optimization.

job_detail_fetch.descriptionPlain:
Binance is a leading global blockchain ecosystem behind the world’s largest cryptocurrency exchange by trading volume and registered users. We are trusted by 300+ million people in 100+ countries for our industry-leading security, user fund transparency, trading engine speed, deep liquidity, and an unmatched portfolio of digital-asset products. Binance offerings range from trading and finance to education, research, payments, institutional services, Web3 features, and more. We leverage the power of digital assets and blockchain to build an inclusive financial ecosystem to advance the freedom of money and improve financial access for people around the world.


The Binance Wallet team is building a decentralized version of Binance, featuring on-chain infrastructure, self-custody wallets, a DEX, and decentralized Earn and more. We empower users with full control over their assets for seamless token trading across any blockchain. This Web3 initiative expands our strategic landscape and complements our CEX business, offering significant growth potential. Join us and be part of this exciting journey.

lists.content:
• Responsible for designing, developing, and maintaining a high-performance system, ensuring the rationality and reliability of the system.
  • Understand and apply block-chain technology, providing corresponding development support for the Web3 Wallet projects.
  • Collaborate effectively within the team, actively participate in shaping technical architectures and solutions, continuously stay updated on and learn new technologies, and pursue emerging technologies.
  • Drive the introduction of innovative technologies and solutions within the team, approaching problem-solving with an innovative mindset.

• Around 5 years of Java development experience with a solid foundation in computer science.
  • Proficient in multi-threaded programming, familiarity with JVM, understanding of common open-source distributed middleware, caching, message queues, etc., and expertise in MySQL performance tuning.
  • Familiarity with frameworks such as Spring Cloud, and prior experience in designing and stabilizing large-scale distributed, high-concurrency, high-load, and high-availability systems is a plus.
  • Enthusiastic about technology, with stringent requirements for code quality and development standards, and effective communication and collaboration skills within a team.
  • Strong logical thinking, excellent problem analysis and solving abilities, and a strong sense of responsibility.
  • Understanding of blockchain technology, with preference given to candidates with related project experience.
  • Experience applying AI technologies or integrating AI solutions into software development is highly desirable.
    •

We leverage the power of digital assets and blockchain to build an inclusive financial ecosystem to advance the freedom of money and improve financial access for people around the world.

About Binance Accelerator Program
Binance Accelerator Program is a concise fixed-term program designed for Early Career Talent to have an immersive experience in the rapidly expanding Web3 space. You will be given the opportunity to experience life at Binance and understand what goes on behind the scenes of the worlds’ leading blockchain ecosystem. Alongside your job, there will also be a focus on networking and development, which will expand your professional network and build transferable skills to propel you forward in your career. Learn about BAP Program HERE
 
Who may apply
 Current university students and recent graduates


About the Role
This internship is part of Tech Seeds 2026 — our program to identify and develop AI-native young talent. As an Applied AI Agent Engineer intern, you will take on a hands-on builder role at the intersection of LLMs and production systems, working alongside full-time engineers on agent workflows, tool integrations, backend services, and AI system architecture from day one.
This is not a shadowing role. You will own deliverables, run experiments, and ship code that matters.
What Makes You a Fit for Tech Seeds 2026
You are curious, proactive, and builder-minded. You already experiment with AI tools on your own, learn quickly, and want to turn AI ideas into practical systems that work in the real world.
Learn about BAP Program HERE
 
Who may apply
 
Current University students and recent Graduates who can commit at least 6 months tenure, 5 days per week

This is not a shadowing role. You will own deliverables, run experiments, and ship code that matters.

What Makes You a Fit for Tech Seeds 2026

Current University students and recent Graduates who can commit at least 6 months tenure, 5 days per week

lists.content:
• Support the design and development of AI agent workflows and LLM-powered application components

  • Build and test prompt strategies, retrieval flows, tool-use logic, orchestration patterns, and backend integrations

  • Assist in defining evaluation metrics, running benchmarks, and analyzing failure cases

  • Improve system performance across quality, latency, reliability, safety, and cost

  • Use AI coding tools as a normal part of your workflow to accelerate development and problem-solving

  • Collaborate with engineers and cross-functional teams to understand how production AI systems are designed, deployed, and improved

  • Contribute to backend services, APIs, internal tools, or lightweight user interfaces when needed

• Currently pursuing a Bachelor’s or Master’s degree in Computer Science, Software Engineering, Data Science, or a related field

  • Expected graduation in 2026 or 2027

  • Solid programming skills in Python or Java; familiarity with backend engineering is preferred

  • Good problem-solving ability and comfort working with APIs, debugging, and data

  • Strong curiosity about LLMs, AI agents, automation, and real-world system design

  • Ability to break down ambiguous problems and move from idea to working prototype

  • Comfortable learning quickly and working in a fast-moving environment

  • Available for a 6-month full-time commitment

• Personal projects or coursework involving LLM applications, agent systems, automation, or AI-assisted development

  • Familiarity with OpenAI APIs, Anthropic APIs, Hugging Face, LangChain, vector databases, or workflow tools

  • Experience with Git, databases, backend services, or cloud platforms

job_detail_fetch.descriptionPlain:
We are seeking a dedicated and dynamic individual to join our affiliate team, focusing on managing an expanding network of affiliates. This role primarily involves collaborating with prominent KOLs to ensure the effectiveness of their promotional efforts. A significant aspect of the position includes liaising with various internal departments to equip affiliates with the necessary assets and tools to attract more users to Binance. The ideal candidate will possess an analytical mindset, a background in marketing or public relations, and excellent communication skills for both internal and external interactions. Given Binance's extensive affiliate network, you will be expected to deliver exceptional value through your work, surpassing competitors in the quest for top affiliates.
 
The role requires proficiency in using in-house tools, necessitating quick learning and collaboration with developers to enhance systems and interfaces, resolve issues, and conduct comprehensive analyses of existing data.

lists.content:
• Assist in growing the affiliate network through outreach to YouTubers, media outlets, influencers, and other potential partners
  • Support negotiations, onboarding, and documentation processes for new affiliates
  • Help manage key affiliate accounts by maintaining regular communication and analyzing their performance data
  • Contribute to the creation and execution of promotional campaigns focused on maximizing ROI
  • Build and maintain reports using internal data to optimize affiliate channel performance
  • Monitor competitor activities and assist in adjusting affiliate strategies accordingly
  • Support fraud detection efforts by identifying potential scams or manipulations within the affiliate network

• Currently pursuing or recently completed a degree in Business, Marketing, Finance, or a related field
  • Basic understanding or strong interest in affiliate marketing and business development
  • Familiarity with the crypto space is a plus
  • Excellent communication and interpersonal skills
  • Comfortable working with media, influencers, or key partners
  • Strong analytical mindset with attention to detail
  • Fluency in English is required to be able to coordinate with overseas partners and stakeholders. Additional languages would be an advantage
  • Proactive, responsible, and eager to learn in a fast-paced environment

• Practical experience managing affiliate relationships and campaigns
  • Exposure to the fintech and crypto industries
  • Opportunity to develop negotiation, communication, and analytical skills
  • Mentorship from experienced professionals in affiliate marketing and business development

  • Support fraud detection efforts by identifying potential scams or manipulations within the affiliate network

• Currently pursuing or recently completed a degree in Business, Marketing, Finance, or a related field
  • Basic understanding or strong interest in affiliate marketing and business development
  • Familiarity with the crypto space is a plus
  • Excellent communication and interpersonal skills
  • Comfortable working with media, influencers, or key partners
  • Strong analytical mindset with attention to detail
  • Fluency in English is required to be able to coordinate with overseas partners and stakeholders. Additional languages would be an advantage
  • Proactive, responsible, and eager to learn in a fast-paced environment

• Practical experience managing affiliate relationships and campaigns
  • Exposure to the fintech and crypto industries
  • Opportunity to develop negotiation, communication, and analytical skills
  • Mentorship from experienced professionals in affiliate marketing and business development

job_detail_fetch.descriptionBody:
We are seeking a dedicated and dynamic individual to join our affiliate team, focusing on managing an expanding network of affiliates. This role primarily involves collaborating with prominent KOLs to ensure the effectiveness of their promotional efforts. A significant aspect of the position includes liaising with various internal departments to equip affiliates with the necessary assets and tools to attract more users to Binance. The ideal candidate will possess an analytical mindset, a background in marketing or public relations, and excellent communication skills for both internal and external interactions. Given Binance's extensive affiliate network, you will be expected to deliver exceptional value through your work, surpassing competitors in the quest for top affiliates.
 
The role requires proficiency in using in-house tools, necessitating quick learning and collaboration with developers to enhance systems and interfaces, resolve issues, and conduct comprehensive analyses of existing data.

job_detail_fetch.descriptionPlain:
Binance is a leading global blockchain ecosystem behind the world’s largest cryptocurrency exchange by trading volume and registered users. We are trusted by 300+ million people in 100+ countries for our industry-leading security, user fund transparency, trading engine speed, deep liquidity, and an unmatched portfolio of digital-asset products. Binance offerings range from trading and finance to education, research, payments, institutional services, Web3 features, and more. We leverage the power of digital assets and blockchain to build an inclusive financial ecosystem to advance the freedom of money and improve financial access for people around the world.

About Binance Accelerator Program
Binance Accelerator Program is a concise fixed-term program designed for Early Career Talent to have an immersive experience in the rapidly expanding Web3 space. You will be given the opportunity to experience life at Binance and understand what goes on behind the scenes of the worlds’ leading blockchain ecosystem. Alongside your job, there will also be a focus on networking and development, which will expand your professional network and build transferable skills to propel you forward in your career. Learn about BAP Program HERE
 
Who may apply
 Current university students and recent graduates


We are seeking a motivated and detail-oriented early-career Data Analyst to support our operations and business teams.
 
This role is perfect for individuals passionate about data, business insights, and performance tracking. You will gain hands-on experience analyzing real business data and contributing to informed decision-making.

We are seeking a motivated and detail-oriented early-career Data Analyst to support our operations and business teams.
 
This role is perfect for individuals passionate about data, business insights, and performance tracking. You will gain hands-on experience analyzing real business data and contributing to informed decision-making.

lists.content:
• Assist in cleaning and organizing data to ensure accuracy and consistency for analysis
  • Support the preparation of routine operational reports and KPI tracking
  • Monitor key metrics and help identify anomalies or unusual trends
  • Contribute to basic data analysis to uncover business performance insights
  • Support attribution analysis to explore potential factors driving changes in data
  • Help develop dashboards and summary reports for internal stakeholders
  • Assist in optimizing reporting processes and enhancing data organization for greater efficiency

• Current university student or recent graduate, preferably in an analytical or business-related field
  • Proficient with Excel, including basic formulas and pivot tables
  • Basic understanding of data analysis concepts
  • Familiarity with SQL or Python is a plus, but not required
  • Strong logical thinking and keen attention to detail
  • Effective communication skills and a proactive willingness to learn
  • Interest in web3, digital platforms, or analytics is an advantage

• Responsible and proactive in taking initiative
  • Rapid and adaptable learner
  • Comfortable and efficient working within structured environments
  • Skilled at managing and prioritizing multiple tasks simultaneously

About the Role

Want to work on AI that engineers use every day? As part of the Binance Accelerator Program, you'll help build internal tools that make developers faster and less blocked. Real work, real ownership, real impact.

lists.content:
• Build AI-powered tools like coding assistants, knowledge retrieval systems, and workflow automation
  • Develop LLM-powered applications for code generation, code understanding, and test automation
  • Work with engineering teams to identify pain points and ship AI-driven solutions
  • Experiment with Prompt Engineering, RAG, and AI Agents
  • Explore and adopt emerging AI technologies as they evolve

• Currently pursuing or recently completed a degree in Computer Science or a related field
  • Can code in at least one language — Python, Java, Go, or JavaScript
  • Basic understanding of how LLMs work and have used tools like ChatGPT or Copilot
  • Comfortable with APIs and how systems connect
  • You take initiative — you don't wait to be told what to do next.
  • Bilingual English/Mandarin is required to be able to coordinate with overseas partners and stakeholders

lists.content:
1. Participate in the design, development, and maintenance of AI-related components, including model serving, inference modules, and associated toolchain development.

  2. Participate in LLM evaluation work, including effectiveness assessment, benchmark construction, and experimental analysis, as well as assist in model performance optimization.

  3. Contribute to system performance, stability, and reliability improvements, driving engineering optimizations such as inference efficiency and resource utilization.

  4. Participate in the design and implementation of AI solutions for business scenarios, including but not limited to Agent, RAG, and AIGC applications.

  5. Collaborate with product, algorithm, and engineering teams to drive the adoption and iteration of AI capabilities in real-world business contexts.

1. Basic Requirements

  • Currently pursuing a Bachelor's degree or above in Computer Science, Artificial Intelligence, Software Engineering, or a related field.

  • Available to intern at least 3 days per week; internship duration of 6 months or more is preferred.

    • 2. Technical Skills (Core Requirements)

  • Solid programming fundamentals with proficiency in Python (required) and good coding practices.

  • Basic understanding of backend development (API design, service development, etc.).

  • Familiarity with at least one deep learning framework (PyTorch / TensorFlow).

  • Basic understanding of large language models (LLMs), such as Transformer architecture, fine-tuning, and inference pipelines.

    • 3. Bonus Skills (Strongly Preferred)

  • Experience or knowledge in Prompt Engineering / RAG / Agent.

  • Experience with model evaluation (benchmarks, automated assessment).

  • Familiarity with frameworks such as LangChain / LlamaIndex / Dify / Coze is a plus.

  • Prior project experience in AIGC, dialogue systems, or intelligent agents is a plus.

  • Familiarity with Linux environments and basic debugging skills.

  • Knowledge of Docker / Kubernetes / distributed systems is a plus.

  • Some understanding of system performance optimization (latency, throughput, resource utilization).

    •

lists.content:
This internship is part of Tech Seeds 2026 — our program to identify and develop AI-native young talent. As an Applied AI Agent Engineer young talent, you will take on a hands-on builder role at the intersection of LLMs and production systems, working alongside full-time engineers on agent workflows, tool integrations, backend services, and AI system architecture from day one.

This is not a shadowing role. You will own deliverables, run experiments, and ship code that matters.

• Support the design and development of AI agent workflows and LLM-powered application components

  • Build and test prompt strategies, retrieval flows, tool-use logic, orchestration patterns, and backend integrations

  • Assist in defining evaluation metrics, running benchmarks, and analyzing failure cases

  • Improve system performance across quality, latency, reliability, safety, and cost

  • Use AI coding tools as a normal part of your workflow to accelerate development and problem-solving

  • Collaborate with engineers and cross-functional teams to understand how production AI systems are designed, deployed, and improved

  • Contribute to backend services, APIs, internal tools, or lightweight user interfaces when needed

• Currently pursuing a Bachelor’s or Master’s degree in Computer Science, Software Engineering, Data Science, or a related field

  • Expected graduation in 2026 or 2027

  • Solid programming skills in Python or Java; familiarity with backend engineering is preferred

  • Good problem-solving ability and comfort working with APIs, debugging, and data

  • Strong curiosity about LLMs, AI agents, automation, and real-world system design

  • Ability to break down ambiguous problems and move from idea to working prototype

  • Comfortable learning quickly and working in a fast-moving environment

  • Available for a 6-month full-time commitment

• Personal projects or coursework involving LLM applications, agent systems, automation, or AI-assisted development

  • Familiarity with OpenAI APIs, Anthropic APIs, Hugging Face, LangChain, vector databases, or workflow tools

  • Experience with Git, databases, backend services, or cloud platforms

lists.text: What Makes You a Fit for Tech Seeds 2026
lists.content: You are curious, proactive, and builder-minded. You already experiment with AI tools on your own, learn quickly, and want to turn AI ideas into practical systems that work in the real world.

About the Role

This internship is part of Tech Seeds 2026 — our program to identify and develop AI-native young talent. As an Applied AI Agent Engineer intern, you will take on a hands-on builder role at the intersection of LLMs and production systems, working alongside full-time engineers on agent workflows, tool integrations, backend services, and AI system architecture from day one.

This is not a shadowing role. You will own deliverables, run experiments, and ship code that matters.

lists.content:
• Support the design and development of AI agent workflows and LLM-powered application components
  • Build and test prompt strategies, retrieval flows, tool-use logic, orchestration patterns, and backend integrations
  • Assist in defining evaluation metrics, running benchmarks, and analyzing failure cases
  • Improve system performance across quality, latency, reliability, safety, and cost
  • Use AI coding tools as a normal part of your workflow to accelerate development and problem-solving
  • Collaborate with engineers and cross-functional teams to understand how production AI systems are designed, deployed, and improved
  • Contribute to backend services, APIs, internal tools, or lightweight user interfaces when needed

    •

• Currently pursuing a Bachelor’s or Master’s degree in Computer Science, Software Engineering, Data Science, or a related field
  • Expected graduation in 2026 or 2027
  • Solid programming skills in Python or Java; familiarity with backend engineering is preferred
  • Good problem-solving ability and comfort working with APIs, debugging, and data
  • Strong curiosity about LLMs, AI agents, automation, and real-world system design
  • Ability to break down ambiguous problems and move from idea to working prototype
  • Comfortable learning quickly and working in a fast-moving environment
  • Available for a 6-month full-time commitment

    •  

    Bonus Points

  • Personal projects or coursework involving LLM applications, agent systems, automation, or AI-assisted development
  • Familiarity with OpenAI APIs, Anthropic APIs, Hugging Face, LangChain, vector databases, or workflow tools
  • Experience with Git, databases, backend services, or cloud platforms

    •  

    What Makes You a Fit for Tech Seeds 2026

    You are curious, proactive, and builder-minded. You already experiment with AI tools on your own, learn quickly, and want to turn AI ideas into practical systems that work in the real world.

lists.content:
You'll work directly on the AI systems powering Binance AI Products and next-generation agentic trading features — alongside the full-time algorithm team, on real production challenges.

You own deliverables, run experiments, and ship code that matters. You build components of AI systems (agents, pipelines, evaluation tools), debug real systems, and work with engineers to ship features that reach users.

This is not a "watch and learn" program. You are expected to build, contribute, and ship.

• Contribute to the design and development of LLM-powered pipelines for agentic trading — including reasoning agent components, tool-use frameworks via MCP, and automated workflow execution across crypto markets.

  • Build and evaluate prompt engineering strategies, test-time scaling approaches, and retrieval architectures for crypto-native data sources — on-chain data, market feeds, news, and sentiment signals.

  • Design and run model evaluation experiments — defining quality metrics for agent reasoning in financial contexts, executing benchmarks, and synthesizing results into actionable findings.

  • Analyze agent performance characteristics in live trading scenarios — covering decision accuracy, latency, reliability, and adversarial robustness.

  • Apply AI-native development practices using agentic coding tools as a standard part of the engineering workflow — writing and executing Python code for strategy logic, data pipelines, and agent evaluation.

• Currently pursuing a Bachelor's or Master's degree in Computer Science, Data Science, Statistics, Mathematics, or related technical field.

  • Expected graduation in 2026 or 2027.

  • Strong Python programming skills with demonstrated AI-native development practices — you use agentic coding tools (Claude Code, Cursor, GitHub Copilot Workspace) as a core part of your workflow.

  • Foundational understanding of how large language models work — attention mechanisms, prompting, and the difference between standard generation and reasoning models.

  • Structured problem-solving approach and ability to operate independently on defined tasks.

  • Experience with open source projects is preferred

lists.content:
Job Responsibilities

  • Assist in researching and analyzing emerging blockchain technologies, including consensus mechanisms, on-chain transaction models, and differences across various blockchain architectures (e.g., EVM vs non-EVM).

  • Contribute to analyzing real-world Web3 security incidents under guidance, and help brainstorm proof-of-concept solutions.

  • Monitor blockchain security news and report emerging risks, vulnerabilities, or novel attack vectors.

  • Participate in internal discussions, team reviews, and threat modeling activities.

  • Help document findings, write basic research summaries, and contribute to internal knowledge bases.

    • Requirements

    • Strong interest in blockchain, smart contracts, cybersecurity, or DeFi — enthusiasm and curiosity are key.

    • Solid foundation in computer science or related technical background (students in CS, EE, math, etc. welcome).

    • Familiarity with at least one programming language (e.g., Python, JavaScript, Solidity, or Rust is a plus).

    • Basic understanding of blockchain concepts such as transactions, wallets, or smart contracts (coursework, personal projects, or self-study accepted).

    • Strong problem-solving skills and willingness to dive into technical details.

    • Fluency in English is required to be able to coordinate with overseas partners and stakeholders. Additional languages would be an advantage

    • Bonus: personal Web3 projects, CTF participation, GitHub contributions, blog posts, or any self-initiated security research.

About Binance Square 
Binance Square aims to be the one-stop social platform for the latest trends in Web3 and crypto. With a vast selection of content from renowned crypto experts, avid enthusiasts, and trusted media sources, the platform serves as a bridge between content creators and their followers, customizing users’ feeds based on their respective engagement history. Join us to be part of a team that is shaping the future of social interaction in the crypto space.
