About Binance Square 
Binance Square aims to be the one-stop social platform for the latest trends in Web3 and crypto. With a vast selection of content from renowned crypto experts, avid enthusiasts, and trusted media sources, the platform serves as a bridge between content creators and their followers, customizing users’ feeds based on their respective engagement history. Join us to be part of a team that is shaping the future of social interaction in the crypto space.

lists.content:
• Assist in identifying and expanding a global network of crypto content creators, KOLs, and community leaders, guiding them to join Binance Square.
  • Support creators throughout the entire onboarding process, including communication, documentation, and basic product guidance.
  • Track and analyze content performance and community feedback (e.g., engagement rates, growth metrics) to provide data-driven insights for content strategy and growth.
  • Assist in planning and executing online events such as AMAs, live streams, campaigns, and regional community operations
    Continuously monitor crypto trends, hot topics, and emerging creators across global regions including CIS, LATAM, SEA, MENA, etc.
  • Support daily team operations and project execution to improve overall efficiency.

• Current university student or recent graduate with a strong interest in Crypto, Web3, and content communities.
  • Experience in Web3, crypto industry, or internet content platforms is a plus.
  • Familiarity with at least one regional market (e.g., CIS, LATAM, Southeast Asia, Middle East) creator ecosystems or community environments.
  • Multilingual abilities preferred for better communication with internal & external stakeholders, including but not limited to: English + Chinese/Spanish/Russian/Portuguese. 
  • Strong communication, execution, and project management skills.
  • Proactive, quick learner, and adaptable to a fast-changing work environment.
  • Experience in community operations, content creation, or KOL collaboration is a plus

lists.text: We Are Looking For Someone Who
lists.content:
• Understands “growth” and “content ecosystem” beyond just business development execution.
  • Is eager to participate in global market expansion with cross-cultural communication awareness.
  • Stays sensitive to crypto industry trends and continuously identifies potential creators.
  • Having hands-on experience managing social media accounts such as Twitter, Telegram, YouTube, TikTok.
  • Experience organizing or leading AMAs, Spaces, live streams, or similar events.
  • Established creator or community resources in specific regions (e.g., LATAM, CIS, SEA).

We are trusted by 300+ million people in 100+ countries for our industry-leading security, user fund transparency, trading engine speed, deep liquidity, and an unmatched portfolio of digital-asset products. Binance offerings range from trading and finance to education, research, payments, institutional services, Web3 features, and more. We leverage the power of digital assets and blockchain to build an inclusive financial ecosystem to advance the freedom of money and improve financial access for people around the world.

About Binance Accelerator Program
Binance Accelerator Program is a concise fixed-term program designed for Early Career Talent to have an immersive experience in the rapidly expanding Web3 space. You will be given the opportunity to experience life at Binance and understand what goes on behind the scenes of the worlds’ leading blockchain ecosystem. Alongside your job, there will also be a focus on networking and development, which will expand your professional network and build transferable skills to propel you forward in your career. Learn about BAP Program HERE
 
Who may apply
 Current university students and recent graduates

lists.content:
• Contribute to the design and development of AI agents integrated into live systems.
  • Help build and maintain benchmark datasets to evaluate AI performance.
  • Design, prototype, and iterate AI agent workflows using frameworks such as LangChain, LangGraph, or similar frameworks.
  • Collaborate closely with senior engineers on system design, integration, and deployment.

• Currently pursuing a degree in Artificial Intelligence, Computer Science, or a related field.
  • Familiarity with LLM application development, including prompt engineering, RAG. Knowledge of LLM fine-tuning is a plus.
  • Hands-on experience with LLM frameworks (e.g., LangChain, LangGraph) is a strong plus.
  • Strong programming fundamentals and experience with Python.
  • Interest in AI, data-driven systems, and building tools for real-world applications.
  • Good communication skills and willingness to learn quickly.
  • Ability to commit at least for a 6 months tenure, 5 days per week.

About the Role
As a Data Scientist on our team, you’ll be at the forefront of safeguarding Binance’s ecosystem by leveraging data to detect anomalies, assess threats, and predict potential risks across the platform. Our mission is to build intelligent, scalable systems that proactively identify fraud, prevent abuse, and ensure the integrity of user activity without compromising on performance or user experience. Join us in building a safer, smarter crypto future.

About the Role

As a Data Scientist on our team, you’ll be at the forefront of safeguarding Binance’s ecosystem by leveraging data to detect anomalies, assess threats, and predict potential risks across the platform. Our mission is to build intelligent, scalable systems that proactively identify fraud, prevent abuse, and ensure the integrity of user activity without compromising on performance or user experience. Join us in building a safer, smarter crypto future.

lists.content:
• Design, develop, and assess AI models focused on detecting P2P scams, with a particular emphasis on document verification and payment proof tampering.
  • Research and prototype large language model (LLM)-based solutions to enhance automated detection, generate interpretable rule-based explanations, and support scam pattern discovery.
  • Investigate and implement cutting-edge image embedding techniques to extract meaningful features for downstream applications such as clustering and classification.
  • Collaborate closely with data scientists and engineers to optimize the detection pipeline and deliver actionable insights to key stakeholders.

• Currently enrolled as a full-time or part-time undergraduate, Master’s, or PhD student, or a recent graduate.
  • Solid understanding of AI principles and mathematical foundations, including deep learning, generative AI, reinforcement learning, prompt engineering, and optimization techniques.
  • Strong interest in Agentic Prompt Engineering and its applications.

• Commitment to a minimum duration of 1 year.
  • Proficiency in programming languages, particularly Python and SQL.
  • Practical experience in developing computer vision and/or image analysis models.

About the role
We are looking for a Golang Engineer to join our team. The ideal candidate is proficient in Go programming and has a strong background in data-related fields. Experience with data analysis and frontend development will be a plus. You will primarily work on developing and optimizing our rule engine and may also be involved in AI-related projects.

About the role
We are looking for a Golang Engineer to join our team. The ideal candidate is proficient in Go programming and has a strong background in data-related fields. Experience with data analysis and frontend development will be a plus. You will primarily work on developing and optimizing our rule engine and may also be involved in AI-related projects.

lists.content:
• Leveraging knowledge of financial derivatives, participate in the design and development of a Web3 AI-powered financial token risk control system integrated into a real-world system.
  • Assist in building and maintaining benchmark datasets to evaluate the performance of the AI ​​system, and assist in prototyping and iterating the workflow of the financial AI agent system.
  • Work closely with senior engineers to complete system design, integration, and deployment.

• Currently pursuing a degree in finance, fintech, or a related field.
  • Understanding financial derivatives risk measurement, including but not limited to VaR, CVA, FVA, and PFE, to support risk management of interest rate derivatives, credit derivatives, and FX/commodity options.
  • Interested in secondary market trading, with basic programming skills and Python experience.
  • Passionate about artificial intelligence, data-driven systems, and building practical application tools.
  • Excellent communication skills and a strong willingness to learn quickly.
  • Able to commit at least 6 months, working 5 days a week.

• Shape the future with the world's leading blockchain ecosystem、

• Work alongside world-class talent in a user-centric, flat, global organization

• Independently complete unique and fast-paced projects in an innovative environment

• Thrive in a results-oriented work environment with opportunities for career development and continuous learning

• Competitive compensation and benefits

• Work-from-home available (specific arrangements may vary depending on the nature of the business team)

Good communication skills and willingness to learn quickly.

Ability to commit at least for a 6 months tenure, 5 days per week.

lists.content:
Leveraging knowledge of large-scale models and intelligent agents, participate in the design and development of a series of AI-powered financial trading agency skills based on Web3 data, and integrate them into practical systems.

Perform post-training of large-scale language models (SFT, RL, etc.) to enhance the model's ability to utilize Binance's internal trading skills.

Assist in building and maintaining benchmark datasets to evaluate the performance of AI systems, and assist in building and iterating workflow prototypes for financial AI agent systems.

Work closely with senior engineers to complete system design, integration, and deployment.

Currently pursuing or holding a Bachelor’s, Master’s, or Ph.D. degree in Computer Science, Artificial Intelligence, Financial Engineering, Automation, or a related field.

Hands-on experience with post-training techniques such as Supervised Fine-Tuning (SFT) and Reinforcement Learning (RLHF / RLAIF) . Familiar with common fine-tuning and reinforcement learning frameworks, such as Llama Factory, Slime, Verl, and OpenRLHF.

Familiarity with at least one mainstream deep learning framework (PyTorch, TensorFlow) and common LLM training/evaluation toolkits (Hugging Face Transformers, DeepSpeed, vLLM, etc.).

Excellent communication skills and a strong willingness to learn quickly.

Able to commit at least 6 months, working 5 days a week.

• Shape the future with the world's leading blockchain ecosystem

• Independently complete unique and fast-paced projects in an innovative environment

We are looking for a passionate and creative Graphic Design early career talent to join our Europe marketing team at Binance. We are looking for a passionate and creative Graphic Design early career talent to join our Europe marketing team at Binance. This role offers a unique opportunity to gain hands-on experience in delivering high-impact design assets for regional and global campaigns across digital, social, events, and out-of-home (OOH) channels. You will work closely with experienced designers and marketing professionals to support creative delivery, localization, and campaign scaling efforts.

lists.content:
• Creative Design Support:  
  • Assist in interpreting creative briefs to produce engaging design assets for Europe and global campaigns, including key visuals, social media content, digital marketing materials, events, and OOH.  
  • Support the translation of creative direction into on-brand designs for daily, weekly, and seasonal campaigns.  
  • Collaborate with design leads, project managers, copywriters, and senior designers to contribute to integrated creative campaigns.  
  • Help coordinate with local marketing teams to support regional creative initiatives.  
  • Contribute ideas to innovate and elevate Binance’s brand presence through design.
    •  
  • Localization & Campaign Assistance:
  • Support the localization and adaptation of global creative assets to ensure cultural relevance for European markets.  
  • Assist in designing and localizing paid advertising campaign materials.  
  • Help the acquisition and retention teams by delivering engaging digital campaign assets that drive brand awareness and user engagement.  
  • Monitor campaign performance insights and assist in applying learnings to improve creative output.  
  • Stay informed on competitor activity, brand trends, and social media design innovations.
    •  
  • Creative Operations & Collaboration  
  • Assist in improving creative workflows and processes alongside design leads and program managers.  
  • Work closely with global and regional marketing, social media, events, and campaign teams to maintain a consistent omni-channel brand experience.  
  • Manage assigned tasks independently to meet deadlines and quality standards.  
  • Support coordination with third-party agencies and freelancers on creative projects.  
  • Build positive working relationships with Binance’s global marketing teams to align on creative vision.

• Currently pursuing or recently completed a degree or professional qualification in graphic design, digital design, visual communication, or a related field.  
  • Strong interest in design with some practical experience through coursework, personal projects, or internships.  
  • Basic proficiency in Figma and / or Adobe Creative Suite (Photoshop, Illustrator); familiarity with 3D software or generative AI tools is a plus.  
  • Good understanding of the end-to-end design process: concept development, production, and delivery.  
  • Creative thinker with a keen visual eye and eagerness to learn and generate innovative ideas.  
  • Ability to work collaboratively in a team environment and take initiative on assigned tasks.  
  • Familiarity with project management tools such as Asana, Microsoft Office, and Google Workspace is desirable.  
  • Passion for the crypto industry or fast-paced sectors like lifestyle, sports, or fashion is a bonus.
  • Fluency in English is required to be able to coordinate with overseas partners and stakeholders. Additional languages would be an advantage.

lists.content:
• Assist in the development and mainenance of our products, using frontend tech stack (TS, React, etc) and NodeJS.
  • Collaborate closely with product team and local team to ensure seamless implementation of new features and user interfaces.
  • Work with cross-functional teams (such as security, IT, infra, etc) to identify and solve other issues.
  • Continuously learn and keep up-to-date with the latest front-end technologies and best practices.

• Participate in the development and maintenance of frontend products using diverse technologies.
  • Collaborate closely with product and local teams to implement new features and user interfaces smoothly.
  • Work with cross-functional teams (security, IT, infrastructure, etc.) to identify and resolve issues.
  • Continuously learn and stay updated with the latest frontend technologies, tools, and best practices.

• Passionate about frontend development; open to any tech stack (no strict limitation).Proficient in at least one frontend technology or framework (e.g., React, Vue, Angular) or willing to learn quickly.
  • Must be skilled in using AI tools to assist and enhance development processes.
  • Strong learning ability, proactive attitude, and good communication and teamwork skills.
  • Able to leverage AI tools and technologies to improve development efficiency and innovation.
  • Available for 5 days per week, minimum 3 months; 6+ months preferred.

job_detail_fetch.descriptionPlain:
Binance is a leading global blockchain ecosystem behind the world’s largest cryptocurrency exchange by trading volume and registered users. We are trusted by 300+ million people in 100+ countries for our industry-leading security, user fund transparency, trading engine speed, deep liquidity, and an unmatched portfolio of digital-asset products. Binance offerings range from trading and finance to education, research, payments, institutional services, Web3 features, and more. We leverage the power of digital assets and blockchain to build an inclusive financial ecosystem to advance the freedom of money and improve financial access for people around the world.

About Binance Accelerator Program
Binance Accelerator Program is a concise fixed-term program designed for Early Career Talent to have an immersive experience in the rapidly expanding Web3 space. You will be given the opportunity to experience life at Binance and understand what goes on behind the scenes of the worlds’ leading blockchain ecosystem. Alongside your job, there will also be a focus on networking and development, which will expand your professional network and build transferable skills to propel you forward in your career. Learn about BAP Program HERE
 
Who may apply
 Current university students and recent graduates


We are seeking motivated early-career talent to support global online campaigns.
 
In this role, you will collaborate closely with marketing, operations, and regional teams to help launch campaigns, monitor performance, and ensure seamless execution.
 
This is an excellent opportunity for individuals eager to gain hands-on experience in the fast-growing crypto and digital asset industry.

lists.content:
• Provide support for global campaigns
  • Coordinate with cross-functional teams to ensure timely delivery of campaign milestones
  • Track key campaign metrics such as registrations, participation, and engagement levels
  • Support the creation of weekly reports and recap presentations
  • Help organize promotional materials and develop clear campaign briefs
  • Assist in monitoring reward distribution and overall campaign progress

• Current university student or recent graduate
  • Highly organized with strong attention to detail
  • Proficient in Excel or Google Sheets
  • Fluency in English is required to be able to coordinate with overseas partners and stakeholders. Additional languages would be an advantage
  • Genuine interest in marketing, events, or web3 platforms
  • Passion for crypto is a plus, but not required

• Responsible and proactive mindset
  • Fast and eager learner
  • Comfortable working within structured environments
  • Skilled at managing multiple tasks efficiently

lists.content:
• Develop, maintain, and optimize backend services and rule engines using Golang
  • Collaborate with cross-functional teams to design scalable and efficient solutions
  • Work on data processing and analysis to support business needs
  • Participate in AI-related development initiatives to enhance system capabilities
  • Contribute to frontend development when needed, helping to build seamless user experiences
  • Ensure code quality through testing, code reviews, and best practices

• Currently pursuing a Bachelor’s or Master’s degree in Computer Science or related fields
  • Strong proficiency in Golang programming language
  • Background or experience in data-related fields, such as data processing, analysis, or engineering
  • Familiarity with data analysis tools and methodologies is a plus
  • Experience or interest in AI technologies and applications
  • Basic frontend development skills (e.g., JavaScript, React, or similar) are preferred
  • Ability to work collaboratively in a fast-paced, innovative environment
  • Good problem-solving skills and attention to detail

We are seeking a motivated Infrastructure Security Engineer to join our team, contributing to the safeguarding and automation of our platform. The ideal candidate will possess not only the technical expertise to address complex challenges, but also the skill to distil them into clear, intuitive solutions. A keen eye for identifying technical debt and the capability to standardise processes and systems within a zero-trust framework are essential.

In this position, you will be entrusted with the design and implementation of robust security measures for our cloud-based infrastructure. Collaborating closely with cross-functional teams, you will ensure that our services remain secure and fully aligned with industry best practice and compliance requirements.

As part of the Infrastructure Security Engineering function at Binance, you will have the opportunity to work on innovative, high-impact projects that directly influence the security and resilience of our platform.
We welcome individuals who are deeply passionate about security and DevSecOps, and who are eager to thrive within a fast-paced, forward-thinking environment.

lists.content:
• Develop and maintain internal security tools to enhance team security posture
  • Perform daily security monitoring and operations to ensure system integrity
  • Deploy and manage security services across our infrastructure
  • Assist teams in resolving security-related issues and implementing best practices
  • Participate in security incident investigation and response activities
  • Collaborate with cross-functional teams to integrate security into the development lifecycle
  • Automate security processes and implement continuous security monitoring solutions

• Proficiency in Python or Go programming languages.
  • Experience working with the Vue framework.
  • Strong knowledge of Linux operating systems and core network security principles.
  • Practical experience with AWS or other leading cloud platforms.
  • Proficiency in using version control systems (Git) and collaborative development workflows.
  • Experience in designing and managing CI/CD pipelines, with a focus on integrating security into development processes.
  • Excellent problem-solving abilities, coupled with strong interpersonal and collaborative skills.

• Experience with AI/ML technologies, particularly in relation to their security considerations.
  • Expertise in large-context prompt engineering for security automation.
  • Hands-on experience implementing Agentic AI solutions.
  • Proficiency with Terraform or other Infrastructure as Code (IaC) tools.

About the Role
You'll be embedded in Binance's Institutional BD team, working directly on growing and retaining our institutional client base across the globe. This isn't a coffee-and-slides internship — you'll be doing real work: research, client support, market analysis, and helping the team move faster. If you want to understand how the world's largest crypto exchange builds institutional relationships, this is the room.

What You'll Do
Research and map institutional client segments (hedge funds, quant firms, family offices, market makers, corporate treasuries) — build and maintain prospect databases
Support BD leads with pitch preparation, meeting follow-ups, and CRM updates
Analyze daily volume data and competitor intelligence to identify trends and opportunities
Assist with onboarding workflows — coordinating between clients, compliance, and product teams
Prepare materials for client meetings: product summaries, market updates, competitive comparisons
Monitor competitor activity and flag relevant developments to the team
Support product adoption campaigns
Help draft internal reports, BD digests, and team briefings

What You'll Get
Direct exposure to institutional crypto BD at the world's largest exchange
Work alongside senior BD professionals covering APAC's top crypto clients
Hands-on experience with real institutional products and client relationships
Fast-paced, high-ownership environment — your work will matter from day one

Who We're Looking For
Final year undergrad or postgrad student in Finance, Economics, Business, or related field
Genuine curiosity about crypto, digital assets, and institutional markets — you follow the space
Strong analytical skills — comfortable working with data using AI, building tables, spotting patterns
Bilingual English/Mandarin is required to be able to coordinate with overseas partners and stakeholders
Detail-oriented, self-driven, can manage multiple tasks without hand-holding
Prior internship in finance, sales, or research preferred but not required

Availability & Commitment
Candidates must be available 5 full working days per week with a minimum contract duration of 6 months to ensure continuity and meaningful contribution to ongoing projects.

  • Work alongside senior BD professionals covering APAC's top crypto clients
  • Hands-on experience with real institutional products and client relationships
  • Fast-paced, high-ownership environment — your work will matter from day one

Who We're Looking For

  • Final year undergrad or postgrad student in Finance, Economics, Business, or related field
  • Genuine curiosity about crypto, digital assets, and institutional markets — you follow the space
  • Strong analytical skills — comfortable working with data using AI, building tables, spotting patterns
  • Bilingual English/Mandarin is required to be able to coordinate with overseas partners and stakeholders
  • Detail-oriented, self-driven, can manage multiple tasks without hand-holding
  • Prior internship in finance, sales, or research preferred but not required

Availability & Commitment
  • Candidates must be available 5 full working days per week with a minimum contract duration of 6 months to ensure continuity and meaningful contribution to ongoing projects.

job_detail_fetch.descriptionBody:
About the Role

You'll be embedded in Binance's Institutional BD team, working directly on growing and retaining our institutional client base across the globe. This isn't a coffee-and-slides internship — you'll be doing real work: research, client support, market analysis, and helping the team move faster. If you want to understand how the world's largest crypto exchange builds institutional relationships, this is the room.

What You'll Do

  • Research and map institutional client segments (hedge funds, quant firms, family offices, market makers, corporate treasuries) — build and maintain prospect databases
  • Support BD leads with pitch preparation, meeting follow-ups, and CRM updates
  • Analyze daily volume data and competitor intelligence to identify trends and opportunities
  • Assist with onboarding workflows — coordinating between clients, compliance, and product teams
  • Prepare materials for client meetings: product summaries, market updates, competitive comparisons
  • Monitor competitor activity and flag relevant developments to the team
  • Support product adoption campaigns
  • Help draft internal reports, BD digests, and team briefings

What You'll Get

  • Direct exposure to institutional crypto BD at the world's largest exchange
  • Work alongside senior BD professionals covering APAC's top crypto clients
  • Hands-on experience with real institutional products and client relationships
  • Fast-paced, high-ownership environment — your work will matter from day one

Who We're Looking For

  • Final year undergrad or postgrad student in Finance, Economics, Business, or related field
  • Genuine curiosity about crypto, digital assets, and institutional markets — you follow the space
  • Strong analytical skills — comfortable working with data using AI, building tables, spotting patterns
  • Bilingual English/Mandarin is required to be able to coordinate with overseas partners and stakeholders
  • Detail-oriented, self-driven, can manage multiple tasks without hand-holding
  • Prior internship in finance, sales, or research preferred but not required

Availability & Commitment
  • Candidates must be available 5 full working days per week with a minimum contract duration of 6 months to ensure continuity and meaningful contribution to ongoing projects.

lists.content:
• Assist in the training, fine-tuning, and evaluation of Large Language Models (LLMs) using public and in-house datasets.
  • Support the development and optimization of AI agents, including prompt engineering, memory modules, planning strategies, and integration with external tools.
  • Design, implement, and manage data annotation pipelines, including schema definition, labeling guidelines, and quality control processes.
  • Work closely with research and engineering teams to improve model performance, scalability, and robustness.
  • Conduct experiments, perform data analysis, and clearly document methodologies and findings.
  • Explore and test new tools, frameworks, and best practices for enhancing LLM systems and AI agent capabilities.

• Currently pursuing or recently completed a Degree in Computer Science, Artificial Intelligence, Electrical Engineering, or a related discipline. PHD is Bonus.
  • Solid understanding of machine learning and deep learning fundamentals.
  • Familiarity with transformer models, LLMs (e.g., LLaMA, Qwen), or related technologies is a strong plus.
  • Experience or interest in prompt engineering, fine-tuning methods (e.g., LoRA, QLoRA), and model evaluation techniques.
  • Basic knowledge of data annotation workflows and labeling tools.
  • Strong analytical and problem-solving skills; able to work both independently and collaboratively.
  • Fluency in English is required to be able to coordinate with overseas partners and stakeholders. Additional languages would be an advantage.

• Assist with content creation and management for blogs, announcements, and educational materials;
  • Support internal communication initiatives, particularly within lifecycle marketing campaigns (emails, push notifications, in-app messages);
  • Help optimize and monitor paid advertising campaigns (Google, Meta, etc.);

  • Ability to manage multiple tasks with attention to detail;
  • Bilingual English/Latvian Russian is required to be able to coordinate with overseas partners and stakeholders;
  • Self-motivated, eager to learn, and a proactive team player.

Alongside your job, there will also be a focus on networking and development, which will expand your professional network and build transferable skills to propel you forward in your career. Learn about BAP Program HERE
 
Who may apply
 Current university students and recent graduates

We're looking for a passionate early careers talent to join our Performance Engineering Team and help pioneer the intersection of AI and Performance Engineering. This isn't your typical early careers program — you'll be at the forefront of applying cutting-edge AI technologies to solve real-world performance challenges in large-scale distributed systems

lists.content:
1. Build Your Foundation: Start with hands-on performance testing and tuning tasks, master the fundamentals before innovating

2. AI-Powered Performance Testing: Design and implement intelligent test strategies using LLMs, ML models, and AI agents to automate and enhance performance testing workflows

3. Intelligent Performance Analysis: Build AI-driven tools that can automatically detect anomalies, identify bottlenecks, and provide actionable insights from complex performance data

4. Innovation & Research: Explore and experiment with the latest AI technologies and evaluate their potential in performance engineering

5. Real Impact: Your work will directly influence how we ensure system reliability and performance for millions of users

1. Currently pursuing a degree in Computer Science, Software Engineering, or related field

2. Solid understanding of AI/ML fundamentals (LLMs, prompt engineering, fine-tuning concepts)

3. Programming experience in Java/Python/Golang

4. Curiosity and passion for exploring new AI technologies

5. Strong problem-solving skills and self-driven attitude

1. Familiarity with Java/Spring Boot ecosystem

2. Basic understanding of performance testing concepts (load testing, profiling, metrics)
Send us your resume along with:Any AI/ML projects(if any) you've worked on (GitHub links, demos, or descriptions)

We are looking for a driven and globally minded PR early career talent to support communications across Asia Pacific (APAC). This role offers hands-on exposure to regional PR strategy, cross-market storytelling, and reputation management within a fast-evolving industry.
You will work closely with the APAC PR team to support media relations, content development, and campaign execution across multiple markets, gaining insight into how a global brand operates with strong local nuance.

We are looking for a driven and globally minded PR early career talent to support communications across Asia Pacific (APAC). This role offers hands-on exposure to regional PR strategy, cross-market storytelling, and reputation management within a fast-evolving industry.

You will work closely with the APAC PR team to support media relations, content development, and campaign execution across multiple markets, gaining insight into how a global brand operates with strong local nuance.

lists.content:
Regional PR & Media Support

  • Assist in drafting and editing press materials (press releases, media pitches, Q&A, statements)
  • Support media monitoring across APAC markets and track key narratives
  • Compile daily/weekly coverage reports, including sentiment and key insights
  • Maintain and update regional media lists and journalist databases

    • Content & Messaging

  • Support development of regional communication materials and announcements
  • Assist in localizing global messaging for different APAC markets
  • Prepare briefing documents for interviews, partnerships, and key initiatives

    • Campaign & Coordination

  • Support execution of regional PR campaigns across multiple markets
  • Coordinate with local market teams to gather inputs and align messaging
  • Assist in tracking campaign performance and reporting key PR metrics

    • Research & Insights

  • Conduct research on industry trends (crypto, fintech, regulatory landscape across APAC)
  • Monitor competitor communications and positioning across key markets
  • Support preparation of internal PR updates and leadership reports

• Currently studying or recently graduated in Communications, PR, Marketing, Journalism, or related field
  • Strong written and verbal communication skills in English (additional APAC languages are a plus)
  • Highly organized, detail-oriented, and comfortable working remotely across time zones
  • Strong curiosity about media, technology, and financial innovation
  • Ability to synthesize information and turn insights into clear, concise communication.
  • Interest or basic knowledge in crypto, fintech, or financial markets
  • Experience with media monitoring or analytics tools
  • Familiarity with regional media landscapes (e.g., Southeast Asia, ANZ, Japan, Korea)

• Exposure to regional PR strategy across multiple APAC markets
  • Experience working with cross-functional and cross-cultural teams
  • Insight into reputation management, regulatory communications, and global brand positioning
  • Opportunity to contribute to high-impact, real-world campaigns

lists.content:
• Assist compliance professionals in supporting the Business Compliance team with regulatory and compliance tasks related to new product launches and ongoing product maintenance.
  • Help maintain compliance documentation and track regulatory requirements and audit findings.
  • Support coordination with stakeholders to follow up on compliance action plans and ensure timely resolution of issues.
  • Assist in preparing reports, presentations, and documentation for internal reviews and management updates.
  • Collaborate with cross-functional teams including Product, Tech, Operations, and Global Compliance to gain practical experience in compliance controls and regulatory processes.
  • Monitor regulatory developments and assist in assessing their potential impact on Binance products and services.

• Currently studying or recently graduated in Business, Finance, Law, or a related field.Demonstrated interest in compliance, regulatory affairs, and the cryptocurrency industry.
  • Strong teamwork and communication skills with a collaborative mindset.
  • Proactive, detail-oriented, and eager to take on challenges.Basic understanding or curiosity about AI tools and their applications is a plus.
  • Google Sheets proficiency: trackers, pivot tables, basic data cleanup; ability to maintain structured logs.

• Research skills: ability to read and summarize regulatory publications or policy updates clearly and concisely.
  • Slides skills: building clear, structured status updates and simple dashboards.
  • Basic understanding of crypto concepts: exchanges, custody vs non-custody, wallets, stablecoins, derivatives/margin (high-level is sufficient).
  • Exposure to risk/control concepts: audit basics, control evidence, issue tracking, or compliance checklists (coursework/internship acceptable).
  • Tools fluency: Jira/Confluence, or similar project/documentation tools.

lists.content:
- Data Analysis: Perform attribution analysis, user segmentation, and funnel diagnostics based on behavioral logs; deliver actionable strategy recommendations

- A/B Testing: Assist in experiment design, write SQL queries for data extraction, conduct significance testing, and produce A/B test reports

- Strategy Documentation: Contribute to PRDs for frequency capping, ranking, and content strategy

- Ranking Optimization: Collaborate with algorithm teams on parameter tuning and effect validation

- Label/Tag Development: Organize and refine content/label taxonomies to bridge signals to recommendation systems

Must-Haves:

  • Proficient in SQL – able to independently extract and analyze data from data warehouses

  • Solid understanding of basic statistics (hypothesis testing, confidence intervals, A/B testing)

  • Familiar with Python (pandas) or similar data analysis tools

  • Knowledge of basic recommender system concepts (CTR/CVR, explore-exploit)

  • Structured thinking and clear writing skills

    • Nice-to-Haves:

  • Prior experience in recommendation systems, growth, or user operations projects

  • Hands-on experience with A/B testing

job_detail_fetch.opening:
Binance is a leading global blockchain ecosystem behind the world’s largest cryptocurrency exchange by trading volume and registered users.  Current university students and recent graduates

About the team
 
We are looking for a talented Quality Assurance Engineer who has a passion for software and quality. This individual will work closely with engineers and the product team to review new features as well as develop and execute test scenarios which will help improve the quality of our software for Binance Wallet. You will also help the QA team become more efficient by contributing to writing automated tests for our mobile/web/browser extension apps.

job_detail_fetch.opening:
Binance is a leading global blockchain ecosystem behind the world’s largest cryptocurrency exchange by trading volume and registered users. We are trusted by 300+ million people in 100+ countries for our industry-leading security, user fund transparency, trading engine speed, deep liquidity, and an unmatched portfolio of digital-asset products. Binance offerings range from trading and finance to education, research, payments, institutional services, Web3 features, and more. We leverage the power of digital assets and blockchain to build an inclusive financial ecosystem to advance the freedom of money and improve financial access for people around the world.

About Binance Accelerator Program
Binance Accelerator Program is a concise fixed-term program designed for Early Career Talent to have an immersive experience in the rapidly expanding Web3 space. You will be given the opportunity to experience life at Binance and understand what goes on behind the scenes of the worlds’ leading blockchain ecosystem. Alongside your job, there will also be a focus on networking and development, which will expand your professional network and build transferable skills to propel you forward in your career. Learn about BAP Program HERE
 
Who may apply
 Current university students and recent graduates

lists.content:
• Work across all aspects of data from engineering to building sophisticated visualizations, machine learning models and experiments
  • Analyze and interpret large (PB-scale) volumes of transactional, operational and customer data using proprietary and open source data tools, platforms and analytical tool kits
  • Translate complex findings into simple visualizations and recommendations for execution by operational teams and executives
  • Processing confidential data and information according to guidelines
  • Managing and designing the reporting environment, including data sources, security, and metadata
  • Troubleshooting the reporting database environment and reports

• Bachelor’s degree from an accredited university or college in Computer Science or Math or Statistics
  • Proficient in data engineering, modeling and ETL - preferred experience with data sourcing and working with APIs
  • Experience with data querying using languages such as SQL, GraphQL, Python 
  • Able to commit minimum 3 days per week for at least 6 months
  • Understands project tokenomics and has good knowledge of the DeFi and Web 3.0 infrastructure landscape
  • Experience in using tools such as Dune analytics, Nansen etc
  • Understanding of addressing and metadata standards
  • High-level written and verbal communication skills

Binance is a leading global blockchain ecosystem behind the world’s largest cryptocurrency exchange by trading volume and registered users. We are trusted by 300+ million people in 100+ countries for our industry-leading security, user fund transparency, trading engine speed, deep liquidity, and an unmatched portfolio of digital-asset products. Binance offerings range from trading and finance to education, research, payments, institutional services, Web3 features, and more. We leverage the power of digital assets and blockchain to build an inclusive financial ecosystem to advance the freedom of money and improve financial access for people around the world.

About Binance Accelerator Program
Binance Accelerator Program is a concise fixed-term program designed for Early Career Talent to have an immersive experience in the rapidly expanding Web3 space. You will be given the opportunity to experience life at Binance and understand what goes on behind the scenes of the worlds’ leading blockchain ecosystem. Alongside your job, there will also be a focus on networking and development, which will expand your professional network and build transferable skills to propel you forward in your career. Learn about BAP Program HERE
 
Who may apply
 Current university students and recent graduates

About the Role

For all students looking to gain hands-on experience! You'll work directly with senior scientists on research problems at the frontier of LLM reasoning, post-training methodology, and agentic AI — applied to global crypto markets. Your work has a direct path to production systems serving hundreds of millions of users, and where findings warrant it, a clear path to external publication.

You run experiments, implement ideas from recent research, synthesize papers into hypotheses, and work with engineers to understand how research translates to real systems.

This is not a purely literature-review or passive research role. You are expected to think independently and generate insight.

lists.content:
• Contribute to the design and execution of experiments in reasoning model training, post-training alignment, test-time scaling, or systematic model evaluation — with a focus on applications in financial and crypto-native contexts

  • Review and synthesize recent academic literature at NeurIPS, ICML, ICLR, and ACL — tracking developments in reasoning, alignment, and agentic AI to inform and sharpen ongoing research directions

  • Implement model variants, training procedures including RLVR-based approaches, and evaluation protocols using PyTorch and the Hugging Face ecosystem

  • Track and log experiments systematically using Weights & Biases or equivalent — maintaining reproducibility standards throughout

  • Explore the intersection of LLM reasoning and crypto-native data: on-chain signals, market microstructure, multi-modal market intelligence — identifying research opportunities unique to Binance's position

  • Collaborate with applied engineering teams to understand how research findings translate into production constraints in a zero-downtime, 24/7 trading environment

• Currently pursuing a Master's or PhD in Machine Learning, Computer Science, Mathematics, or related field strongly preferred;

  • Expected graduation in 2026, 2027, or 2028

  • Strong Python programming skills and PyTorch proficiency; C++ or Rust exposure a plus. Equally important: demonstrated comfort with vibe coding — using AI-assisted development tools fluidly as part of your research and experimentation workflow

  • Solid understanding of transformer architectures, large language model pretraining, and the evolution toward reasoning models

lists.content:
• Assist in planning and executing marketing campaigns targeted at retail users, including promotions, product launches, and engagement strategies.
  • Assist in preparing campaign proposals, submitting budgets for approval, and compiling post-campaign reports to analyze performance and ROI.
  • Help coordinate and host both online and offline events such as product showcases, community meetups, webinars, and promotional activations.
  • Foster and manage user communities across platforms (e.g., Telegram, Facebook, etc.), engage with members, and monitor community sentiment.
  • Constantly work on new campaigns, channels, creatives and other ideas for experimentation, optimization and acquisition growth
  • Support the recruitment, onboarding, and engagement of volunteer brand ambassadors through our Angel Program. Ensure alignment with campaign goals and track their contributions.
  • Moderate local forums, social platforms and chat groups to interact with the community and increase positive engagement.
  • Coordinating inter-department cooperation between the Angels and the Binance team (including BD, Marketing, collecting leads, market research, data requests, etc.).
  • Execute all marketing efforts with hands on approach

• Experience launching community initiatives (e.g. building an online forum, launching an ambassador program, creating an event series and writing an email newsletter.
  • Experience in managing online/offline events.
  • Experience managing social media : Instagram, Facebook, Telegram).
  • Be able to work flexible and stretched hours to interact with the crypto community as frequently as possible.
  • Excellent organizational skills, Ability to Multitask with great time management skills needed.
  • Fluency in English is required to be able to coordinate with overseas partners and stakeholders. Additional languages would be an advantage.
  • Highly organized, detail-oriented, and able to manage multiple tasks simultaneously.
  • A team player with a positive attitude and a willingness to learn.
  • Understanding of cryptocurrency related terminologies and trends and have a liking for crypto cultures.

lists.content:
• Assist senior algorithm engineers in the design and daily maintenance of search and recommendation services and models in content scenarios, support the content team and empower the development and iteration of the content ecosystem.

  • Support the optimization of content matching accuracy and distribution efficiency by applying machine learning-based personalization methods, common design patterns and tools, and participate in basic model tuning and effect verification.

  • Learn and understand the core logic of recommendation systems in the content domain, assist in the iteration of AI products to improve user content experience and core business metrics.

  • Participate in the auxiliary development and implementation of core content recommendation modules, assist in implementing data-driven strategies to maximize content value and user engagement.

  • Collaborate with content, business and product teams to identify needs and opportunities in content scenarios, and assist the team in defining core success metrics.

• Currently pursuing a Bachelor's, Master's or PhD degree in Machine Learning, Computer Vision, Computer Science, Applied Mathematics, Data Science or related disciplines.

  • Solid programming foundation, proficient in Python, familiar with at least one mainstream machine learning framework, and grasp basic machine learning algorithm theories.

  • Basic understanding of search and recommendation system fundamentals; relevant coursework, competition experience or campus project experience is preferred.

  • Basic proficiency in SQL for large-scale data cleaning and feature engineering support, with strong hands-on ability.

  • Clear logical thinking, strong quick-learning ability, excellent cross-team communication skills, able to commit to at least 6 months full-time internship.

  • Preferred Qualifications: Publication record or submission at top-tier conferences/journals, relevant internship experience in search & recommendation, experience in content-related recommendation system projects.

lists.content:
• Responsible for Identity and Access Management of the back-end operating systems running on IAM platform
  • Participate in supporting the Privileged Access Management (PAM)
  • Maintain and enhance the IAM AIbot functionalities
  • Manage IAM tools and provide functional and business technology support including but not limited to chat faq handling, account management, permission authorization, access review and control, data protection, risk identification and analysis.
  • Support in STAP Monitoring to review the system alerts
  • Continuously evaluate the effectiveness of the system functionality, suggesting improvements based on organizational needs.
  • Correlate events across multiple systems to proactively surface and resolve deep, underlying issues.
  • Able to deal with ad-hoc assignments from the management with less supervision.

• Diploma/ Degree in IT/ Computing related field.
  • Direct experience with Identity and Access management. Strong understanding of Identity and Access Management principles.
  • Understanding of security protocols and best practices. Familiarity with relevant technologies and tools for access control.
  • Strong analytical, organizational, and problem-solving skills are required.
  • Understand the AI workflows, LLMs, Vector database, Elastic search. Retrieval-Augmented-Generation (RAG) technique is a must
  • Proficiency in Python and Django or other software engineering e.g AWS, PostgreSQL, Docker. Web development skills is a plus
  • Bilingual English/Mandarin is required to be able to coordinate with overseas partners and stakeholders.
  • Must be highly flexible and adaptable to change.

• Be a part of the world’s leading blockchain ecosystem that continues to grow and offers excellent career development opportunities
  • Work alongside diverse, world-class talent in an environment where learning and growth opportunities are endless
  • Tackle fast-paced, challenging and unique projects
  • Work in a truly global organization, with international teams and a flat organizational structure
  • Competitive salary and benefits
  • Flexible working hours, remote-first, and casual work attire
  • Learn more about how Binancians embody the organization’s core values, creating a unified culture that enables collaboration, excellence, and growth.
  • Apply today to be a part of the Web3 revolution!
  • Binance is committed to being an equal opportunity employer. We believe that having a diverse workforce is fundamental to our success.

lists.content:
• Support the project manager in coordinating with cross-functional teams on requirements gathering, evaluation, analysis, and reporting across internal projects.

  • Develop a strong understanding of business operations to respond quickly to business needs and efficiently manage information collection, organization, and other tasks during cross-functional collaboration.

  • Conduct regular assessments of project outcomes using appropriate tools, systems, and evaluation techniques.

  • Build and enhance reporting metrics to support data-driven decision-making and performance tracking.

  • Create and maintain comprehensive project documentation.

  • Develop, write, edit, and optimize content for both technical and non-technical audiences, ensuring clarity, structure, accuracy, and consistency across materials.

  • Support content creation initiatives by conducting research, synthesizing information, and producing high-quality written materials for internal and external use.

  • Track platform content engagement metrics (impressions, views, likes, comments, shares/reposts) and iterate based on feedback and data.

  • Other duties as assigned.

• Must be a full-time undergraduate or graduate student in good academic standing, preferably in Computer Science, Information Security, or a related field.

  • Introductory knowledge of security concepts, including Cybersecurity and Information Security.

  • Proven experience in content writing, editing, and information research, with the ability to produce clear and engaging materials.

  • Bilingual English/Mandarin is required to be able to coordinate with overseas partners and stakeholders.

  • Project or product management experience is highly desirable.

  • Excellent client-facing and communication skills, with strong logical thinking, organizational ability, attention to detail, and multitasking skills.

lists.content:
• Assist in managing social media accounts (Twitter, Xiaohongshu, Wechat channels etc.) 管理公司社交媒体账号（Twitter、小红书、视频号等）
  • Create, curate, and schedule engaging content. 创作、策划并定期发布优质内容
  • Monitor social media channels and respond to comments and messages.监控社交媒体动态，回复评论和消息
  • Perform market research and analyze social media trends.进行市场调研，分析社交媒体趋势
  • Support in planning and executing social media campaigns.支持社交媒体活动的策划和执行
  • Track and report on key metrics to measure success.追踪和报告关键数据，衡量推广效果

• Successful experience in growing social media accounts, especially in videos, Xiaohongshu (Little Red Book), or AI-related content is preferred. 有社交媒体相关账号成功增长经验，视频，小红书，AI方向为佳；
  • Proficient in using mainstream AI tools for content creation (e.g. visuals, copy, video) ｜熟练使用主流AI工具进行内容创作（包括图片、文案、视频等）
  • Experience in social media content creation, with the ability to independently produce creative content. 社媒内容创作经验，能够独立生产创意内容
  • Very strong execution ability and quick response skills. 有极强的执行能力和反应速度
  • Experience or awareness in communication and user service.具备沟通、服务用户的经验或意识
  • Basic industry knowledge and a good understanding of industry trends and hotspots; deeper involvement in transactions and on-chain activities is a plus. 有行业基础，对行业知识和热点有充分的了解，交易、链上深度玩家加分

lists.content:
• Deploy and manage security services across our infrastructure
  • Deploy and manage crawler applications internally
  • Participate in DevOps operations, such as Kubernetes and AWS operations
  • Collaborate with cross-functional teams to integrate security into the development lifecycle
  • Automate processes and implement CI/CD solutions

• Experienced in **Python**, especially for web scraping (e.g., `requests`, `BeautifulSoup`, `Selenium`, `Scrapy`)
  • Understanding of **Java** and **Spring Boot**, with the ability to read and write backend service code
  • Familiarity with **SQL syntax**; experience with **MySQL** or **PostgreSQL** is a plus
  • Familiarity with software development fundamentals: version control (Git), REST APIs, modular code design
  • Strong problem-solving skills and a logical mindset
  • Willingness to learn, communicate, and take ownership of tasks

• Personal or academic projects related to web crawling or backend services (GitHub or portfolio links are welcome)
  • Experience with data processing libraries such as `pandas`, `json`, and regular expressions
  • Familiarity with **Docker**, **AWS**, or **cloud-native** tools is a big plus
  • If you don’t have experience with **AWS**, **Kubernetes**, or **cloud-native** development yet — don’t worry! You’ll have the opportunity to learn and work with these technologies here.

lists.content: We are building next-generation Web3 infrastructure and are looking for a motivated engineering early career talent to grow alongside us. You will work directly with our core team on real-world challenges — from optimizing real-time big data pipelines to integrating AI-assisted tooling into our development workflow. This is a hands-on role with meaningful ownership from day one.

• Learn and work with real-time big data components such as Kafka, Flink, or Spark Streaming; identify bottlenecks and contribute to performance optimizations.

  • Participate in Web3 project development — including on-chain data ingestion, smart contract interaction, and blockchain analytics features.

  • Apply AI tools and LLM-assisted workflows (e.g., code generation, automated testing, documentation) to accelerate development velocity.

  • Collaborate in English with cross-functional teammates on engineering discussions, code reviews, and technical documentation.

  • Proactively explore unfamiliar technologies, ask good questions, and share learnings with the team.

• Currently pursuing or recently completed a degree in Computer Science, Software Engineering, or a related technical field.

  • Strong genuine interest in software development — you build things in your spare time, follow technical communities, or experiment with side projects.

  • Fluent spoken and written English — comfortable participating in technical meetings, writing documentation, and communicating blockers clearly.

  • Self-driven and proactive — you do not wait to be told what to learn; you identify gaps, seek resources, and take initiative without prompting.

  • Available to commit a minimum of 4 days per week throughout the internship period.

• Familiarity with blockchain concepts — transactions, wallets, smart contracts, or DeFi protocols.

  • Exposure to distributed systems, stream processing, or database design.

  • Prior experience using AI coding assistants (Copilot, Cursor, Claude Code, etc.) in a real project context.

Hands-on experience with production Web3 systems, mentorship from a senior engineering team, direct exposure to real-time data architecture, and a front-row seat to how AI is reshaping how software gets built.

Build observability, automation, and AIOps foundations. Focus on deliverable output, reusable assets, and support-driven product improvement.

Use logs/metrics/traces to understand issues; complete a dashboard + alert + runbook for one service.
Turn support pain points into product improvements (copy, self-service, workflow).
Understand MLOps/AIOps basics: deployment, rollback, drift monitoring.
Build or extend an agent skill for automation or support.

Role Positioning

Build observability, automation, and AIOps foundations. Focus on deliverable output, reusable assets, and support-driven product improvement.

Learning Outcomes

  • Use logs/metrics/traces to understand issues; complete a dashboard + alert + runbook for one service.
  • Turn support pain points into product improvements (copy, self-service, workflow).
  • Understand MLOps/AIOps basics: deployment, rollback, drift monitoring.
  • Build or extend an agent skill for automation or support.

lists.content:
• Observability & Automation – Set up dashboards/alerts; script repetitive ticket steps.
  • RCA & Support Insights – Participate in RCAs; log user pain points weekly; propose product fixes.
  • Agent & Skill Prototyping – Build a lightweight agent (e.g., telegram bot) with at least one reusable skill (log fetch, health check, etc.).
  • ITSM / Tools (optional) – Optimize a small workflow in incident management tooling.

Must-have

  • CS/Data/AI or related major; Linux + scripting (Shell/Python); basic SQL.
  • Good documentation – write actionable runbooks.
  • Empathy & product thinking – improve user experience from support data.
  • Basic understanding of agents and skills.

    • Nice-to-have

  • K8s, CI/CD, Terraform.
  • MLOps project experience.
  • Built a simple LLM agent or defined skills (LangChain, function calling).
  • TSM tool experience.

lists.content:
1. Participate in UI/UX design for internal innovation projects, including user research, interaction design, visual design, logo design, and icon creation;

2. Work with senior designers to understand product goals and create user-friendly design solutions;

3. Collaborate closely with product managers and engineers to ensure smooth implementation of design concepts;

4. Participate in user research and continuously improve product experience through feedback and iteration;

5. Keep up with design trends and explore new AI-driven design workflows;

6. Use AI design tools such as Figma Make, CodeX, and Google Stitch to improve design efficiency.

1. Bachelor’s degree or above in Design, HCI, Digital Media, or related fields is preferred;

2. Basic understanding of UI/UX design principles and workflows;

3. Passion for automotive, technology, and AI-related products;

4. Proficient in Figma and other common design tools;

5. Good communication skills, teamwork spirit, and willingness to learn;

6. Familiarity with AI-assisted design tools is a plus.

lists.content:
• Use AI capabilities to optimize workflows, optimize efficiency, generate code and test cases, tune performance, listen to user feedback, summarize user problems, build better products, etc.
  • Collaborate with Product and Design teams to turn business requirements into intuitive, production-grade web and mobile apps.
  • Design, build, and maintain applications across Web (React/TypeScript) and Android (Kotlin/Java), delivering features to millions of global users.
  • Work closely with backend engineers to design scalable APIs and ensure seamless integration with high-performance systems.
  • Contribute to frameworks and reusable components (React, Jetpack, MVVM, Material Design), setting standards for future development.
  • Write clean, maintainable, and testable code, backed by strong code reviews, automated tests, and performance profiling.
  • Debug and solve complex technical issues, optimize performance across devices and platforms, and deliver smooth, high-quality user experiences.
  • Document design decisions, architecture choices, and development processes to support collaboration and scalability.

• Currently pursuing or recently graduated with a degree in Computer Science, Software Engineering, or IT.
  • Strong foundation in JavaScript/TypeScript with hands-on experience in React; exposure to modern tooling like Tailwind, Rspack is a plus.
  • Familiar with Android development (Kotlin/Java), Android Studio, and core components (Activities, Fragments); knowledge of Jetpack/MVVM preferred.
  • Solid understanding of networking fundamentals; experience integrating with REST APIs/Retrofit is highly valued.
  • Experience with Git/GitHub and collaborative workflows.
  • Practical exposure to AI-assisted development workflows (coding assistants, automated debugging, intelligent test case creation, performance analysis).
  • Passion for cutting-edge technology, eager to explore how AI can be applied to large-scale engineering challenges.
  • Strong problem-solving mindset, with the ability to collaborate in a fast-paced, international engineering environment.
    •  
    What You’ll Gain
  • Dual-track experience across Web (React) and Mobile (Android).
  • Hands-on practice with AI-powered engineering workflows.
  • The chance to ship high-impact features to millions of users worldwide.
  • Close mentorship from senior engineers in a global-scale, high-growth environment.

job_detail_fetch.text: Binance Accelerator Program - Web & Mobile Engineering
job_detail_fetch.opening:
Binance is a leading global blockchain ecosystem behind the world’s largest cryptocurrency exchange by trading volume and registered users. We are trusted by 300+ million people in 100+ countries for our industry-leading security, user fund transparency, trading engine speed, deep liquidity, and an unmatched portfolio of digital-asset products. Binance offerings range from trading and finance to education, research, payments, institutional services, Web3 features, and more. We leverage the power of digital assets and blockchain to build an inclusive financial ecosystem to advance the freedom of money and improve financial access for people around the world.

About Binance Accelerator Program
Binance Accelerator Program is a concise fixed-term program designed for Early Career Talent to have an immersive experience in the rapidly expanding Web3 space. You will be given the opportunity to experience life at Binance and understand what goes on behind the scenes of the worlds’ leading blockchain ecosystem. Alongside your job, there will also be a focus on networking and development, which will expand your professional network and build transferable skills to propel you forward in your career. Learn about BAP Program HERE
 
Who may apply
 Current university students and recent graduates

We are looking for a Web3 × AI Intern to explore, validate, and prototype ideas at the intersection of large language models and decentralized systems.

This role is designed for candidates with a strong research mindset and solid engineering skills, who are interested in understanding where AI truly adds value in Web3 — beyond demos, hype, or surface-level integrations.

You will work closely with engineering and product teams to research emerging directions, build experimental prototypes, and help define next-generation Web3 × AI product paradigms.

We are looking for a Web3 × AI Intern to explore, validate, and prototype ideas at the intersection of large language models and decentralized systems.

This role is designed for candidates with a strong research mindset and solid engineering skills, who are interested in understanding where AI truly adds value in Web3 — beyond demos, hype, or surface-level integrations.

You will work closely with engineering and product teams to research emerging directions, build experimental prototypes, and help define next-generation Web3 × AI product paradigms.

lists.content:
• Research emerging Web3 × AI directions, Produce structured research notes, technical summaries, or internal presentations including:
  • AI-powered wallets, trading, and DeFi workflows
  • AI + on-chain data analytics and intelligence
  • Intent-based and AI-driven user interaction

  • Participate in brainstorming sessions, contribute creative ideas, and explore novel approaches to AI-driven Web3 products.
  • Design, implement, and test experimental prototypes (PoCs) that combine AI with Web3 protocols and products.
  • Collaborate with engineering, product, and design teams to refine and scale PoCs into production-ready solutions.

• Currently pursuing or recently graduated with a degree in Computer Science, AI, Machine Learning, or related field.
  • Experience with LLMs, agent frameworks, AI evaluation, benchmarking, or research-style experimentation.
  • Familiarity with Web3 technologies, blockchain,smart contracts or  DeFi/NFT ecosystems.
  • Ability to work with ambiguous problems and explore open-ended directions.
  • Strong analytical thinking and structured communication skills.

• Direct exposure to cutting-edge Web3 × AI research and product exploration.
  • Close collaboration with experienced engineers and product leaders.
  • High autonomy and a culture that values rigor, experimentation, and critical thinking.
  • Early involvement in future core product initiatives.

lists.text: This Role Is a Great Fit for You
lists.content:
• Care deeply about where and why LLMs work in complex systems
  • Enjoy breaking down systems, building prototypes, and running experiments
  • Prefer validating ideas with data and code over writing conceptual slides
  • Want to help define the future interaction model of Web3 products

job_detail_fetch.descriptionPlain:
Binance is a leading global blockchain ecosystem behind the world’s largest cryptocurrency exchange by trading volume and registered users. We are trusted by 300+ million people in 100+ countries for our industry-leading security, user fund transparency, trading engine speed, deep liquidity, and an unmatched portfolio of digital-asset products. Binance offerings range from trading and finance to education, research, payments, institutional services, Web3 features, and more. We leverage the power of digital assets and blockchain to build an inclusive financial ecosystem to advance the freedom of money and improve financial access for people around the world.

About Binance Square
 
Binance Square aims to be the one-stop social platform for the latest trends in Web3 and crypto. With a vast selection of content from renowned crypto experts, avid enthusiasts, and trusted media sources, the platform serves as a bridge between content creators and their followers, customizing users’ feeds based on their respective engagement history. Join us to be part of a team that is shaping the future of social interaction in the crypto space.

lists.content:
• Assist in the full lifecycle of Square campaign operations, including drafting campaign documentation, managing backend configurations, coordinating on-site promotions (banners, push notifications, and pop-ups), overseeing campaign launches, tracking ongoing progress and post-campaign management.

  • Collect & extract frequently-appeared cases from user inquiries, work with Product and Tech teams to debug issues, verify fixes, and reduce the number of potential user cases.

  • Handle escalated user tickets from the Mod & Customer Service team, maintain FAQs and other user documents to ensure consistent communication and improve user experience. 

  • Monitor real-time campaign data and deliver post-campaign reports with actionable insights for future optimization.

  • Plan, coordinate, and launch integrated growth initiatives and campaigns in partnership with cross-functional teams to accelerate scalable user and content growth.

• Recent graduate, with a strong interest in crypto, blockchain, and digital communities.

  • Past experience in Web3, content or creator economy is a plus advantage.

  • Strong bilingual communication skills in English and Mandarin, with the ability to effectively engage vendors and internal stakeholders across regions.

  • Execution excellence with attention to details and a high level of patience and accountability.

  • Good communication and collaboration skills with ability to think critically and solve problems independently.

  • Resourceful, proactive, and eager to learn in a fast-paced, entrepreneurial environment.

About Binance VIP & Institutional Team 
Built by the world's largest digital asset exchange by trading volume, Binance VIP and Institutional offers access to digital asset solutions for VIP clients and institutions. We work closely with a wide range of market participants, including individual traders, high-frequency trading (HFT) and proprietary trading firms, hedge funds, asset managers and family offices, market makers and brokers, investment banks, and more. Join us to be part of a team that provides top-tier services to the most influential players in the crypto industry.
 
Our team serves the most sophisticated trading users and participants in the trading and investment industry and we offer you an opportunity to build your portfolio of clients alongside Binance and amongst top colleagues. Work remotely in a global team that covers all parts of the world, where you will get to travel and meet and attract your clients at bespoke events. If you thrive in a fast paced and high pressure environment, we encourage you to apply in!

lists.content:
• Acquiring and developing trust relationships with a portfolio of major clients (global institutional/VIP clients)
  • Expanding the relationships with existing customers by sustained communication, understanding of their needs
  • Building key customer service processes and systems, formulating management rules, and tracking the status of key customers
  • Analysis of user behavior, finding hidden needs, writing key customer analysis reports, and communicating with various departments to provide optimal key customer service solutions and product feedback

• Sales experience (customer acquisition/ origination), having had a clear sales KPI 
  • Familiar with the use of a CRM tool 
  • Worked autonomously within a sales team. Experience in working with regional sales teams and in attending and hosting events to acquire new customers. 
  • Client portfolio including institutional clients, HNW individuals, prop trading firms, private bank customers with brokers, futures institutions or commercial banks and etc
  • Strong communication, ability to be flexible in a variety of situations, excellent relationship maintenance and sales skills, able to work under pressure
  • Passionate about crypto. Industry experience would be of an advantage
  • Fluency in English is required to be able to coordinate with overseas partners and stakeholders. Additional languages would be an advantage.

lists.content:
• Responsibilities
  • Design and develop LLM-based agents for Web3 scenarios
  • Build agents for token research and summarization
  • Assist in developing and evaluating trading agents using market and on-chain data
  • Experiment with prompt engineering, mcp, memory, and agent coordination strategies 
    •

• Strong background in data science, machine learning, or computer science
  • Proficiency in Python and data processing pipelines
  • Experience with agent orchestration, such as planning, routing, tool use, or multi-agent collaboration.
  • Experience using LangChain, LangGraph, LlamaIndex, or similar orchestration frameworks.
  • Experience using RAG, vector databases, and evaluation of agent systems
  •  
  • Nice to Have
  • Familiarity with Web3 / Crypto
  • Experience with trading systems, backtesting, or market data
    •

lists.content:
• Conduct security audits on smart contracts, wallets and blockchains, and write high-quality audit reports
  • Develop automated scanning and monitoring tools for smart contracts, wallets and blockchains
  • Utilize scanning tools to detect vulnerabilities in online contracts and promptly issue risk warnings
  • Conduct post-mortem analysis on various hacking incidents, examining the causes, processes, prevention, correction and basic fund tracing
  • Proactively identify on-chain risks, monitor and model emerging on-chain attack vector trends, and possess a solid understanding of on-chain security risks such as fraud and phishing
  • Demonstrate a strong understanding of EVM and non-EVM blockchains and layer 2 solutions, and be familiar with DeFi design patterns
  • Perform a review analysis on newly disclosed vulnerabilities for smart contracts and summarize the root cause behind the exploits for early detection in the future
  • Demonstrate good understanding of cryptography and Security solutions which is utilized under blockchain products
  • Conduct Pen Testing and reviews for blockchain products and provide high quality feedback

• Currently enrolled or holding a bachelor's degree (or higher) in Computer Science or a related field
  • Proficient in programming languages, such as Solidity, Rust, Go among others which are currently engaged with the Blockchain field
  • Basic understanding of common Smart Contract security vulnerabilities, Current incidents, Wallet Security and Simulation testing
  • Basic understanding of blockchain and smart contract principles, experienced with reading Blockchain explorers and creating scripts to track and scan data. Well versed with the different types of hacks on wallets and blockchain, including smart contracts, and its common attack vectors
  • Well versed with the different types of libraries and security associated with it
  • Familiar with smart contract development testing cycle, pen testing cycle, transaction analysis, and other tools
  • Experienced in using VSCode, Git, or other version control applications
  • Proficient in Python, Go, Rust or another object-oriented programming language
  • Fundamental knowledge of code analysis and program debugging

lists.content:
• Analyze marketing campaign performance, customer behavior, and market trends to identify opportunities and risks.分析市场活动表现、客户行为及市场趋势，识别机会与风险.
  • Develop and maintain marketing dashboards and reports to track KPIs and ROI.开发并维护营销仪表盘和报告，跟踪关键绩效指标（KPI）和投资回报率（ROI).
  • Collaborate with marketing and sales teams to define data requirements and support campaign planning.与市场和销售团队合作，明确数据需求，支持活动策划.
  • Conduct competitor analysis and market research to inform marketing strategies.进行竞争对手分析和市场调研，为营销策略提供依据.
  • Use data visualization tools to present insights clearly to stakeholders.使用数据可视化工具，向相关方清晰展示分析结果.
  • Identify trends and recommend improvements to optimize marketing spend and effectiveness.识别趋势，提出优化营销预算和效果的建议.
  • Operations, strategies, and specific KOL traffic analysis, performance analysis (registration conversion), etc.经营,策略和具体KOL的流量分析，效果分析（注册转化）等.

• Bachelor’s degree in Marketing, Business, Statistics, or related field.市场营销、商业、统计学或相关专业本科及以上学历.
  • Proven experience in marketing analysis, business intelligence, or related roles.具备市场分析、商业智能或相关岗位的工作经验.
  • Proficiency in data analysis tools such as Excel, SQL, Tableau, Power BI, or similar.熟练使用Excel、SQL、Tableau、Power BI等数据分析工具.
  • Strong analytical skills with the ability to interpret complex data sets.较强的分析能力，能够解读复杂数据.
  • Bilingual English/Mandarin is required to be able to coordinate with overseas partners and stakeholders. Additional languages would be a strong advantage. 优秀的中英文双语沟通能力, 能够内部更好的和合作方协调。
  • Knowledge of digital marketing channels and metrics is a plus.了解数字营销渠道及指标者优先.
  • Experience with statistical software or programming languages (Python, R) is a bonus. 具备统计软件或编程语言（Python、R）经验者优先.

job_detail_fetch.description:
Binance is a leading global blockchain ecosystem behind the world’s largest cryptocurrency exchange by trading volume and registered users. We are trusted by 300+ million people in 100+ countries for our industry-leading security, user fund transparency, trading engine speed, deep liquidity, and an unmatched portfolio of digital-asset products.
