lists.content:
• DMLRO is responsible for supporting the Compliance and MR Officer and ensuring appropriate compliance with virtual assets regulations in the UAE (e.g., VARA regulatory framework), with scope to expand responsibility remit regionally.

  • Support the Compliance & MLR Officer in implementing and maintaining the AML/CFT compliance framework aligned with UAE AML Law and applicable guidance set out by UAE regulators.

  • Assist with ongoing compliance with FATF standards and virtual asset-specific regulatory expectations.

  • Coordinate with free zone and federal regulators for inspections, audits, and information requests.

  • Assist in local oversight of global processes and procedures, including, but not limited to, transaction monitoring (fiat and onchain) and market surveillance.

  • Oversee day-to-day transaction monitoring alerts and investigate unusual or potentially suspicious activity.

  • Draft Suspicious Transaction Reports (STRs) and Suspicious Activity Reports (SARs) for review and submission by the MLRO to the UAE Financial Intelligence Unit (GoAML).

  • Support the development and tuning of automated monitoring systems

  • Assist in drafting and updating AML/CTF policies, procedures, and risk assessments.

  • Deliver AML/CFT awareness training to staff and provide ongoing guidance on regulatory developments.

• High attention to detail and investigative mindset.

  • Strong communication skills, with the ability to distill complex compliance matters for internal and external stakeholders.

  • Ethical, discreet, and able to handle sensitive information with integrity.

  • Proficient in compliance tools, case management systems, and blockchain forensics platforms (e.g., Chainalysis, Elliptic) is a plus.

  • A bachelor's degree in Finance, Law, Business Administration, or a related discipline.

  • Minimum 8 years of experience in compliance, AML/CFT, or regulatory affairs, with a focus on the financial services or related industries within the MEASA region.

  • Experience with regional regulators: VARA, CBUAE, SCA, FSRA, etc.

  • Strong analytical and problem-solving skills, with a proactive approach to identifying, addressing, and preventing compliance risks.

  • Ability to work under pressure and meet tight deadlines, with a willingness to work long hours when necessary.

lists.content:
• Support the MLRO in ensuring compliance with Indian AML laws and regulatory requirements relevant to Binance’s operations and business activities in India.
  • Perform AML risk assessments focused on Binance’s exposure and operations related to the Indian market.
  • Continuously monitor the Indian legal and regulatory landscape on AML, initiate necessary changes, and support the ongoing development of AML controls to maintain adherence to applicable laws and regulations.
  • Design and implement 2nd Line of Defense AML controls tailored to the regulatory environment and market practices in India.
  • Conduct periodic reviews of AML policies and adapt them to regulatory changes or to enhance AML effectiveness for India-related activities.
  • Deliver AML training programs focused on Indian regulatory requirements and risks to relevant teams.
  • Oversee transaction monitoring, customer onboarding, and escalation processes in line with Indian AML expectations.
  • Manage the closure of findings from internal and external supervisory bodies, including regulators with jurisdiction over India-related operations.
  • Liaise and cooperate with the Financial Intelligence Unit – India (FIU-IND), law enforcement, and other relevant authorities; monitor the Suspicious Activity Report (SAR) process as it pertains to India.
  • Prepare and submit relevant AML reports as required by Indian regulators or internal governance related to India.
  • Collaborate with other functions within Binance to ensure cohesive AML compliance for India-related business activities.
  • Prepare for and coordinate internal and external audits of AML controls impacting India.
  • Take responsibility for the continuous development and enhancement of AML policies, procedures, and processes relevant to India.

• At least 10 years of experience in a similar role with a clear focus on the financial services industry.
  • Strong knowledge of banking and AML laws, regulations, and directives applicable in India.
  • Experience working with FIU-IND and domestic law enforcement authorities.
  • FinTech experience is a plus.
  • Hands-on and efficient; a self-starter who takes accountability.
  • Team player with a strong personality.
  • Strong communication skills, ability to be flexible in a variety of situations, excellent relationship management and negotiation skills, and able to work under pressure.
  • Passionate about crypto; industry experience is a plus.

About the Role
We are looking for a skilled and motivated DevOps Engineer with experience in deploying and managing blockchain infrastructure, as well as in-depth knowledge of AWS, Kubernetes (EKS), and CI/CD pipelines. The successful candidate will be instrumental in automating and maintaining our infrastructure to enable secure and scalable blockchain-based solutions.

About the Role

We are looking for a skilled and motivated DevOps Engineer with experience in deploying and managing blockchain infrastructure, as well as in-depth knowledge of AWS, Kubernetes (EKS), and CI/CD pipelines. The successful candidate will be instrumental in automating and maintaining our infrastructure to enable secure and scalable blockchain-based solutions.

lists.content:
• Deploy, configure, and manage blockchain networks (e.g., Bitcoin, Ethereum, Solana)
  • Design and implement cloud infrastructure on AWS in line with best practices.
  • Administer and scale Kubernetes clusters (EKS) for deploying blockchain nodes and related services.
  • Develop and maintain CI/CD pipelines using tools such as GitHub Actions, ArgoCD, and AWS CodeBuild.
  • Automate infrastructure provisioning and management using tools like Terraform and Helm.

• A minimum of 1 year experience in DevOps, Cloud Engineering, or a related field.

  • Solid hands-on experience with AWS services such as EC2, VPC, IAM, S3, and infrastructure-as-code tools like CloudFormation or Terraform.

  • Practical experience with Kubernetes, particularly with managed services such as EKS.

  • Proficiency in scripting languages such as Bash, Python, or Go.

  • Familiarity with monitoring and logging tools, along with system performance tuning.

  • Bilingual English/Mandarin is required to be able to coordinate with overseas partners and stakeholders.

• Understanding of blockchain technologies, including consensus mechanisms, smart contracts, or Layer 2 scaling solutions.

  • Practical experience leveraging AI models and tools to address real-world workplace challenges, enhancing both efficiency and deployment quality.

  • Strong enthusiasm for discovering and integrating emerging technologies into daily workflows to foster innovation and drive continuous operational improvement.

We are seeking a Senior DevOps Engineer or DevOps Architect to elevate our infrastructure and configuration management capabilities.

In this role, you will leverage your experience in designing, implementing, and maintaining large-scale, mission-critical systems. You’ll be responsible for architecting and enhancing infrastructure solutions, driving improvements across our deployment processes, and supporting system migrations in close collaboration with our Development and QA teams. Key responsibilities include advancing our infrastructure architecture, automating operational workflows, enhancing system observability, and proactively addressing potential production issues through scalable and resilient solutions.

lists.content:

  • Automate continuous delivery processes and implement on-demand capacity management solutions

  • Troubleshoot, diagnose and resolve software issues

  • Recommend architectural enhancements and suggest process improvements

lists.content:
• As the frontlines of the P2P market, you and the team will arbitrate customer disputes professionally
  • Investigate trading activity and take appropriate actions to keep the marketplace safe and prevent fraudulent activity
  • Create a culture and processes which achieve the business goals and objectives with regards to customer service
  • Use Customer Insight and Root Cause Analytics to identify product improvements and present these to stakeholder and peers
  • Act as the Voice of the Customer across the organization
  • Identify and provide feedback through 1:1s, effective use of personal development plans and provision of coaching & development opportunities
  • Ensure customer and complainant surveys are carried out continuously in order to produce timely, up-to-date information about customer experience across all areas of the business
  • Ensure that learning from complaints is shared within the organization as well as with contractors, partners and if appropriate, publicized

• 1+ years experience of proven customer facing experience or experience as a customer service representative
  • Strong ability in IT for professional use and can handle somewhat technical queries from customers
  • Exceptional written communication skills and a good listener
  • Ability to multitask, prioritise, and control time effectively
  • Knowledge of blockchain, crypto, and P2P payments is a big plus
  • Fluency in English is required to be able to coordinate with overseas partners and stakeholders. Additional languages would be an advantage.
  • Willing to work weekends and irregular hours which will include night shifts
  • A Binance P2P user is highly preferred

lists.content:
• Assist the team with daily marketing, BD, growth & product operations for Liquid Staking, On-Chain Yields & Simple Earn.
  • Plan and manage campaign schedules, ensuring end-to-end execution.
  • Explore marketing collaboration opportunities with external partners, KOLs, VIP, Local markets and other channels.
  • Collaborate with large cross functional teams in order to maintain smooth product operation and growth plan execution.
  • Monitor and evaluate the performance of marketing campaigns and product growth initiatives through data analysis.
  • Managing end-to-end regional amplification, VIP Earn initiatives & protocol partnerships and growth pipelines.
  • Be the DRP (Direct Responsible Person) or POC (Point of Contact) with ecosystem protocols and partners on growth initiatives and major partnership deals related to the Earn portfolio.
  • Develop marketing & growth strategies with the team regularly to increase TVL for Liquid Staking, On-Chain Yields & Simple Earn.
  • Help to monitor and resolve Liquid Staking, On-Chain Yields & Simple Earn issues by coordinating with internal and external stakeholders.
  • Support growth initiatives by analyzing local market dynamics, monitoring competitors, and identifying opportunities to strengthen regional presence and maintain competitiveness.
  • Ensure flawless execution and accountability on campaigns, growth initiatives, partnerships, and handovers - prioritizing execution discipline while valuing creativity.

• Being a DeFi/Crypto/Web3 native with strong business acumen and a proactive habit of researching industry insights is very important for this role.
  • 3-5 years of relevant experience in product growth, marketing, business development, or operations, within crypto, DeFi, or related sectors.
  • Proven track record of independently executing campaigns and growth initiatives at a global & local level.
  • Experience collaborating cross-functionally in large teams and managing partner relations is necessary.
  • Have read and understood Binance’s Core Values.
  • Exceptional attention to detail and accountability - mistakes and missed handovers have real business impact in this role.
  • Openness to feedback and a strong willingness to continuously improve.
  • Flawless execution and follow-through are fundamental—creative ideas are welcome but must be backed by consistent execution.
  • Takes full ownership of tasks and outcomes, not just inputs. Self-learning personality and ability to work independently and resolve problems end to end as the DRP/POC.
  • Ability to handle a fast-paced environment with changing requirements based on market and business needs – can-do mentality.
  • Highly organized and comfortable working across time zones and managing multiple projects.
  • Excellent logical thinking, communication and presentation skills.
  • Detail-oriented, self-driven, and quick-learner.
  • Strong passion and knowledge of crypto, DeFi and Web3 Products, platforms and ecosystems - familiar with the DeFi and Binance ecosystem is required.

lists.content:
• Product Planning & Strategy: Own the end-to-end product roadmap for our structured product suite. Conduct in-depth research on crypto market trends and competitor movements to identify new product opportunities and set a winning go-to-market strategy.

  • Product Design & Execution: Design product rules, yield structures, and parameter configurations (e.g., strike price, APR, tenor). You'll translate user needs into detailed Product Requirements Documents (PRDs) and work with our quant and risk teams to ensure our crypto products are priced competitively and operate within acceptable risk parameters.

  • Operational Support & Growth: Act as the product expert for our operations and marketing teams. You'll develop comprehensive launch plans, including user education materials and promotional campaigns, to ensure successful product adoption. You will leverage on-chain and off-chain data to identify growth opportunities and optimize product performance.

  • Cross-functional Collaboration: Serve as the key interface, ensuring seamless communication and execution between Operations, Marketing, Business Development, Quant, Risk, and Customer Service to deliver a world-class user experience.

• Experience: 8-10 years in product management for structured products, dual investment, on-chain Defi. Experience with cryptocurrencies, traditional bank/securities wealth management, or derivatives is highly preferred. We give priority to candidates who have designed or led successful products from 0 to 1 in the crypto or fintech space.

  • Leadership Management: At least 2-4 years of team management.

  • Skills: A strong passion for and understanding of financial markets. You must be comfortable with the core concepts of interest rates and volatility, and be able to apply them to crypto assets. You're highly analytical and skilled in using tools like SQL and Excel to drive data-driven decisions. You should have outstanding communication and project management skills.

  • Attributes: You have a results-oriented mindset and a strong sense of ownership for business growth and product revenue. You are a fast learner, able to adapt quickly to the rapid pace of the cryptocurrency industry. You possess a strong ability to translate user needs into innovative product solutions.

  • Bonus Points:
  • An active, deep user of cryptocurrencies with a good understanding of DeFi and blockchain protocols.
  • Background in Finance, Economics, Mathematics, Computer Science, or related fields.
  • Possession of financial certifications such as CFA or FRM.

    • Data Analysis and Interpretation:

lists.content:
• Financial Reporting: Prepare and maintain accurate financial statements in compliance with Japanese accounting standards and internal policies.
  • Account Reconciliation: Regularly reconcile exchange accounts, bank accounts, crypto wallets, and general ledger to ensure accurate financial reporting.
  • Crypto Transactions and Accounting: Manage the accounting and reporting of cryptocurrency transactions, including purchases, sales, trades, and wallets, ensuring proper treatment of crypto assets in line with regulatory guidelines.
  • Internal Controls and Audit: Develop and maintain internal controls to safeguard assets and ensure the accuracy of financial records. Assist with internal and external audits.
  • Financial Analysis: Provide analysis on financial performance and provide insights into cost-saving opportunities and revenue optimization for the exchange operations.
  • Regulatory Compliance: Stay up-to-date with local and global regulatory requirements for cryptocurrencies and ensure the exchange’s compliance with Japanese financial regulations, such as those set by the Financial Services Agency (FSA).
  • Tax Compliance: Handle all tax-related matters including preparation and filing of tax returns (corporate tax, consumption tax, and other relevant taxes) according to Japanese tax laws.
  • Collaboration: Work closely with the global finance team and other departments (legal, operations, compliance) to ensure smooth operations and reporting.

• Bachelor's degree in Accountancy, Finance, or a related field; CPA certification preferred.
  • 4–6 years of relevant experience in Finance&Accounting.
  • Strong communication skills in English and Japanese verbally and in writing
  • Strong technical accounting knowledge and hands-on experience in a fast-paced environment.
  • Detail-oriented with excellent analytical and problem-solving skills.
  • Ability to work in a fast-paced, ever-changing environment with excellent attention to detail.
  • Effective communication and interpersonal skills to engage with stakeholders at all levels.

lists.content:
• Management Reporting: Conduct month-end regional financial performance review, ensure accuracy of financial records, highlight /lowlight, escalate issues and opportunities to the leader team, prepare monthly/quarterly management reports for regional leadership

  • Add-hoc scenario analysis to support on decision making when entering new market through data anlysis

  • Responsible for pre-ROI and post ROI analysis for marketing activities, making proposal and improvement plan to marketing leaders when needed

  • Strategic business partnering: Build relationships and collaborate across regional leaders, country GMs, BU teams, BU FBPs to optimise business growth 

  • Process Improvement: Streamline data handling, drive continuous process improvement, standardization, simplification and reporting enhancements

• 5-8 years of relevant financial business partnering or analysis related experience is necessary, including experience in a professional services environment (e.g. management consulting, investment banking, Big 4 accounting) and/or in an FP&A or strategic finance role at a large technology / e-commerce / crypto company

  • Analytical problem solver with extensive experience building complex financial and/or operating models

  • Ability to craft executive-level presentations and develop succinct narratives outlining the key points of a deliverable and next step action items

  • Demonstrated abilities to ask the right questions and to use sound business judgment when collaborating with a wide-range of stakeholders

  • Proven proclivity for quickly identifying and methodically resolving potential road-blocks

  • Excellent verbal and written communication skills, and a willingness to proactively work with functions across the company, including board members

    •  
    Nice to Have:

  • Previous crypto industry experience will be an advantage

  • Finance, Economics, Business related degree are preferred major fields (CIMA qualified will be a plus)

  • Past marketing FBP experience will be a plus

lists.content:
• Manage and organize Binance’s online and offline communities across France. 
  • Lead Telegram group moderation, implement Telegram bots, and execute engaging mini-games and community campaigns.
  • Organize and execute both offline and online events—including meetups, webinars, workshops, and educational sessions—to boost user engagement and education.
  • Establish and maintain partnerships with local crypto communities, student groups, and universities to expand Binance Academy initiatives and regional reach.
  • Support with recruitment, training, and managing Binance Angels (Volunteer Program) across the region, while maintaining a high level of communication and performance tracking.
  • Create, translate, and proofread community content in French and English to ensure clarity, accuracy, and local relevance.
  • Moderate regional social media platforms and chat groups while driving positive and safe engagement.
  • Promote Binance’s brand, products, and campaigns while offering high-quality community support.
  • Explore and introduce new platforms to reach wider user bases and grow brand awareness.
  • Collect and relay user insights, market trends, and community feedback to internal teams to help optimize regional strategies.

• Minimum 3-5 years of experience in community management, events, or related roles.
  • Strong hands-on experience with Telegram moderation, bots, mini-games, and campaign execution.
  • Demonstrated success in organizing both offline and online events across various city tiers.
  • Proven ability to build partnerships with local communities, student clubs, and universities.
  • Proficiency in French and English.
  • Excellent knowledge of Binance products and core features (Spot, P2P, Futures, NFT, etc.).
  • Strong communication, copywriting, and content creation skills for multilingual markets.
  • Familiarity with AI tools for community engagement, content generation, user segmentation, or campaign automation (e.g., ChatGPT, Midjourney, Notion AI, Discord/Telegram AI bots).
  • Capable of setting KPIs, tracking performance, and mentoring community members or volunteers.
  • Results-oriented, self-driven, and comfortable working in a fast-paced, evolving environment.
  • Willingness to travel and work flexible hours to align with community and business needs.

The Fraud Prevention and Regulatory Risk Manager is a strategic leadership role responsible for developing and executing fraud prevention strategies across digital products, particularly digital accounts. This position plays a critical role in safeguarding the organization against fraud risks while ensuring full compliance with applicable financial regulations.
 
Please upload your resume in English.

lists.content:
• Lead the strategy for fraud prevention and detection across digital platforms and the PIX environment.

  • Act as a subject matter expert on regulatory requirements applicable to fintech and financial services.

  • Design, implement, and enhance anti-fraud frameworks, policies, and controls.

  • Drive continuous improvement initiatives for fraud detection systems and operational processes.

  • Collaborate closely with Technology, Product, Compliance, and Legal teams to deliver effective solutions.

  • Analyze data and metrics to identify fraud patterns, trends, and vulnerabilities.

  • Define and monitor KPIs related to fraud prevention and operational efficiency.

  • Manage third-party vendors and fraud prevention tools.

  • Lead, mentor, and develop the fraud prevention team.

  • Support internal and external audits and maintain relationships with regulators.

• Strong experience in fraud prevention within financial services or fintech.

  • In-depth knowledge of regulatory and compliance frameworks.

  • Proven track record in implementing and improving anti-fraud systems and processes.

  • Experience with transaction monitoring, KYC, AML, and authentication tools.

  • Strong analytical and data-driven mindset.

  • Leadership and project management experience.

  • Advanced or fluent English (mandatory)

• Manage production incidents and conduct post-mortems to enhance system stability and reliability.

Binance offerings range from trading and finance to education, research, payments, institutional services, Web3 features, and more. We leverage the power of digital assets and blockchain to build an inclusive financial ecosystem to advance the freedom of money and improve financial access for people around the world.

Join our BigPay Frontend team and drive exciting AI-powered, data-driven innovation at Binance.
 
We are looking for a High Young Potential Frontend Engineer with AI expertise to design, build, and maintain infrastructure powering Binance's Applications/Web — You'll craft a lighting-fast for Binance users for world class user experience for Binance BigPay products.
 
 
This role is 100% Remote, Work from Home based.

lists.content:
• Develop cutting-edge user-facing features for Binance’s high-traffic BigPay products, serving millions of daily page views.
  • Craft lightning-fast, intuitive web applications optimized for desktop, mobile browsers, and hybrid in-app experiences.
  • Enhance application performance, scalability, and SEO to deliver seamless user experiences.
  • Innovate by integrating new technologies that boost efficiency for users, operators, and developers alike.
  • Build robust libraries and frameworks to accelerate development and elevate code quality across complex web projects.

• Must Have 3-7 years of experience in developing production JavaScript code and strong knowledge of React.
  • Understanding of state-management patterns such as Redux, Flux or similar.
  • Proven track record of delivering projects with high quality UI.
  • Experience in developing large scale responsive web sites for diverse clients from high powered desktop computers to small footprint mobile devices.
  • Experience with modern front end technologies (styled system, webpack, etc).
  • Proficient with the use of AI to create substantial Frontend impact
  • Fluent in Chinese and English for efficient cross team functional collaboration

About the team
At Binance, the KYC Technology Team is not just building a compliance platform - we are engineering the intelligent backbone of global financial trust. We are an AI-first team of visionary technologists on a mission to redefine what's possible in identity verification, customer onboarding, and compliance automation - at a scale that few teams in the world ever experience.

From architecting large-scale, AI-powered KYC infrastructures to seamlessly integrating global and regional compliance vendors, every solution we build is designed with intelligence, precision, and responsibility at its core. We harness the transformative power of AI/ML technologies to automate complex compliance workflows while maintaining unwavering alignment with global and local regulatory standards.

If you are a forward-thinking technologist who believes that AI is the answer to the world's most complex compliance challenges, and you thrive at the intersection of cutting-edge technology and regulatory excellence - you have found your team.
 
About the role
Join us as a Staff/Principal Frontend Engineer and play a pivotal role in shaping the future of our cutting-edge applications. Mentor and inspire a top-tier frontend engineering team while staying deeply involved in hands-on coding, about 80% of your time. If you’re passionate about building exceptional user experiences and driving innovation, this is the perfect opportunity for you!

lists.content:
• Spearhead the implementation of new technologies to solve problems and improve existing systems, encourage standardization of best practices & methodologies
  • Fine-tune the technical stack with a focus on performance, security, stability, and scalability
  • Write client-side code to create super-fast, easy-to-use, web-based applications which include websites for both desktop and mobile browsers, and hybrid in-app pages
  • Participate in design discussions and roadmap planning
  • Review and support frontend technical designs across teams to maximize speed and scale
  • Build libraries and frameworks that support complex web applications, speedup development efficiency, and improve code quality
  • Coach, mentor, and grow team members

• Bachelor’s/Master’s degree in computer science, engineering, or equivalent industry experience
  • Minimum 10+ years of experience in frontend development with 1+ years of experience in a technical leadership role
  • Hands-on development experience with TypeScript, React and Javascript
  • Experience with web services, microservices, APIs, and SOA
  • Proven track record of delivering projects with high-quality UI
  • Understanding of state-management patterns such as Redux, Flux, or similar
  • Ability to provide technical expertise and complete peer code reviews to team members in a timely manner to ensure code standards, completeness, cleanliness, and quality

job_detail_fetch.description:
Binance is a leading global blockchain ecosystem behind the world’s largest cryptocurrency exchange by trading volume and registered users. We are trusted by 300+ million people in 100+ countries for our industry-leading security, user fund transparency, trading engine speed, deep liquidity, and an unmatched portfolio of digital-asset products. Binance offerings range from trading and finance to education, research, payments, institutional services, Web3 features, and more. We leverage the power of digital assets and blockchain to build an inclusive financial ecosystem to advance the freedom of money and improve financial access for people around the world.

About the team
The Tech Compliance team at Binance, primarily composed of skilled software engineers, plays a crucial role in ensuring that our technological operations meet all regulatory standards. By aligning our processes with the latest legal requirements, we foster a secure and trustworthy environment for our users. Our efforts are pivotal in paving the way for a bright and sustainable future in the crypto industry.
 
About the role
We are looking for a passionate Full Stack Developer who takes pride in delivering polished, high-quality products end-to-end — from intuitive React/Vue frontends to robust Java microservices backends. You will join a team building agentic flows and compliance systems from scratch, where AI-augmented development is embedded in how we work. If you are a proactive self-starter with strong ownership, genuine curiosity for AI and crypto, and the drive to build meaningful systems at scale, we'd love to hear from you.

lists.content:
• Design, develop, and maintain full-stack web applications using React and Vue on the frontend, and Java/Spring Cloud microservices on the backend
  • Build and consume RESTful APIs, integrating with internal services, third-party platforms, and AI model APIs
  • Take end-to-end ownership of features — from requirements gathering and technical design through implementation, testing, deployment, and post-launch maintenance
  • Collaborate closely with product managers, designers, and cross-functional stakeholders to translate business requirements into scalable technical solutions
  • Deliver high-quality, polished UI with strong attention to user experience, accessibility, and visual consistency
    Leverage AI-assisted development tools (e.g., GitHub Copilot, Cursor, Claude Code) to accelerate development cycles and improve code quality
  • Write clean, maintainable, and well-tested code; participate in code reviews and uphold engineering best practices
  • Work with SQL and NoSQL databases — design schemas, write queries, and optimize for performance
  • Proactively identify and surface blockers, communicate progress and risks to stakeholders, and keep cross-timezone teams aligned (APAC/MENA)
  • Contribute to technical documentation, architecture discussions, and continuous improvement of development processes
  • Stay current with emerging technologies in web development, AI, crypto, and blockchain to bring relevant innovations to the team

• 3–5 years of experience in developing production-ready web applications and backend services
  • BS or MS degree in Computer Science, Engineering, or a related field
  • Strong proficiency in frontend frameworks — must have experience with React and Vue; experience with other frontend frameworks is welcome
  • Solid backend experience with Java and Spring Cloud microservices architecture; familiarity with RESTful API design and database fundamentals (SQL/NoSQL)
  • Proven track record of delivering projects with high-quality UI across diverse application areas
  • Strong experience working with remote data via REST, JSON, and AI model APIs
  • Demonstrated experience in using AI tools and technologies (e.g., GitHub Copilot, Cursor, Claude Code) in real project delivery; familiarity with AI-augmented development ("vibe coding") workflows to enhance productivity and innovation
  • Strong sense of ownership — takes full responsibility for features end-to-end, from design through deployment and maintenance
  • Takes pride in craft — cares deeply about code quality, user experience, and attention to detail
  • Proactive communicator — surfaces blockers early, shares context with stakeholders, and collaborates effectively across time zones and distributed teams (APAC/MENA)
  • Interest and knowledge in the crypto/blockchain/technology space preferred, with a keen interest in AI technologies
  • Preferred work experience in an exchange (cryptocurrency or traditional), financial or banking institution, eCommerce, or payments processing
  • Bilingual English/Mandarin is required to be able to coordinate with overseas partners and stakeholders.

job_detail_fetch.descriptionPlain:
Binance is a leading global blockchain ecosystem behind the world’s largest cryptocurrency exchange by trading volume and registered users. We are trusted by 300+ million people in 100+ countries for our industry-leading security, user fund transparency, trading engine speed, deep liquidity, and an unmatched portfolio of digital-asset products. Binance offerings range from trading and finance to education, research, payments, institutional services, Web3 features, and more. We leverage the power of digital assets and blockchain to build an inclusive financial ecosystem to advance the freedom of money and improve financial access for people around the world.


We are seeking a dedicated and dynamic individual to join our affiliate team, focusing on managing an expanding network of affiliates. This role primarily involves collaborating with prominent KOLs to ensure the effectiveness of their promotional efforts. A significant aspect of the position includes liaising with various internal departments to equip affiliates with the necessary assets and tools to attract more users to Binance. The ideal candidate will possess an analytical mindset, a background in marketing or public relations, and excellent communication skills for both internal and external interactions. Given Binance's extensive affiliate network, you will be expected to deliver exceptional value through your work, surpassing competitors in the quest for top affiliates.
 
The role requires proficiency in using in-house tools, necessitating quick learning and collaboration with developers to enhance systems and interfaces, resolve issues, and conduct comprehensive analyses of existing data.
 
Before applying, please conduct an analysis of the current affiliate program and submit a brief cover letter outlining the next steps Binance should take to further expand the affiliate channel. You will also be required to complete a complex test challenge following the initial interview.

lists.content:
• Growing affiliate network: cold outreach to YouTubers, Media, Influencers. Negotiations, onboarding, paperwork if needed
  • Managing key accounts: regular communication with affiliates, analyzing their performance, and offer recommendations on how to improve
  • Creating and executing promotional campaigns with a focus on ROI
  • Building reports using internal data, optimizing overall affiliate channel performance
  • Monitoring competitor space and adjusting our strategy accordingly
  • Fraud detection, revealing the new scam schemes and any sort of manipulation by partners

• Experience in managing large affiliate programs, preferably in the fintech space, ideally in the crypto space
  • A business development background is a plus
  • Understanding of the crypto space
  • Excellent communication and presentation skills
  • Experience in working with media, celebrities, key partners, or influencers
  • Fluency in English is required to be able to coordinate with overseas partners and stakeholders. Additional languages would be an advantage.

Binance is a leading global blockchain ecosystem behind the world’s largest cryptocurrency exchange by trading volume and registered users. We are trusted by 300+ million people in 100+ countries for our industry-leading security, user fund transparency, trading engine speed, deep liquidity, and an unmatched portfolio of digital-asset products. Binance offerings range from trading and finance to education, research, payments, institutional services, Web3 features, and more. We leverage the power of digital assets and blockchain to build an inclusive financial ecosystem to advance the freedom of money and improve financial access for people around the world.

We are seeking a dedicated and dynamic individual to join our affiliate team, focusing on managing an expanding network of affiliates. This role primarily involves collaborating with prominent KOLs to ensure the effectiveness of their promotional efforts. A significant aspect of the position includes liaising with various internal departments to equip affiliates with the necessary assets and tools to attract more users to Binance. The ideal candidate will possess an analytical mindset, a background in marketing or public relations, and excellent communication skills for both internal and external interactions. Given Binance's extensive affiliate network, you will be expected to deliver exceptional value through your work, surpassing competitors in the quest for top affiliates.
 
The role requires proficiency in using in-house tools, necessitating quick learning and collaboration with developers to enhance systems and interfaces, resolve issues, and conduct comprehensive analyses of existing data.
 
Before applying, please conduct an analysis of the current affiliate program and submit a brief cover letter outlining the next steps Binance should take to further expand the affiliate channel. You will also be required to complete a complex test challenge following the initial interview.

lists.content:
• Growing affiliate network: cold outreach to YouTubers, Media, Influencers. Negotiations, onboarding, paperwork if needed
  • Managing key accounts: regular communication with affiliates, analyzing their performance, and offer recommendations on how to improve
  • Creating and executing promotional campaigns with a focus on ROI
  • Building reports using internal data, optimizing overall affiliate channel performance
  • Monitoring competitor space and adjusting our strategy accordingly
  • Fraud detection, revealing the new scam schemes and any sort of manipulation by partners

• Experience in managing large affiliate programs, preferably in the fintech space, ideally in the crypto space
  • A business development background is a plus
  • Understanding of the crypto space
  • Excellent communication and presentation skills
  • Experience in working with media, celebrities, key partners, or influencers
  • Fluency in English is required to be able to coordinate with overseas partners and stakeholders. Additional languages would be an advantage.

Serve as the principal legal lead for Binance’s regulatory affairs on a global scale, ensuring compliance with regulatory requirements across multiple jurisdictions and managing associated legal risks worldwide. Develop and execute Binance’s global regulatory legal strategy, aligning with evolving international laws, directives, and regulatory frameworks in the cryptocurrency and financial services sectors.
job_detail_fetch.description:
Binance is a leading global blockchain ecosystem behind the world’s largest cryptocurrency exchange by trading volume and registered users. We are trusted by 300+ million people in 100+ countries for our industry-leading security, user fund transparency, trading engine speed, deep liquidity, and an unmatched portfolio of digital-asset products. Binance offerings range from trading and finance to education, research, payments, institutional services, Web3 features, and more. We leverage the power of digital assets and blockchain to build an inclusive financial ecosystem to advance the freedom of money and improve financial access for people around the world.

Serve as the principal legal lead for Binance’s regulatory affairs on a global scale, ensuring compliance with regulatory requirements across multiple jurisdictions and managing associated legal risks worldwide. Develop and execute Binance’s global regulatory legal strategy, aligning with evolving international laws, directives, and regulatory frameworks in the cryptocurrency and financial services sectors.

lists.content:
• Lead and manage Binance’s global regulatory legal team, providing strategic legal expertise and direction to address complex regulatory challenges across all regions.
  • Develop, implement, and continuously refine Binance’s global regulatory legal strategy to ensure compliance with diverse regulatory regimes and to proactively manage legal risks.
  • Act as the primary legal liaison with regulatory authorities worldwide, building and maintaining strong relationships to facilitate constructive dialogue and advance Binance’s regulatory interests.
  • Oversee the preparation, submission, and management of regulatory filings, licenses, permits, and approvals required for Binance’s operations in multiple jurisdictions.
  • Provide expert legal advice on a broad range of regulatory matters affecting Binance’s products, services, and business operations globally.
  • Monitor and interpret regulatory developments across key markets, anticipate potential legal impacts, and advise senior management on necessary compliance measures and strategic legal responses.
  • Coordinate and lead legal responses to regulatory inquiries, investigations, audits, and enforcement actions worldwide, ensuring timely and effective resolution.
  • Collaborate closely with cross-functional teams including compliance, risk, business development, and product to embed regulatory legal considerations into global business processes and product launches.
  • Drive the development and delivery of regulatory legal training and awareness programs for internal stakeholders globally to enhance the regulatory compliance culture across the organization.
  • Manage relationships with external legal counsel and consultants globally to support regulatory matters and complex legal issues.
  • Oversee the global regulatory legal team’s operational functions, including budgeting, resource allocation, and performance management.

• Qualified to practice law in a leading jurisdiction with significant international regulatory legal experience.
  • Minimum of 15 years’ experience in regulatory legal roles, preferably within technology, financial services, or cryptocurrency sectors.
  • Proven expertise in managing complex regulatory compliance issues and engaging with regulatory authorities across multiple jurisdictions globally.
  • Strong knowledge of global financial products, including spot and derivatives trading, payment systems, and digital assets.
  • Demonstrated ability to develop and execute global regulatory strategies in a fast-evolving and highly regulated environment.
  • Experience leading and managing high-performing legal teams across multiple regions.
  • Excellent stakeholder management skills with the ability to build trusted relationships with regulators, business leaders, and external counsel.
  • Deep understanding of the cryptocurrency industry and its regulatory landscape worldwide.
  • Exceptional communication and negotiation skills, with fluency in English; additional language skills are a plus.
  • Strong business acumen combined with a pragmatic and solutions-oriented approach to regulatory challenges.
  • Ability to work effectively in a dynamic, fast-paced, and high-pressure environment, managing multiple priorities and deadlines.

lists.content:
• Serve as the subject matter expert and lead counsel for sanctions-related legal issues, including those with substantial legal, financial, or reputational implications.
  • Act as the primary point of contact for matters pertaining to sanctions legal risks, offering advice on compliance with US/OFAC sanctions, plus insights on other applicable sanctions regulations such as those in the EU, following consultation with local legal advisors.
  • Collaborate with the global sanctions compliance team and other control functions to identify, manage, and mitigate sanctions risks in all business operations and transactions.
  • Offer expert legal representation in filings, communications with OFAC, and interactions with other sanctions-associated regulatory bodies. This includes voluntary self-disclosures, license applications, requests for guidance, and responses to legal injunctions.
  • Provide proficient legal advice on contract issues and specific transaction-related sanctions questions, prepare necessary documentation, and conduct appropriate analyses as needed.
  • Develop and implement industry-leading strategies and initiatives concerning sanctions matters that position Binance at the forefront of its field.
  • Oversee the engagement and manage relationships with external legal counsel concerning sanctions-related issues.

• 10+ years of relevant experience as an attorney and compliance professional specializing in sanctions matters.
  • Deep technical expertise in sanctions laws and regulations, and experience dealing with OFAC and other authoritative bodies in major jurisdictions.
  • Sound knowledge of sanctions issues occurring in complex transactions and financial products.
  • The candidate must be adept at communicating effectively on intricate issues with internal stakeholders at all levels of the organization, and must be proficient in offering concise, sound recommendations to senior management.
  • Proven leadership aptitude, change agility, and proven ability to work proficiently with lawyers and businesses across diverse geographies and cultures.
  • The candidate must understand the implications of multi-jurisdictional issues, particularly in areas of data privacy and transmission.
  • Familiarity with the anti-money laundering and financial crimes framework applicable to global financial institutions is desirable.

• Design and develop complex backend logic for Binance Square product.
  • Collaborate closely with Product Managers, DevOps, QA, and team members to deliver high-quality solutions.
  • Advocate for technology best practices within the team and conduct code reviews to ensure code quality and consistency.

• At least 5 years of back-end software development experience, with proficiency in Golang and Python programming languages.
  • Bachelor's or Master's degree in Computer Science, Engineering, or a related field.
  • Strong understanding of software frameworks and design patterns.
  • Familiarity with Cloud, message brokers, relational databases, and microservices architecture.
  • Experience in AI projects is a plus.

lists.content:
• Support General Manager in developing and maintaining strong relationships with city-level government officials and politicians.
  • Identify opportunities for collaboration and partnerships that align with Binance’s strategic objectives.
  • Lead educational campaigns and awareness efforts to improve understanding of Binance and the broader crypto industry.
  • Manage communications and inquiries from the JFSA and other regulatory bodies in Japan.
  • Engage proactively with policymakers and other key stakeholders to foster a favorable policy environment.
  • Coordinate with internal teams to ensure alignment on regulatory and public affairs strategies.

• 5 to 7 years of experience in government relations, public affairs, or relevant regulatory roles in Japan.
  • Proven ability to engage effectively with government officials, regulators (particularly JFSA), and political figures.
  • Strong knowledge of Japanese regulatory environment related to financial services and cryptocurrency.
  • Experience working in a fast-paced, dynamic, and global environment.
  • Excellent communication, negotiation, and stakeholder management skills.
  • Japanese language fluency required; English proficiency preferred.

We are looking for a highly motivated and data-driven Campaign Manager to join our North Latam marketing team. In this role, you will be responsible for planning and executing impactful marketing campaigns focused on user acquisition, retention, and referral growth. You will leverage data insights and growth strategies to drive Binance’s product adoption and user engagement across the region. If you are passionate about digital marketing, growth hacking, and the crypto space, this is the perfect opportunity to make a significant impact in a fast-paced, innovative environment.

Binance is a leading global blockchain ecosystem behind the world’s largest cryptocurrency exchange by trading volume and registered users. We are trusted by 300+ million people in 100+ countries for our industry-leading security, user fund transparency, trading engine speed, deep liquidity, and an unmatched portfolio of digital-asset products. Binance offerings range from trading and finance to education, research, payments, institutional services, Web3 features, and more. We leverage the power of digital assets and blockchain to build an inclusive financial ecosystem to advance the freedom of money and improve financial access for people around the world.

We are looking for a highly motivated and data-driven Campaign Manager to join our North Latam marketing team. In this role, you will be responsible for planning and executing impactful marketing campaigns focused on user acquisition, retention, and referral growth. You will leverage data insights and growth strategies to drive Binance’s product adoption and user engagement across the region. If you are passionate about digital marketing, growth hacking, and the crypto space, this is the perfect opportunity to make a significant impact in a fast-paced, innovative environment.

lists.content:
• Plan, execute, and optimize marketing campaigns for user acquisition, retention, and referral programs aligned with regional business objectives.
  • Develop and manage lifecycle marketing campaigns to maximize user activation, retention, and lifetime value.
  • Implement strategies based on segmentation, personalization, and automated user journeys.
  • Analyze campaign data and user behavior to make data-driven decisions and improve campaign performance.
  • Conduct A/B testing and other optimization methodologies to enhance campaign effectiveness.
  • Collaborate with product, content, and operations teams to ensure campaign alignment and success.
  • Report KPIs and campaign results, proposing continuous improvements.
  • Stay updated on digital marketing trends, growth hacking techniques, and the crypto ecosystem.

• Minimum 3 years of experience in digital marketing, growth, or campaign management roles.
  • Analytical and data-driven mindset with experience in user behavior analysis and retention strategies.
  • Proven experience executing lifecycle and acquisition campaigns.
  • Knowledge of segmentation, automation, A/B testing, and funnel optimization.
  • Ability to work independently and collaboratively with a strong results orientation.
  • Fluency in English.
  • Genuine interest in cryptocurrencies, blockchain, and fintech.

lists.content:
• Plan, execute, and optimize marketing campaigns for user acquisition, retention, and referral programs aligned with regional business objectives.
  • Develop and manage lifecycle marketing campaigns to maximize user activation, retention, and lifetime value.
  • Implement strategies based on segmentation, personalization, and automated user journeys.
  • Analyze campaign data and user behavior to make data-driven decisions and improve campaign performance.
  • Conduct A/B testing and other optimization methodologies to enhance campaign effectiveness.
  • Collaborate with product, content, and operations teams to ensure campaign alignment and success.
  • Report KPIs and campaign results, proposing continuous improvements.

• Minimum 3 years of experience in digital marketing, growth, or campaign management roles.
  • Analytical and data-driven mindset with experience in user behavior analysis and retention strategies.
  • Proven experience executing lifecycle and acquisition campaigns.
  • Knowledge of segmentation, automation, A/B testing, and funnel optimization.
  • Ability to work independently and collaboratively with a strong results orientation.
  • Proficiency in English is mandatory. Bilingual capability in Spanish and Portuguese is highly desirable.
  • Genuine interest in cryptocurrencies, blockchain, and fintech.

lists.content:
• Drive and lead lifecycle marketing efforts across the African Region, creating, developing, and preparing campaigns for all business assets and implementing the strategies with the highest ROI.
  • Responsible for the comprehensive management of user lifecycle metrics: activation, retention, and regaining churned users.
  • Develop marketing strategies aimed at maximizing the long-term value of clients through customer segmentation, personalization, automated user journeys, and the ideal combination of products and distribution channels.
  • Unlock new user growth through product offerings design.
  • Map out the user journey and increase user funnel conversion through surfacing product ask, user education, and operation campaign.
  • Establish marketing best practices (including segmentation, A/B testing strategies, and email journeys) using data-driven insights.
  • Measure, understand, and report critical metrics within the organization.
  • Envision Africa's lifecycle next steps, its challenges and opportunities, being able to build innovative solutions and anticipate user needs.
  • Collaborate with regional and central stakeholders to localise and execute on global initiatives, ensuring cultural and localised relevance to users. 
  • Developing and owning the CRM and marketing workflows and automations roadmap, ensuring journeys are relevant, tactical and impactful.
  • Develop and own end-to-end growth strategies for the full African region spanning across acquisitions, activation, engagement, retention and reactivation across all core lifecycle pillars.
  • Drive revenue growth and trading volume  uplift through targeted lifecycle interventions, behavioural nudges, incentives and product education initiatives. 
  • Use of growth tools to create and execute behavioural gamification strategies that drive user engagement and drive product adoption and/or trade volumes.

• A minimum of 5 years of experience in lifecycle management.
  • Experience in launching both large-scale and targeted campaigns throughout the user lifecycle.
  • Well-versed and skilled in the areas of CRM/lifecycle management and email marketing/automation.
  • Experience in user segmentation, customer lifecycle management, and A/B testing.
  • Strong analytical capabilities related to user behavior analysis, user retention strategy development in marketing funnels. Expertise in data mining, measurement, and analysis.
  • Creative thinking for developing innovative marketing strategies and engaging campaigns.
  • Crypto enthusiast.
  • Demonstrate ability to prioritize ruthlessly, balancing quick wins with longer-term strategic bets.
  • Ability to operate in a faced-paced yet exciting team that is adamant on being the number #1 exchange in Africa.

lists.content:
• Together with the Marketing Strategy Lead execute regional growth campaigns in partnership with local & central stakeholders to ensure business objectives (KPIs) are met;
  • Drive and lead growth marketing promotions across the CIS/CEE (incl. Balkans) targeting users' stickiness, and platform ecosystem usage (Lifecycle, Product Marketing, Active Users Growth Hacks via Retention, Reactivation, Stickiness);
  • Establish marketing best practices (including segmentation, and A/B testing strategies) using data-driven insights;Measure, understand, and report critical metrics progress to regional management & Central Leaders;
  • Develop marketing strategies aimed at maximizing the long-term value of clients through customer segmentation, personalization, automated user journeys, and the ideal combination of products and distribution channels;
  • Map out the user journey and increase user funnel conversion through surfacing product asks, user education, and operational campaign (top focus on KYC-Deposit-Trades conversion);
  • Monitor campaign progress and results using data analysis and user feedback to ensure ever-improving efficiency and user experience;
  • Act as a driver for platform innovations (products, UX/UI), community needs solutions (Optimizations, Bonus Systems), in-depth analytics & in-sight sharing.

• 3-5+ years of experience in Growth/Digital/Marketing departments;
  • Data-oriented mindset connecting actionable insights (data) and exact drivers (campaigns). Strong analytical capabilities related to user behavior analysis, and user retention strategy development in marketing funnels;
  • Execution-oriented professional - with the humility, drive, and scrappiness to get it done;
  • Experience in launching both large-scale and targeted campaigns throughout the user conversion funnel OR product optimization;
  • Well-versed and ideally skilled in all 3 areas: Marketing Growth Hacking/Operational Management/Data Analytics;
  • Preferably experience in user segmentation, customer lifecycle management, and A/B testing;
  • Must have a strong interest in crypto/blockchain/technology, Crypto enthusiast is a plus;
  • Must be able to work independently and execute initiatives from A to Z;
  • Proven experience in growing and managing user base supported by strong coordination skills and strategic mindset for marketing;
  • Creative thinking for developing innovative product organizational strategies and engaging campaigns.

Role Overview
We are looking for a data-driven and commercially minded Growth Manager to drive user acquisition, activation, and retention for Binance in Australia.
This role goes beyond performance marketing — it is about building sustainable, compliant growth engines in a market where trust, regulation, and user education are critical.
You will own the end-to-end growth funnel, from first touch to active trader, while balancing efficiency, brand, and regulatory constraints.
job_detail_fetch.description:
Binance is a leading global blockchain ecosystem behind the world’s largest cryptocurrency exchange by trading volume and registered users. We are trusted by 300+ million people in 100+ countries for our industry-leading security, user fund transparency, trading engine speed, deep liquidity, and an unmatched portfolio of digital-asset products. Binance offerings range from trading and finance to education, research, payments, institutional services, Web3 features, and more. We leverage the power of digital assets and blockchain to build an inclusive financial ecosystem to advance the freedom of money and improve financial access for people around the world.

Role Overview

We are looking for a data-driven and commercially minded Growth Manager to drive user acquisition, activation, and retention for Binance in Australia.

This role goes beyond performance marketing — it is about building sustainable, compliant growth engines in a market where trust, regulation, and user education are critical.

You will own the end-to-end growth funnel, from first touch to active trader, while balancing efficiency, brand, and regulatory constraints.

lists.content:
Own the Full Growth Funnel

  • Drive performance across:

  • Acquisition (new users)

  • Activation (KYC → first trade)

  • Retention (repeat usage)

  • Identify drop-offs and optimize conversion at every stage

  • Build and continuously refine AU-specific growth playbooks

    • Performance Marketing & Channel Optimization

  • Manage and optimize key channels:

  • Paid media (Google, Meta, programmatic)

  • Affiliates & referral programs

  • SEO / landing page optimization

  • Work closely with global teams to adapt strategies to AU constraints

  • Focus on quality users, not just volume

    • Campaign Strategy (Compliance-First)

  • Design campaigns that drive growth while staying within:

  • Regulatory requirements

  • Internal compliance guidelines

  • Shift away from “hype-led” campaigns → value-led, education-driven growth

  • Develop localized messaging that builds trust and credibility

    • Data, Insights & Experimentation

  • Own key growth metrics:

  • CAC

  • Conversion rates (KYC, first trade)

  • Retention / activity rates

  • Run structured experiments (A/B testing, funnel optimization)

  • Translate data into clear, actionable insights

    • Product & Cross-Functional Collaboration

  • Work closely with:

  • Product teams (UX, onboarding flows)

  • PR & brand (message alignment)

  • Community & events (offline → online conversion)

  • Ensure growth efforts are fully integrated, not siloed

    • Local Market Intelligence

  • Develop deep understanding of:

  • Australian user behavior

  • Competitive landscape (local exchanges, fintech apps)

  • Banking/payment constraints

  • Be the local voice of the user in growth decisions

Experience

  • 4–7+ years in growth, performance marketing, or product marketing

  • Strong experience in Australia market

  • Experience in crypto, fintech, or high-growth tech companies preferred

  • Proven ability to manage full-funnel growth, not just top-of-funnel

    • Skills

  • Strong analytical skills (comfortable with data, dashboards, attribution)

  • Hands-on experience with paid media & growth tools

  • Understanding of conversion optimization & user psychology

  • Ability to balance short-term performance vs long-term brand

    • Mindset (Critical for AU Market)

  • Pragmatic, not hype-driven

  • Thinks in systems and scalable growth loops

  • Strong judgment in a regulated / sensitive environment

  • Comfortable operating with constraints and ambiguity

  • High ownership — acts like a business owner, not a channel manager

job_detail_fetch.additionalPlain:
Why Binance

Scale and impact: Shape the AI layer for the world’s largest crypto ecosystem.
Unbounded innovation: Freedom to experiment with frontier AI models, agents, and decentralized intelligence.
Mission with meaning: Empower millions through smarter, fairer, and more personalized finance.
Elite environment: Work with top minds across AI, blockchain, and distributed systems.
Global stage: Lead the transformation of Web3 × AI — from vision to reality.
Join us to build the intelligence that powers the future of Web3.
Let’s redefine how humanity interacts with money, creativity, and data — through AI.

Why Binance

job_detail_fetch.descriptionPlain:
Binance is the world’s leading blockchain ecosystem and digital asset platform — home to hundreds of millions of users who trade, build, and connect through crypto and Web3.
We’re now entering a new era — one where AI and blockchain converge to redefine how users experience finance, identity, and digital freedom.
 
We’re building a next-generation AI engine to power personalized finance, agentic trading, Web3 discovery, and intelligent user experiences — and we’re looking for a world-class AI Lead to make it real.

The Mission

As Binance’s Global Head of AI, you will architect and lead the intelligence layer of the world’s largest crypto ecosystem.
You’ll drive cutting-edge R&D and real-world deployment of LLMs, recommender systems, multi-agent frameworks, and generative AI — creating adaptive, trustworthy, and creative AI systems that empower millions globally.
You will define how AI and Web3 merge — where identity, creativity, and ownership coexist in a new data economy.

This position will be based in APAC or UAE and work remotely.
job_detail_fetch.description:
Binance is the world’s leading blockchain ecosystem and digital asset platform — home to hundreds of millions of users who trade, build, and connect through crypto and Web3.
We’re now entering a new era — one where AI and blockchain converge to redefine how users experience finance, identity, and digital freedom.
 
We’re building a next-generation AI engine to power personalized finance, agentic trading, Web3 discovery, and intelligent user experiences — and we’re looking for a world-class AI Lead to make it real.

The Mission

As Binance’s Global Head of AI, you will architect and lead the intelligence layer of the world’s largest crypto ecosystem.
You’ll drive cutting-edge R&D and real-world deployment of LLMs, recommender systems, multi-agent frameworks, and generative AI — creating adaptive, trustworthy, and creative AI systems that empower millions globally.
You will define how AI and Web3 merge — where identity, creativity, and ownership coexist in a new data economy.

This position will be based in APAC or UAE and work remotely.

lists.content:
• Lead and scale Binance’s AI and Algorithm organization — a cross-disciplinary team of scientists, engineers, and product innovators.
  • Define and execute the AI strategy, uniting personalisation, generative agents, and Web3 intelligence into a cohesive product vision.
  • Drive end-to-end innovation in three strategic areas:

    • Personalized Binance: Deliver intelligent onboarding, dynamic trading guidance, community discovery, and personalized learning journeys — powered by large-scale behavioral and contextual models.

    AI-Native Support Ecosystem: Build next-generation AI customer service systems — self-learning, multilingual, and empathetic — serving millions with zero friction.

    AI × Web3 Frontier: Pioneer AI-generated meme economies, agent-driven DeFi, and personalized crypto narratives — turning cultural energy into financial participation.

  • Foster collaboration with product, engineering, and data teams to translate breakthrough models into scalable, production-grade systems.
  • Attract, grow, and inspire world-class AI talent across research, engineering, and product — building a global center of excellence.

• A proven AI leader with deep experience building and scaling high-impact AI/ML or LLM teams.
  • A hands-on technical strategist — equally fluent in model design, architecture decisions, and product outcomes.
  • A builder of AI products at scale, with experience in personalisation, recommendation, natural language systems, or agentic architectures.
  • An entrepreneurial thinker passionate about open systems, blockchain, and the emerging data ownership economy.
  • A visionary storyteller who can inspire across disciplines — from deep research to product, engineering, and executive leadership.
  • Familiarity with financial markets, trading systems, or crypto/Web3 ecosystems is a strong plus.

This position will be based in APAC or UAE and work remotely.
job_detail_fetch.descriptionBodyPlain:
Binance is the world’s leading blockchain ecosystem and digital asset platform — home to hundreds of millions of users who trade, build, and connect through crypto and Web3.
We’re now entering a new era — one where AI and blockchain converge to redefine how users experience finance, identity, and digital freedom.
 
We’re building a next-generation AI engine to power personalized finance, agentic trading, Web3 discovery, and intelligent user experiences — and we’re looking for a world-class AI Lead to make it real.

The Mission

As Binance’s Global Head of AI, you will architect and lead the intelligence layer of the world’s largest crypto ecosystem.
You’ll drive cutting-edge R&D and real-world deployment of LLMs, recommender systems, multi-agent frameworks, and generative AI — creating adaptive, trustworthy, and creative AI systems that empower millions globally.
You will define how AI and Web3 merge — where identity, creativity, and ownership coexist in a new data economy.

This position will be based in APAC or UAE and work remotely.

job_detail_fetch.descriptionPlain:
Binance is a leading global blockchain ecosystem behind the world’s largest cryptocurrency exchange by trading volume and registered users. We are trusted by 300+ million people in 100+ countries for our industry-leading security, user fund transparency, trading engine speed, deep liquidity, and an unmatched portfolio of digital-asset products. Binance offerings range from trading and finance to education, research, payments, institutional services, Web3 features, and more. We leverage the power of digital assets and blockchain to build an inclusive financial ecosystem to advance the freedom of money and improve financial access for people around the world.


About the Role
We’re looking for an experienced Engineering Manager/Tech Lead to lead an engineering team and bridge technical operations with regulatory stakeholders. In this role, you’ll drive architectural excellence, and operational maturity while building trusted external relationships in a complex regulatory environment. You’ll stay hands-on with architecture, code reviews, and technical problem-solving, balancing technical leadership with people management and stakeholder engagement.

About the Role
We’re looking for an experienced Engineering Manager/Tech Lead to lead an engineering team and bridge technical operations with regulatory stakeholders. In this role, you’ll drive architectural excellence, and operational maturity while building trusted external relationships in a complex regulatory environment. You’ll stay hands-on with architecture, code reviews, and technical problem-solving, balancing technical leadership with people management and stakeholder engagement.

lists.content:
• Lead and grow a high-performing engineering team; mentor talent, drive technical excellence, and hold accountability for team delivery and quality
  • Drive architectural decisions and design scalable, robust systems with deep technical leadership in distributed systems and cloud infrastructure
  • Serve as the primary technical liaison with regulatory bodies; answer regulatory questions, ensure system compliance with frameworks, and translate regulatory requirements into technical roadmaps
  • Manage delivery commitments, drive incident readiness, and ensure operational excellence across team(s) and products
  • Build trusted relationships with external stakeholders (regulators, clients, partners); communicate complex technical concepts to non-technical audiences and serve as trusted advisor
  • Collaborate with Product, Business, and Compliance teams to solve complex problems, shape product strategy, and align on mission-critical initiatives
  • Drive continuous improvement in code quality, system reliability, and team capability

• 10+ years of software product engineering experience, preferably in cloud computing, SaaS, fintech, regulated environments, or eCommerce; 3+ years leading engineering teams
  • Hands-on technical expertise in backend, infrastructure, or full-stack engineering with strong experience in modern tech stacks (Java/Spring Boot, microservices, AWS, Kafka, MySQL, etc.)
  • Demonstrated experience working in regulated industries or with compliance frameworks; ability to understand and translate regulatory requirements into technical solutions
  • Exceptional communication and stakeholder management skills; comfortable engaging with executives, regulators, non-technical partners, and cross-functional teams
  • Proven ability to mentor, coach, and develop high-performing engineers; track record of scaling teams and building strong engineering cultures
  • Strong experience designing scalable systems, managing cloud infrastructure costs, and leading large-scale technical initiatives from concept to production
  • Bachelor's degree in Computer Science, Engineering, or related field (or equivalent professional experience); familiarity with AI-assisted coding tools and modern development practices
  • Bilingual English/Korean is required to be able to coordinate with overseas partners and stakeholders

lists.content:
• Market Oversight and Monitoring:
  • Continuously monitor trading activities to detect and prevent market manipulation, insider trading, fraud, and other unfair practices.
  • Ensure that all market participants comply with the rules and regulations governing the market.
  • Analyze market data and trends to identify irregularities or suspicious activities.
    •  
  • Regulatory Compliance:
  • Ensure that the market operates in accordance with applicable laws, regulations and internal policies.
  • Coordinate with regulatory authorities to implement new regulations and guidelines.
  • Oversee the enforcement of market rules and take corrective actions when violations occur.
    •  
  • Investigation and Enforcement:
  • Lead investigations into suspected market abuses or breaches of regulations.
  • Collaborate with legal and compliance teams to impose sanctions, penalties or other disciplinary measures.
  • Prepare reports and documentation for regulatory bodies or law enforcement agencies as needed.
    •  
  • Policy Development and Implementation:
  • Participate in the development and review of market rules, policies, and procedures.
  • Recommend improvements to enhance market transparency, efficiency, and fairness.
  • Ensure that market participants are informed about regulatory changes and compliance requirements.

• 10 years of experience in regulatory and compliance roles within financial markets, cryptocurrency exchanges, and stock exchanges.
  • Strong knowledge of risk and compliance frameworks, with experience working alongside regulators. Familiarity with FSRA rules is a plus.
  • Technical expertise in surveillance tools and related technologies.

lists.content:
Wallet Management:

  • Crypto wallet product owner role, offer industry wide leading CEX crypto deposit withdraw safekeep service.
  • Oversee daily operations of exchange wallets, including deposits, withdrawals.
  • Monitor blockchain transactions to ensure timely processing and resolve delays or failures
  • Maintain operational uptime of exchange wallets
  • Coordinate and complete network upgrades, token events and testing with no issues

    • Risk Mitigation & Compliance:

  • Monitor Internal Alerts and collaborate with internal stakeholders and external parties to react to incidents and implement safeguards.
  • Continuously review existing risk and controls to prevent potential future impact to the firm or users
    • Process Optimization:
  • Review internal processes and simplify or automate processes to enhance efficiency and users experience
  • Analyze competitor product and industry trends to identify potential product/process enhancements
    • Cross-Functional & External Collaboration:
  • Work with Customer Support to resolve wallet-related user inquiries
  • Drive the strategy and partner with Stakeholders across various departments to solve customer pain-points and enhance our product user experience
  • Communicate and collaborate with regulators, auditors and external parties
    • Business Growth
  • Drive the CEX business growth strategy and develop/integrate new products to increase market share

• 5+ years in crypto wallet operations, blockchain infrastructure, or a related role
  • 8+ years of experience in Product/Operations Management
  • Familiarity with various blockchain technologies notwithstanding EVM, Polkadot, Cosmos, etc. 
  • Familiarity with on-chain analysis tools, DeFi protocols, and new projects
  • Familiarity with wallet infrastructure such as nodes, signing services and wallet custody models (Hardware wallet, MPC, HSM, KSM, Embedded Custody) 
  • Excellent problem-solving and communication skills
  • Ability to stay calm in pressure situations and make clear decisions with thorough impact analysis
  • Ability to thrive in a fast-paced, 24/7 crypto environment, passionate and self starter
  • Tradfi experience in Issuer Services & Custody is a plus
    •

This advertisement is for a position at Gulf Binance. We are looking for a HR & Admin to join our regional team in Thailand. 
 
We are looking for a detail-oriented and proactive HR & Admin Executive to support our day-to-day HR operations and office administration. This role is a blend of HR operations (with a focus on onboarding/offboarding, payroll exposure, and basic recruitment support) and general administrative functions. You will play a key role in delivering a smooth and positive employee experience.

This advertisement is for a position at Gulf Binance. We are looking for a HR & Admin to join our regional team in Thailand.
 
We are looking for a detail-oriented and proactive HR & Admin Executive to support our day-to-day HR operations and office administration. This role is a blend of HR operations (with a focus on onboarding/offboarding, payroll exposure, and basic recruitment support) and general administrative functions. You will play a key role in delivering a smooth and positive employee experience.

lists.content:
HR

  1. Manage end-to-end onboarding and offboarding processes, including documentation, system updates, and continuous improvement of the employee experience
  2. Draft, collate, and maintain employment letters, contracts, and other HR-related documents
  3. Maintain accurate employee data in the HRIS for new hires and existing employees, ensuring data integrity and timely updates
  4. Support HR workflows and processes to enhance operational efficiency and compliance
  5. Assist with payroll-related administration and coordinate with relevant teams as needed
  6. Provide basic recruitment support, including scheduling interviews and coordinating with candidates

Administration

  1. Handle general administrative duties including document signing, correspondence, and mail management, etc
  2. Act as office manager and oversee general office maintenance and ensure a well-functioning work environment
  3. Process administrative payment tasks for the team
  4. Support ad hoc tasks and projects as assigned

• Bachelor's degree in any discipline
  • Minimum 3 years of experience in general administration and/or HR operations
  • Bilingual in English and Thai (written and spoken) is required to be able to coordinate with overseas partners and stakeholders.
  • Proficient in MS Office (Word, Excel, PowerPoint)
  • Familiarity with HRIS platforms is a plus
  • High sense of discretion and data confidentiality
  • Strong attention to detail with a patient and data-sensitive approach
  • Excellent interpersonal and communication skills; able to build effective working relationships across teams
  • Self-motivated team player with a proactive, can-do attitude and ability to adapt quickly
