lists.content:
• Work directly with merchants and PSP partners to guide them through the full integration lifecycle, from solution design and API integration to testing, go-live, and post-launch support.
  • Lead technical discussions with merchant product and engineering teams to design optimal integration approaches using Binance payment solutions.
  • Act as the primary liaison between merchants, product managers, and engineering teams to ensure smooth communication and efficient problem solving.
  • Provide hands-on support during merchant integrations, helping troubleshoot technical issues and ensuring a high integration success rate.
  • Educate merchants on integration best practices, API usage, and optimal payment flows for both web and mobile environments.
  • Support merchants in designing effective checkout experiences and payment UI/UX to improve end-user conversion and payment success rates.
  • Conduct integration testing with merchants and internal teams to validate payment flows and ensure readiness for launch.
  • Analyze merchant feedback, performance data, and market trends to identify opportunities to improve Binance payment products and integration tools.
  • Collaborate with product teams to close functionality gaps and propose enhancements that improve merchant integration experience.
  • Engage with merchants regularly to understand their needs, gather insights, and help optimize their payment integration over time.

• 5+ years of experience in payment integrations, fintech, or merchant-facing technical roles
  • Experience working with payment gateways, PSPs, or merchant payment solutions
  • Strong understanding of REST APIs and integration workflows
  • Ability to work directly with merchant product or engineering teams to guide technical integrations
  • Strong communication skills with the ability to explain technical concepts to non-technical stakeholders
  • Experience coordinating cross-functional teams across product, engineering, and business
  • Familiarity with web or mobile technologies (JavaScript, Node.js, HTML5, Java, Python, etc.) is a plus
  • Knowledge in crypto or Web3 payment infrastructure is a strong advantage

lists.content:
We are looking for an AI Agent Engineer to join our team as part of Tech Seeds 2026. This is an engineering-first role for someone who wants their work to have real-world impact — not just demos, but agent systems that ship. You will work alongside senior engineers to design and build AI agents, workflows, and internal AI systems that improve our products and operational efficiency. This role is especially suited for candidates who are curious, fast learners, and excited to build practical AI systems in production. Production agent design today is typically centered on clear tool integration, strong instructions, safe execution, and iterative rollout, rather than purely academic model work.

What You'll Do

  • Design and build AI agent workflows and LLM-powered systems for real business use cases

  • Develop and integrate tools for agents, including APIs, internal services, databases, knowledge sources, and operational systems

  • Improve agent quality, latency, reliability, safety, and cost through testing, evaluation, and iteration

  • Build prompt structures, orchestration logic, memory or retrieval patterns, and human handoff flows where needed

  • Collaborate with product, business, and operations teams to translate ambiguous business problems into practical AI solutions

  • Contribute to backend services, internal platforms, and lightweight interfaces to support end-to-end delivery

  • Help define reusable engineering patterns, guardrails, and evaluation approaches for production AI agents

• Bachelor’s or Master’s degree in Computer Science, Software Engineering, Data Science, Mathematics, or a related field

  • 0–3 years of software engineering, AI engineering, or relevant internship/project experience

  • Strong programming fundamentals in Java or Python, TypeScript, or backend development is a plus

  • Good software engineering judgment, including APIs, debugging, system design, and data handling

  • Strong curiosity about LLMs, AI agents, tool use, retrieval, evaluation, and production AI systems

  • Ability to learn new domains quickly and work effectively in ambiguous environments

  • Ability to read, understand, and improve AI-generated code, or learn to do so very quickly

  • Good communication skills and the ability to connect technical work to business value

• Personal projects, hackathons, or internships involving LLM apps, AI agents, RAG, automation, or internal tools

  • Familiarity with OpenAI APIs, Anthropic APIs, vector databases, agent frameworks, or orchestration tools

  • Experience with backend systems, cloud environments, observability, or production support

  • Exposure to fintech, crypto, customer support systems, operations workflows, or risk/compliance processes

lists.text: What Makes You a Fit for Tech Seeds 2026
lists.content: You are self-driven, AI-native, and practical. You learn fast, like solving real problems, and are excited to turn new ideas into working systems. You do not wait to be told every step: you explore, test, iterate, and improve.

job_detail_fetch.descriptionPlain:
Binance is a leading global blockchain ecosystem behind the world’s largest cryptocurrency exchange by trading volume and registered users. We are trusted by 300+ million people in 100+ countries for our industry-leading security, user fund transparency, trading engine speed, deep liquidity, and an unmatched portfolio of digital-asset products. Binance offerings range from trading and finance to education, research, payments, institutional services, Web3 features, and more. We leverage the power of digital assets and blockchain to build an inclusive financial ecosystem to advance the freedom of money and improve financial access for people around the world.


About the Role
We are looking for an AI Agent Engineer to join our team as part of Tech Seeds 2026. This is an engineering-first role for someone who wants their work to have real-world impact — not just demos, but agent systems that ship. You will work alongside senior engineers to design and build AI agents, workflows, and internal AI systems that improve our products and operational efficiency. This role is especially suited for candidates who are curious, fast learners, and excited to build practical AI systems in production. Production agent design today is typically centered on clear tool integration, strong instructions, safe execution, and iterative rollout, rather than purely academic model work.
job_detail_fetch.description:
Binance is a leading global blockchain ecosystem behind the world’s largest cryptocurrency exchange by trading volume and registered users. We are trusted by 300+ million people in 100+ countries for our industry-leading security, user fund transparency, trading engine speed, deep liquidity, and an unmatched portfolio of digital-asset products. Binance offerings range from trading and finance to education, research, payments, institutional services, Web3 features, and more. We leverage the power of digital assets and blockchain to build an inclusive financial ecosystem to advance the freedom of money and improve financial access for people around the world.

About the Role

We are looking for an AI Agent Engineer to join our team as part of Tech Seeds 2026. This is an engineering-first role for someone who wants their work to have real-world impact — not just demos, but agent systems that ship. You will work alongside senior engineers to design and build AI agents, workflows, and internal AI systems that improve our products and operational efficiency. This role is especially suited for candidates who are curious, fast learners, and excited to build practical AI systems in production. Production agent design today is typically centered on clear tool integration, strong instructions, safe execution, and iterative rollout, rather than purely academic model work.

lists.content:
• Design and build AI agent workflows and LLM-powered systems for real business use cases
  • Develop and integrate tools for agents, including APIs, internal services, databases, knowledge sources, and operational systems
  • Improve agent quality, latency, reliability, safety, and cost through testing, evaluation, and iteration
  • Build prompt structures, orchestration logic, memory or retrieval patterns, and human handoff flows where needed
  • Collaborate with product, business, and operations teams to translate ambiguous business problems into practical AI solutions
  • Contribute to backend services, internal platforms, and lightweight interfaces to support end-to-end delivery
  • Help define reusable engineering patterns, guardrails, and evaluation approaches for production AI agents

• Bachelor’s or Master’s degree in Computer Science, Software Engineering, Data Science, Mathematics, or a related field
  • 0–3 years of software engineering, AI engineering, or relevant internship/project experience
  • Strong programming fundamentals in Java or Python, TypeScript, or backend development is a plus
  • Good software engineering judgment, including APIs, debugging, system design, and data handling
  • Strong curiosity about LLMs, AI agents, tool use, retrieval, evaluation, and production AI systems
  • Ability to learn new domains quickly and work effectively in ambiguous environments
  • Ability to read, understand, and improve AI-generated code, or learn to do so very quickly
  • Good communication skills and the ability to connect technical work to business value 
    •  
    Bonus Points
  • Personal projects, hackathons, or internships involving LLM apps, AI agents, RAG, automation, or internal tools
  • Familiarity with OpenAI APIs, Anthropic APIs, vector databases, agent frameworks, or orchestration tools
  • Experience with backend systems, cloud environments, observability, or production support
  • Exposure to fintech, crypto, customer support systems, operations workflows, or risk/compliance processes

    •  

    What Makes You a Fit for Tech Seeds 2026

    You are self-driven, AI-native, and practical. You learn fast, like solving real problems, and are excited to turn new ideas into working systems. You do not wait to be told every step: you explore, test, iterate, and improve.

Binance is a leading global blockchain ecosystem behind the world’s largest cryptocurrency exchange by trading volume and registered users. We are trusted by over 230 million people in 100+ countries for our industry-leading security, user fund transparency, trading engine speed, deep liquidity, and an unmatched portfolio of digital-asset products. Binance offerings range from trading and finance to education, research, payments, institutional services, Web3 features, and more. We leverage the power of digital assets and blockchain to build an inclusive financial ecosystem to advance the freedom of money and improve financial access for people around the world.

About the Pioneer Talent Program 
Are you an early-career professional ready to kickstart your career in the dynamic world of blockchain? Binance’s Pioneer Talent Program is designed to nurture ambitious individuals like you. The program offers full-time roles where participants will gain hands-on expertise via a tailored training curriculum and personalized 1:1 mentorship from industry leaders. Dive behind the scenes of the world’s leading blockchain ecosystem while building the skills to thrive in Web3. Launch your career with purpose—join us in shaping the future of digital innovation.  

Who May Apply
Candidates with up to 5 years of relevant work experience


About the Role
Engineering teams lose hours every week to repetitive tasks, context-switching, and hunting for the right information. We're fixing that — by building an internal AI platform that makes every developer sharper, faster, and less blocked. You'll be on the small team making this happen. That means real ownership, fast feedback loops, and the satisfaction of seeing your work used by engineers every single day. If you're someone who loves building things that actually get used — this is for you.

The program offers full-time roles where participants will gain hands-on expertise via a tailored training curriculum and personalized 1:1 mentorship from industry leaders. Who May Apply

About the Role

Engineering teams lose hours every week to repetitive tasks, context-switching, and hunting for the right information. We're fixing that — by building an internal AI platform that makes every developer sharper, faster, and less blocked. You'll be on the small team making this happen. That means real ownership, fast feedback loops, and the satisfaction of seeing your work used by engineers every single day. If you're someone who loves building things that actually get used — this is for you.

lists.content:
• Design and build internal AI productivity tools that engineers actually reach for — coding assistants, knowledge retrieval systems, and workflow automation
  • Develop LLM-powered applications for real engineering use cases: code generation, code understanding, and test automation
  • Integrate AI capabilities across the full software development lifecycle, from requirements all the way through to deployment
  • Embed with engineering teams to uncover bottlenecks and ship AI-driven solutions that remove real friction
  • Experiment with and implement techniques like Prompt Engineering, RAG (Retrieval-Augmented Generation), and AI Agents
  • Stay close to the frontier — continuously evaluate emerging AI technologies and adopt what genuinely moves the needle

• Bachelor's degree or above in Computer Science or a related field
  • Less than 5 years of experience post-graduate (to qualify for PTP program)
  • Strong programming skills in at least one language (e.g., Python, Java, Go, JavaScript)
  • Solid understanding of data structures and algorithms
  • A working understanding of large language models (LLMs) and how they can be applied practically
  • You've used AI tools like ChatGPT, Copilot, or similar — and you've thought about how to use them better
  • Familiarity with backend or web development fundamentals
  • Comfortable working with APIs and integrating systems together
  • You take ownership — you see a problem, you go fix it, and you follow through
  • Clear communicator who works well with others and knows when to ask for help

• Hands-on experience with Prompt Engineering, RAG, or AI Agents
  • Experience building AI tools, developer tools, or internal platforms
  • Exposure to DevOps, CI/CD, or engineering automation
  • Experience with knowledge systems, search systems, or documentation platforms
  • Open-source contributions or an active GitHub portfolio

About the Role
As AI capabilities rapidly evolve, we are building a unified AI-powered productivity platform to transform how engineering work gets done across the organization.
In this role, you will design and deliver AI tools, systems, and workflows that augment developers, streamline processes, and significantly boost engineering efficiency and quality. You will work at the intersection of AI and software engineering, turning cutting-edge AI capabilities into practical, high-impact internal solutions.

About the Role

As AI capabilities rapidly evolve, we are building a unified AI-powered productivity platform to transform how engineering work gets done across the organization.

In this role, you will design and deliver AI tools, systems, and workflows that augment developers, streamline processes, and significantly boost engineering efficiency and quality. You will work at the intersection of AI and software engineering, turning cutting-edge AI capabilities into practical, high-impact internal solutions.

lists.content:
• Design and build internal AI productivity tools (e.g., coding assistants, knowledge retrieval systems, workflow automation tools)
  • Develop LLM-powered applications for engineering use cases such as code generation, code understanding, and test generation
  • Integrate AI capabilities into the end-to-end software development lifecycle (from requirements to deployment)
  • Partner with engineering teams to identify bottlenecks and deliver AI-driven solutions
  • Experiment with and implement techniques such as Prompt Engineering, RAG (Retrieval-Augmented Generation), and AI Agents
  • Continuously evaluate and adopt emerging AI technologies to enhance internal platforms

• Bachelor’s degree or above in Computer Science or a related field
  • Strong programming skills in at least one language (e.g., Python, Java, Go, JavaScript)
  • Solid understanding of data structures and algorithms
  • Basic understanding of large language models (LLMs) and their practical applications
  • Experience using AI tools such as ChatGPT, Copilot, or similar
  • Familiarity with backend or web development fundamentals
  • Understanding of APIs and system integration
  • Strong problem-solving skills and a proactive, ownership-driven mindset
  • Good communication and collaboration skills

• Hands-on experience with Prompt Engineering, RAG, or AI Agents
  • Experience building AI tools, developer tools, or internal platforms
  • Exposure to DevOps, CI/CD, or engineering automation
  • Experience with knowledge systems, search systems, or documentation platforms
  • Contributions to open-source projects or active GitHub portfolio

About the Role
We are seeking an Applied Data Scientist to join our Algorithm team — a hands-on builder at the intersection of LLM systems, agentic AI, and crypto-native intelligence.
You will design, build, and improve AI agents that understand markets, reason over on-chain data, and take actions at speed for hundreds of millions of users — across reasoning models that plan before they act, multi-agent systems that orchestrate complex crypto workflows, and test-time scaling that pushes inference-time intelligence to its limits.
You build for real environments: designing agent architectures, improving performance across quality and latency, developing evaluation methods for open-ended tasks, and turning research ideas into production.

About the Role

We are seeking an Applied Data Scientist to join our Algorithm team — a hands-on builder at the intersection of LLM systems, agentic AI, and crypto-native intelligence.

You will design, build, and improve AI agents that understand markets, reason over on-chain data, and take actions at speed for hundreds of millions of users — across reasoning models that plan before they act, multi-agent systems that orchestrate complex crypto workflows, and test-time scaling that pushes inference-time intelligence to its limits.

You build for real environments: designing agent architectures, improving performance across quality and latency, developing evaluation methods for open-ended tasks, and turning research ideas into production.

lists.content:
• Design and implement production-grade LLM pipelines powering Binance AI Products and next-generation agentic trading features — including multi-step reasoning agents, tool-selection frameworks, and autonomous workflow execution across spot, perpetual, and on-chain markets
  • Continuously improve agent capabilities in understanding, reasoning, tool selection, and action execution — optimizing simultaneously for intelligence, latency, and reliability under high-frequency trading constraints
  • Build and maintain evaluation frameworks for reasoning model outputs in crypto contexts — covering market analysis accuracy, agent decision quality, hallucination detection, and adversarial robustness against prompt injection in financial workflows
  • Apply test-time scaling techniques — chain-of-thought, self-consistency, process reward models — to push agent reasoning quality in ambiguous, fast-moving market conditions
  • Architect AI system components with rigorous attention to inference latency, throughput, and cost efficiency — leveraging serving frameworks such as vLLM and TensorRT-LLM — in a zero-downtime, 24/7 trading environment
  • Integrate on-chain data sources, wallet intelligence, and crypto market signals into LLM-powered analytical pipelines — building the data layer that makes Binance's agents genuinely crypto-native
  • Partner with research scientists to translate experimental findings into production-grade agentic solutions with clear performance benchmarks

• Bachelor's or Master's degree in Computer Science, Electrical Engineering, Statistics, Mathematics, or related technical field
  • 0–5 years of industry or research experience in applied ML or AI engineering
  • Strong Python programming skills ;  Equally important: demonstrated comfort with vibe coding — using AI-assisted development tools fluidly as core part of your workflow
  • Demonstrated hands-on experience with LLMs — prompt engineering, post-training, or end-to-end LLM application development
  • Familiarity with multi-agent system design — task decomposition, tool use via MCP, memory management, parallel agent execution, and inter-agent communication
  • Strong analytical thinking and problem decomposition; comfortable operating under ambiguity in fast-moving environments

lists.content:
• Manage the trading systems on the backend portal that configures and controls trading logic.
  • Translate complex business requirements into clear technical product specifications for engineering implementation.
  • Work closely with engineering teams to deliver system improvements with high accuracy, stability, and scalability.
  • Manage key trading logic configurations, examples like contract parameters, leverage/margin rules, liquidation, funding- rates, and risk limits.
  • Partner with Trading Risk, Product Operations, and Business stakeholders to ensure system updates/enhancements are safe, compliant, and well-governed.
  • Monitor system performance and incidents, support troubleshooting, and drive continuous optimization of internal workflows and controls.

• Bachelors, Masters/PHD degree in Mathematics, Quantitative Finance, Financial Engineering, Computer Science, Statistics, or related quant fields.
  • Less than 5 years of experience (including internships), ideally in trading systems, backend product, fintech, quant, or platform roles.
  • Strong understanding of trading fundamentals such as order book mechanics, margin, leverage, liquidation, PnL, and risk management concepts.
  • Strong logical thinking and ability to work with complex mathematical models and system rules.
  • Comfortable working with data and technical teams; experience with SQL/Python/Excel is a strong plus.
  • Bilingual English/Mandarin is required to be able to coordinate with overseas partners and stakeholders.

About the Role
We are seeking a Research Data Scientist who combines rigorous research thinking with a drive to see findings land in production. You will conduct original research in generative AI and LLMs applied to crypto-native problems — spanning reasoning under uncertainty, agent reliability in adversarial financial environments, and multi-modal market intelligence.
This is a research-first role at the intersection of three critical frontiers: post-training alignment and reasoning for financial agents, efficient inference and test-time scaling, and multi-agent coordination in open, adversarial environments. The goal is real-world impact — not just papers, but agents that trade, analyze, and act for millions of users.
You formulate research questions, design rigorous experiments, build evaluation frameworks, and collaborate with engineers to bring research into production.

About the Role

We are seeking a Research Data Scientist who combines rigorous research thinking with a drive to see findings land in production. You will conduct original research in generative AI and LLMs applied to crypto-native problems — spanning reasoning under uncertainty, agent reliability in adversarial financial environments, and multi-modal market intelligence.

This is a research-first role at the intersection of three critical frontiers: post-training alignment and reasoning for financial agents, efficient inference and test-time scaling, and multi-agent coordination in open, adversarial environments. The goal is real-world impact — not just papers, but agents that trade, analyze, and act for millions of users.

You formulate research questions, design rigorous experiments, build evaluation frameworks, and collaborate with engineers to bring research into production.

lists.content:
• Conduct original research in generative AI and large language models applied to crypto and financial domains — with focus areas including reasoning under market uncertainty, alignment of trading agents, multi-agent coordination, and test-time scaling for time-critical decisions

  • Design and execute rigorous experiments — formulating clear hypotheses, implementing model and training variants including RLVR-based reasoning approaches, running systematic ablations, and drawing statistically sound conclusions

  • Develop novel post-training methodologies and evaluation frameworks for LLMs operating in crypto contexts — covering chain-of-thought quality for market analysis, agent decision consistency, and robustness against adversarial prompt injection

  • Research test-time scaling techniques — process reward models, self-consistency, Monte Carlo Tree Search-based planning — and apply them to improve agent reasoning quality in ambiguous, fast-moving market conditions

  • Critically track developments across the research community at NeurIPS, ICML, ICLR, ACL, and crypto-adjacent venues — identifying high-leverage opportunities to apply state-of-the-art techniques to Binance's unique challenges

• Master's or PhD in Machine Learning, Computer Science, Mathematics, Statistics, or related field strongly preferred; exceptional Bachelor's candidates with demonstrable research output will be considered

  • 0–5 years of research or industry experience in ML/AI; strong academic lab or research internship experience equally valued

  • Deep understanding of transformer architectures, large language model pretraining dynamics, and post-training methodology — including the shift from RLHF toward RLVR-based reasoning model training

  • Proficiency in Python and PyTorch, Critically, you work in an AI-native way — using vibe coding practices with tools like Claude Code, Cursor, or Copilot Workspace as your primary development workflow

  • Rigorous mathematical foundations: linear algebra, probability theory, information theory, stochastic processes, and numerical optimization

  • Bilingual English/Mandarin is required to be able to coordinate with overseas partners and stakeholders

We are trusted by over 230 million people in 100+ countries for our industry-leading security, user fund transparency, trading engine speed, deep liquidity, and an unmatched portfolio of digital-asset products. Binance offerings range from trading and finance to education, research, payments, institutional services, Web3 features, and more. We leverage the power of digital assets and blockchain to build an inclusive financial ecosystem to advance the freedom of money and improve financial access for people around the world.

About the Pioneer Talent Program 
Are you an early-career professional ready to kickstart your career in the dynamic world of blockchain? Binance’s Pioneer Talent Program is designed to nurture ambitious individuals like you. The program offers full-time roles where participants will gain hands-on expertise via a tailored training curriculum and personalized 1:1 mentorship from industry leaders. Dive behind the scenes of the world’s leading blockchain ecosystem while building the skills to thrive in Web3. Launch your career with purpose—join us in shaping the future of digital innovation.  

Who May Apply
Candidates with up to 5 years of relevant work experience
job_detail_fetch.descriptionBody:
About the Role

We are seeking a Research Data Scientist who combines rigorous research thinking with a drive to see findings land in production. You will conduct original research in generative AI and LLMs applied to crypto-native problems — spanning reasoning under uncertainty, agent reliability in adversarial financial environments, and multi-modal market intelligence.

This is a research-first role at the intersection of three critical frontiers: post-training alignment and reasoning for financial agents, efficient inference and test-time scaling, and multi-agent coordination in open, adversarial environments. The goal is real-world impact — not just papers, but agents that trade, analyze, and act for millions of users.

You formulate research questions, design rigorous experiments, build evaluation frameworks, and collaborate with engineers to bring research into production.

Binance is a leading global blockchain ecosystem behind the world’s largest cryptocurrency exchange by trading volume and registered users. We are trusted by 300+ million people in 100+ countries for our industry-leading security, user fund transparency, trading engine speed, deep liquidity, and an unmatched portfolio of digital-asset products. Binance offerings range from trading and finance to education, research, payments, institutional services, Web3 features, and more. We leverage the power of digital assets and blockchain to build an inclusive financial ecosystem to advance the freedom of money and improve financial access for people around the world.


About the Role
As a Backend Engineer - Blockchain Security at Binance, you will focus on the security of blockchain projects across the BNB Smart Chain (BSC) as well as other chains. It is a unique opportunity to contribute to the field and contribute to the blockchain community.
 
You will work hand-in-hand with various talented workers from Binance on the cutting-edge of crypto to guard safety across many projects and systems. You will also coordinate with other teams aside from the security group, which could provide you an in-depth understanding of the crypto world.

About the Role
As a Backend Engineer - Blockchain Security at Binance, you will focus on the security of blockchain projects across the BNB Smart Chain (BSC) as well as other chains. It is a unique opportunity to contribute to the field and contribute to the blockchain community.
 
You will work hand-in-hand with various talented workers from Binance on the cutting-edge of crypto to guard safety across many projects and systems. You will also coordinate with other teams aside from the security group, which could provide you an in-depth understanding of the crypto world.

lists.content:
• Responsible for security related products planning and design, establishing the technical road-map, and completing the construction and coding implementation of important modules and core frameworks.
  • Define and implement architecture standards and best practices, responsible for underlying infrastructure / architecture maintenance, develop / maintain tools that automate operational activities and improve engineering productivity, provide automated continuous delivery and on-demand capacity management solutions.
  • Responsible for direct user requirements engagement, forming corresponding APIs for client delivery, and maintaining customer relationships. Continuously improve customer satisfaction.
  • Identify and solve technical issues in back-end systems, ensuring system performance and stability.
  • Performance tuning, online incidents troubleshooting, and system refactoring, optimize the products to maximize speed and scale.
  • Design and build libraries and frameworks that will be further used by internal clients, speed up development efficiency and improve code quality.

• Currently enrolled or holding a bachelor's degree (or higher) in Computer Science or a related field.
  • At least 4-5 years of full stack development experience in a similar role supporting large scale production systems, preferably 2-3 years in the Crypto or Security space.
  • Extensive knowledge of full product development life cycle, have experience involving various stages, with demonstrated programming skills in Java, Python, Go or similar.
  • Familiar with mainstream development frameworks, common distributed system components, caching, messaging, and other mechanisms.
  • Capable of independent system design, with experience in designing, developing, and tuning large-scale distributed, high-concurrency, and high-availability systems.
  • Possessing business understanding ability, able to identify problems in business requirements and system architecture design, and provide effective solutions.
  • Strong coordination and communication skills, capable of coping with stress, and quickly learning new knowledge.

• Have experience working in Web3 security companies and developed large-scale API / Monitoring systems.
  • Experience with risk control products and relevant experience in developing risk control APIs.
  • Basic understanding of common Smart Contract security vulnerabilities, Current on-chain incidents and Wallet Security.
  • Basic understanding of blockchain and smart contract principles, experienced with reading Blockchain explorers and creating scripts to track and scan data. Well versed with the different types of hacks on wallets and blockchain, including smart contracts, and its common attack vectors.

lists.content:
• Identify, assess, and mitigate risks for listed tokens by implementing risk control frameworks to ensure project and operational security.
  • Conduct root cause analysis using both on-chain and off-chain analytics to investigate incidents and deliver data-driven solutions.
  • Manage project requests from external partners (e.g., rebranding, token swaps, mainnet integration, airdrops).
  • Handle operational requests (e.g., legal agreements, risk control systems, bot enhancements).
  • Oversee project implementation to ensure successful delivery, including stakeholder management and adherence to SOP stages.
  • Optimize structures and processes to improve request management and execution.

• Hands-on experience with on-chain data analysis and a strong understanding of blockchain ecosystems and tokenomics.
  • Proficient in data querying languages such as SQL and Python, and experienced with analytics tools like Dune, Flipside, and Nansen.
  • Excellent communication and stakeholder management skills, including negotiation, conflict resolution, and effective teamwork.
  • High level of integrity, ownership, and resilience in fast-paced, high-stakes environments.

lists.content:
• Incident Handling
  • Support projects during major incidents (e.g. hacking/security incidents, collapse of CEX, etc)
  • Identify root cause and assess impact of incident on Binance and Projects
  • Work with internal BUs and external project to minimize impact

  • Research and Risk Management
  • Conduct review on performance of listed tokens
  • Understand quantitative and qualitative metrics use in reviewing tokens – e.g. product adoption metrics, on-chain metrics, project development, community sentiments, etc
  • Identify risks associated with tokens
  • Recommend and implement measures on based on risks associated with token
  • Evaluate requests from listed projects (rebrand, mainnet integration, swap, etc) 
  • Write concise reports on risks identified, requests and incidents
  • Drive initiatives to improve risk detection and risk mitigation

  • Operations
  • Onboard new listings (e.g. gather key info, prepare for trading)
  • Liaise with all parties to facilitate operational requests by listed tokens (e.g. airdrop, cross chain swap, old to new swap, etc)
  • Optimize process/SOP

• 5-9 years of proven success (research or consulting experience is relevant)
  • Critical thinker and able to grasp key principles & identify root causes
  • Analytical and structured
  • Strong interpersonal skills, including negotiation
  • Good crypto knowledge
  • Driven, self-starter and able to evaluate risks and rewards of different decisions

We are looking for motivated and enthusiastic PR KOL BD individuals to join our dynamic team. This is a fantastic opportunity for a young, fresh graduate with strong communication skills to gain hands-on experience in public relations and influencer management within the fast-paced crypto industry.

As a PR KOL BD member, you will assist in building and maintaining relationships with KOLs, support event coordination, and help manage communications during critical situations. You will be the face of our brand at KOL events and play a key role in ensuring smooth collaboration and positive public perception.

If you are passionate about communication, eager to learn, and ready to contribute to a leading crypto company, we would love to hear from you!

We are looking for motivated and enthusiastic PR KOL BD individuals to join our dynamic team. This is a fantastic opportunity for a young, fresh graduate with strong communication skills to gain hands-on experience in public relations and influencer management within the fast-paced crypto industry.

As a PR KOL BD member, you will assist in building and maintaining relationships with KOLs, support event coordination, and help manage communications during critical situations. If you are passionate about communication, eager to learn, and ready to contribute to a leading crypto company, we would love to hear from you!

lists.content:
• Assist in identifying and engaging KOLs aligned with our brand values.
  • Support the PR team in organizing and attending KOL events, meetings, and networking activities.
  • Act as a liaison between the company and KOLs, ensuring timely and professional communication.
  • Help manage crisis communications and support resolution efforts with KOLs during sensitive situations.
  • Prepare and deliver clear, concise updates and reports on KOL activities and public sentiment.
  • Collaborate with cross-functional teams to align KOL strategies with overall PR goals.
  • Maintain a professional and presentable image as a representative of the company.

• Recent graduate or final-year student in Communications, Marketing, Public Relations, or related fields.
  • Fluency in English is required to be able to coordinate with overseas partners and stakeholders. Additional languages would be an advantage.
  • Strong interpersonal skills with the ability to build rapport and maintain professional relationships.
  • Presentable, confident, and comfortable attending events and engaging with influencers.
  • Proactive, detail-oriented, and able to work effectively in a fast-paced environment.
  • Interest in the crypto/blockchain industry is a plus but not mandatory.
  • Ability to handle sensitive situations calmly and professionally.

Binance is a leading global blockchain ecosystem behind the world’s largest cryptocurrency exchange by trading volume and registered users. We are trusted by 300+ million people in 100+ countries for our industry-leading security, user fund transparency, trading engine speed, deep liquidity, and an unmatched portfolio of digital-asset products. We are looking for a motivated and personable Public Relations Specialist to join our growing PR & Communications team in Singapore. This role focuses on building and maintaining strategic relationships with key industry voices, content creators, and community leaders — supporting Binance's brand presence and communications initiatives across the APAC market.

lists.content:
• Support the end-to-end management of external partner relationships — including outreach, onboarding, ongoing engagement, and performance tracking 
  • Support the coordination and execution of partner events, media engagements, and networking activities within APAC
  • Serve as a day-to-day point of contact for external partners, ensuring professional and timely communication at all times
  • Assist in crisis communications and stakeholder management during sensitive situations, maintaining composure and discretion
  • Track and report on partner activity, audience sentiment, and campaign performance — delivering clear, concise updates to internal stakeholders
  • Collaborate with marketing, product, and regional teams to align partnership strategies with broader PR and communications objectives
  • Represent the company professionally at events and public-facing engagements

• Recent graduate or final-year student in Communications, Marketing, Public Relations, or a related discipline
  • Fluency in English is required to be able to coordinate with overseas partners and stakeholders. Additional languages would be an advantage.
  • Strong interpersonal and relationship-building skills — comfortable engaging with public figures, media personalities, and community leaders
  • Presentable, confident, and at ease in event and networking settings
  • Proactive, detail-oriented, and able to manage multiple priorities in a fast-paced environment
  • Genuine interest in the crypto/Web3/blockchain industry is a strong plus
  • Ability to handle sensitive or confidential matters with professionalism and discretion

lists.content:
• Support vendor onboarding, including vendor creation, vendor due diligence (VDD) review, documentation, and regular compliance checks to ensure readiness for internal audits and regulatory reviews.
  • Assist with daily procurement operations across indirect categories (e.g., technology, professional services, marketing, HR, legal, etc.), ensuring adherence to company procurement policies and procedures.
  • Manage the vendor lifecycle, including RFP/RFQ processes, vendor selection, assessment, and ongoing performance reviews.
  • Lead negotiations with vendors based on product and market information, covering price, quantity, delivery plans, SLAs, and guide the contract signing and follow-up processes.
  • Assist in knowledge sharing and training initiatives to strengthen procurement awareness and compliance across the organization.
  • Contribute to process optimization efforts to improve efficiency, transparency, and compliance in procurement operations.
  • Support data analysis, invoice validation, process initiation, and procurement documentation tracking to ensure timely and accurate information flow.

• Bachelor’s degree or higher.
  • Strong bilingual communication skills in English and Mandarin, with the ability to effectively engage vendors and internal stakeholders across regions.
  • Minimum of 1 year hands-on experience in indirect procurement; additional exposure to Compliance, Marketing, Technology, or Professional Services is a plus.
  • Drive procurement efficiency by understanding contract terms, maintaining a strong focus on process and cost, and collaborating effectively with cross-functional teams to ensure smooth execution, compliance, and timely issue resolution.
  • In-depth knowledge of the Source-to-Pay (S2P) process and Vendor Assessment procedures.
  • Ability to manage multiple concurrent projects, demonstrating strong communication, organizational, time management, and problem-solving skills.
  • Highly user-focused with a strong sense of ownership to understand business needs and deliver impactful solutions.
  • Results-oriented with a strong delivery mindset; able to work independently and collaborate effectively with global stakeholders.
  • Ability to thrive in a fast-paced, dynamic, and challenging environment.
  • Market-sensitive with strong negotiation skills, capable of identifying opportunities and securing favorable outcomes.
  • Candidates with backgrounds in FinTech, Financial Services, or consulting firms are highly encouraged to apply.

lists.content:
• Work with Product Managers and Engineers to develop, implement, and refine design processes that support rapid iteration across equities trading products.
  • Create globally appealing, user-friendly designs for core trading features including market data display, order placement, portfolio management, and IPO/new stock subscription flows.
  • Lead financial data visualization design (candlestick charts, order book depth, price movement) that balances professional utility with everyday readability.
  • Conduct user research and partner with Product Managers to drive design solutions by leveraging qualitative and quantitative customer insights.
  • Deliver detailed, robust UI/UX design solutions and maintain a high-quality, consistent product experience across iOS, Android, and Web.
  • Contribute to the design system by building and maintaining equities-specific components (chart components, order forms, compliance disclosure patterns).

• Web3 / Crypto / Fintech / Brokerage / Securities work experience preferred; hands-on knowledge of equities trading mechanics (order types, market rules, trading sessions) is a plus.
  • Educational background: degree in HCI, Graphic Design, Visual Arts, or a related field.
  • Proficient in Figma; experience with design systems and multi-platform design (iOS / Android / Web).
  • Communication skills: strong verbal and written communication skills; able to clearly articulate design decisions to cross-functional stakeholders.
  • Open to learning and constructive feedback.
  • Bilingual English/Mandarin is required to be able to coordinate with overseas partners and stakeholders.

lists.content:
• Lead the design of BNDS (Binance Design System): Iterate on the foundational framework and core components, optimize relevant state logic, and ensure compatibility with multiple platforms and real business scenario requirements.
  • Build and maintain the BNDS documentation system and asset library: Include component usage rules, interaction specifications, and explanations of related Design Tokens. Ensure efficient reuse by business designers and R&D teams to reduce cross-team collaboration costs.
  • Deeply adapt design solutions to business scenarios: Address user pain points through designs for microinteractions and other related motion effects, enhancing user trust, operational fluency, and overall user experience.
  • Drive design implementation through cross-functional collaboration: Align with frontend/architecture engineers on technical implementation plans for components, resolving detailed issues in the "design-development" handoff (e.g., component responsive logic, state switching compatibility). Collaborate with the marketing team to ensure BNDS aligns with Binance’s global brand visual language while meeting regional compliance requirements (e.g., multi-language typography, RTL (Right-to-Left) layouts).
  • Empower designers across the company: Convey BNDS design thinking and usage standards through design training, workshops, and case studies. Collect feedback from designers in various business lines, and iterate on BNDS using data (e.g., component adoption rates, user experience research results) to improve the system’s practicality and coverage.

• 3+ years of experience in design systems: Must have cases of building a product-level design system from scratch or optimizing an existing one. Familiar with multi-platform design guidelines (Apple HIG, Google Material Design) and capable of independently managing the full process of component design from concept to implementation.
  • Proficiency in Figma: Skilled in using Components, Variables, Auto Layout, and Variants. Ability to build component libraries that support reuse across multiple scenarios.
  • Understanding of Web3/blockchain product design: Comprehend trading workflows, relevant business operation logic, and wallet interaction rules. Ability to translate blockchain business logic into clear design solutions.
  • Attention to user experience details: Familiar with accessibility design standards (e.g., WCAG 2.2). Consider the needs of diverse users (e.g., screen reader adaptation for visually impaired users) in component design, while balancing the security and usability of financial products.
  • Systems thinking: Ability to move beyond "one-off design" to focus on "global reusability," with consideration for component scalability and compatibility.
  • Cross-team communication skills: Ability to clearly align goals with designers, R&D, product, and marketing teams. Convey design logic in concise language and drive consensus.
  • Attention to detail and execution ability: Maintain strict standards for design precision and interaction logic details. Deliver high-quality design system results on time in the fast-paced blockchain industry.
  • Learning agility: Proactively track Web3 design trends and industry practices for design systems, and quickly integrate new insights into BNDS optimization.
  • Design experience/case studies in relevant businesses such as crypto exchanges/platforms or blockchain wallets. Understanding of the blockchain ecosystem and ability to directly grasp core business scenarios.
  • Experience in building design systems.
  • Fluency in English is required to be able to coordinate with overseas partners and stakeholders. Additional languages would be an advantage.
  • Experience collaborating with remote/distributed teams (adaptive to a global work model).
  • Able to understand front-end development processes and collaborate effectively with front-end or infrastructure engineers. Familiarity with HTML and CSS is a plus.
  • Ability to communicate efficiently with frontend engineers on component implementation details to prevent design solutions from being unfeasible due to technical constraints.
  • Familiarity with applying AI in Design Systems, including leveraging AI tools to accelerate component creation, documentation, and design-to-code workflows, as well as improving consistency and scalability.
  • Hands-on experience creating motion and animations for UI components, with a strong understanding of interaction design, timing, and usability, and the ability to collaborate with engineers for implementation.

lists.content:
• Own and drive the full product design lifecycle from discovery to final hand-off, including research, wireframing, prototyping, and high-fidelity UI design.
  • Design intuitive, engaging user experiences for web and mobile platforms that integrate crypto trading, community feeds, and live features.
  • Collaborate closely with product managers, development teams and business stakeholders to implement and refine design solutions.
  • Participate in design reviews, providing expert insights and constructive feedback to enhance product design.
  • Stay up to date on trends in crypto, social apps, and livestreaming to inform product innovation and continuously elevate design quality and creativity.

• At least 5 years of experience in product design, preferably within the crypto, social media, or livestreaming industries.
  • Proficient in design tools such as Figma, Sketch, and Adobe XD, with hands-on experience using prototyping tools like Principle and Axure.

• Highly Relevant Experience: Background in similar products ensures zero learning curve and immediate productivity.

lists.content:
• Responsible for product planning, function optimization and version iteration of the independent PC client application, driving the product transformation to the top 1 PC client application in the industry. 
  • In-depth understanding of usage scenarios, behavior patterns and core demands of professional traders, with special focus on the experience and feedback of high-value users.
  • Formulate product optimization directions based on market research, user interviews and competitive analysis to enhance product competitiveness in the professional trading field.
  • Coordinate design, R&D, testing, operation and relevant product teams to promote the implementation of complex requirements and connect resources across business lines.
  • Leverage AI tools to develop high-quality PRD, flowcharts, prototypes, function specifications and launch plans to ensure fast deliveries and in-time iterations. 
  • Track product data, user feedback and online issues, continuously optimize product experience, and improve stability, usability and professionalism.

• Bachelor’s degree or above; majors in Computer Science, Finance, Engineering, Mathematics, Economics or related fields are preferred.
  • 5+ years of experience as a product manager; experience in trading, fintech, securities firms, trading systems or professional financial tools is preferred.
  • Deep understanding of trading product logic, familiar with core demands, usage habits and typical scenarios of professional trading users.
  • Bilingual English/Mandarin is required to be able to coordinate with overseas partners and stakeholders.
  • Strong sense of ownership, able to proactively connect cross-business lines and drive complex projects to deliver results.

• Experience in professional trading terminals, order systems, market data systems or high-frequency trading products.
  • Experience in desktop software, standalone clients or multi-terminal collaborative products.

• Own and drive wallet product development, with a focus on core wallet infrastructure, including key management, transaction construction and signing, and DeFi integrations

  • Ensure timely and high-quality delivery of products and releases
  • Track and drive development and testing progress

  • Proven experience leading large-scale product design and delivery from concept to launch
  • Strong market intuition and data-driven mindset, with the ability to quickly translate insights into actionable product solutions and drive execution
  • Excellent communication skills in English and Mandarin
  • Passion for emerging technologies and innovation, with an entrepreneurial mindset and strong execution ability in a fast-evolving industry
• Experience in AI + Web3 products (e.g., Agent, automation, intelligent execution)

lists.content:
• Drive the end-to-end delivery and iteration of DeFi data capabilities within the Web3 wallet, independently driving requirement definition, execution, and release
  • Track DeFi trends, protocols, and competitors, maintain the protocol integration roadmap, and analyse value assessment and prioritization
  • Manage end-to-end delivery for protocol integrations and multi-chain expansion, define priorities and scope, align data definitions and acceptance criteria, and drive integration through launch
  • Drive cross-team adoption of shared data capabilities across business scenarios, document and align data definitions and onboarding standards, and ensure integrations meet quality benchmarks
  • Build user feedback loops and a metrics framework, track protocol coverage, data accuracy, and stability, and continuously improve user experience and operational efficiency

• 3–5 years of product management experience; experience in blockchain, DeFi, or fintech products is a plus
  • Solid understanding of DeFi protocol mechanics, with systematic knowledge of AMMs, lending, LSD/LRT, and staking, and the ability to apply them to metric definition and product design
  • Familiar with on-chain data and definitions, including transaction structures, contract calls, and event logs; understand common token types and identify key protocol-level field and definition differences
  • Strong data product mindset and engineering collaboration skills, with foundational technical understanding and the ability to align solutions with engineering and data teams, drive delivery, and close the loop through acceptance
  • Strong execution and communication skills, able to manage multiple workstreams, break down milestones, identify dependencies and risks, and deliver on schedule; proficient in English and Mandarin Chinese to collaborate with international stakeholders
  • Proficient in using AI tools to improve efficiency and quality; proactively identify product/business use cases for AI and drive practical implementation and continuous iteration/optimization

• Proficient in SQL or data querying tools, able to independently validate and analyze data and communicate insights
  • Hands-on Web3 on-chain experience, familiar with swaps, staking, and providing liquidity, and able to independently verify on-chain actions and reproduce issues
  • Experience with analytics platforms such as Sensors Data or DataWind, with understanding of A/B testing processes and evaluation methods

lists.content:
• Own BFUSD and the broader structured Earn product portfolio end-to-end, covering stablecoin yield and options-linked products across strategy, roadmap, operations, and continuous iteration
  • Drive product growth through data: track and optimize core metrics including TVL, APY competitiveness, user retention, and conversion

  • Deep, hands-on understanding of crypto yield mechanisms and trading strategies, including funding rate arbitrage, perpetuals, options, and structured earn products
  • Proven ability to take full end-to-end ownership of a product in a fast-paced environment, with a strong sense of accountability and execution
  • Strong analytical skills with the ability to interpret data and translate insights into impactful product decisions
  • Excellent communication, coordination, and stakeholder management skills, with a track record of driving complex cross-functional projects to completion

About the Pioneer Talent Program 
Are you an early-career professional ready to kickstart your career in the dynamic world of blockchain? Binance’s Pioneer Talent Program is designed to nurture ambitious individuals like you. The program offers full-time roles where participants will gain hands-on expertise via a tailored training curriculum and personalized 1:1 mentorship from industry leaders. Dive behind the scenes of the world’s leading blockchain ecosystem while building the skills to thrive in Web3. Launch your career with purpose—join us in shaping the future of digital innovation.  

Who May Apply
Candidates with up to 5 years of relevant work experience

• Responsible for product operations for margin trading.

• Bachelor’s degree with up to 5 years of relevant experience in trading related roles.

  • Excellent problem-solving and analytical skills.Good understanding of financial and blockchain trading business.
  • Strong critical thinking, communication skills, self-drive, and ability to learn quickly.
  • Responsible, self-motivated, and able to work effectively under pressure.

lists.content:
• Responsible for middle office and operations within the derivatives business unit.
  • Support the calibration of trading parameters and define product specifications.
  • Implement and oversee structured workflows, processes, and frameworks to align with business goals across regional and global teams.
  • Identify process bottlenecks and generate optimization ideas and solutions for daily operational tasks.
  • Drive innovation by leveraging internal tools (AI, automation, and technical solutions) to streamline processes and improve operational efficiency.
  • Respond to, investigate, and resolve operational issues in a timely and independent manner.

• Bachelor’s degree with at least 3 years of relevant experience in finance (experience in crypto-native derivatives or trading is preferred).
  • Strong problem-solving and analytical skills, with the ability to identify, understand, and address operational and technical issues.
  • Proven project/Process management experience, with the ability to bridge technical and business domains.
  • Good understanding of derivatives product logic and risk data, particularly in calibrating trading parameters and defining product specifications.
  • Ability to multitask and work under pressure, effectively prioritizing tasks based on business needs.
  • Self-motivated and able to deliver with minimal supervision, while collaborating effectively within a team.
  • Experience working in a fast-paced, unstructured, and cross-cultural environment with high expectations.
  • Demonstrates a proactive, “can-do” attitude, comfort with ambiguity, and strong attention to detail

• Own the product strategy and roadmap for Staking products — covering native, liquid, and pooled staking — with a focus on protocol integrations, user growth, and revenue contribution

  • Define and manage token strategy, APR pricing models, and project partnership initiatives to strengthen product competitiveness and expand the supported asset universe

  • Deep understanding of staking mechanics: validator economics, liquid staking tokens (LST), APR composition, and on-chain yield infrastructure.

  • Exceptional cross-functional coordination, project management, communication, relationship management, and organizational skills.

  • Strong user insight and innovative thinking, capable of translating user needs into product features

  • Fluent in Mandarin; working-level English for cross-team and partner communication

lists.content:
• Wallet Management:
  • Oversee daily operations of exchange wallets, including deposits, withdrawals.
  •  Monitor blockchain transactions to ensure timely processing and resolve delays or failures
  •  Maintain operational uptime of exchange wallets
  •  Coordinate and complete network upgrades, token events and testing with no issues
    •  
  • Risk Mitigation & Compliance:
  • Collaborate with the security team to respond to incidents and implement safeguards
  • Monitor Internal Alerts and enhance monitoring system to detect security or high risk events and follow up with reactive and preventive measures
    •  
  • Process Optimization:
  • Automate repetitive tasks to improve operational efficiency
  • Analyze transaction data to identify trends and recommend system improvements
  • Analyze competitor product and industry trends to identify potential product/process enhancements
    •  
  • Cross-Functional Collaboration:
  • Work with Customer Support to resolve wallet-related user inquiries
  • Partner with Stakeholders across various departments to solve customer pain-points and enhance our product

• 2+ years in crypto wallet operations, blockchain infrastructure, or a related role
  • Proficiency with blockchain explorers (e.g., Etherscan)
  • Understanding of UTXO, EVM, and multi-signature wallets
  • Excellent problem-solving and communication skills
  • Ability to thrive in a fast-paced, 24/7 crypto environment

lists.content:

  • Deep understanding of programmatic trends, technologies, and best practices
  • Existing relationships with programmatic platforms and networks
  • Ideal to have exposure with AppsFlyer products
  • Strong analytical and reporting skills
  • Experience in crypto, fintech, or online trading platforms
  • Strong APAC-focused programmatic experience

job_detail_fetch.descriptionPlain: Binance is a leading global blockchain ecosystem behind the world’s largest cryptocurrency exchange by trading volume and registered users. We are trusted by 300+ million people in 100+ countries for our industry-leading security, user fund transparency, trading engine speed, deep liquidity, and an unmatched portfolio of digital-asset products. Binance offerings range from trading and finance to education, research, payments, institutional services, Web3 features, and more. We leverage the power of digital assets and blockchain to build an inclusive financial ecosystem to advance the freedom of money and improve financial access for people around the world.

lists.content:
• Work closely with team members (Developers, Product Managers) to develop, test and deliver high quality products.
  • Create detailed, comprehensive and well-structured Automation test plans and test cases.
  • Prevent, analyse and track product defects, performing root cause analysis.
  • Hands-on Automation & slight Manual investigation and reproduction of functional Backend software issues.
  • Investigatory testing of unreleased features including defining requirements, behavior and impact.

• About 5 years+ of Backend QA testing.
  • Have basic technical knowledge related to computers.
  • Full cycle Automation testing from designing tests, developing scripts and execution
  • Experience testing Backend services such as APIs, Databases, distributed services (non-monolithic).
  • Knowledge in Java and Linux - Able to write code & review code.
  • Good test analysis and test method design ability to solve complex quality problems.
  • Experience in Java unit testing.

job_detail_fetch.descriptionPlain:
Binance is a leading global blockchain ecosystem behind the world’s largest cryptocurrency exchange by trading volume and registered users. We are trusted by 300+ million people in 100+ countries for our industry-leading security, user fund transparency, trading engine speed, deep liquidity, and an unmatched portfolio of digital-asset products. Binance offerings range from trading and finance to education, research, payments, institutional services, Web3 features, and more. We leverage the power of digital assets and blockchain to build an inclusive financial ecosystem to advance the freedom of money and improve financial access for people around the world.


This team at Binance delivers a user-friendly interface and seamless trading experiences. We offer great flexibility with a wide range of converted tokens and trade sizes. Our users benefit from various trading services, including guaranteed execution prices with no slippage, the best quotations, algorithm bots, and bespoke assets and products. Join us and be part of a team that enhances the trading journey for millions.

lists.content:
• Engage in the full life cycle of software development, including requirement gathering, design, coding, testing, and deployment.
  • Possess strong technical skills, enabling the delivery of high-quality production code.
  • Collaborate with the convert team to enhance the effectiveness of trading models.
  • Liaise with trading and operations teams to develop new products and improve existing ones.
  • Establish and improve trading system infrastructure to handle large scale positions and orders.
  • Identify system bottlenecks and bugs, and implement solutions to address these issues.
  • Attending to production emergencies.

• Experience in the full lifecycle of project development for Java applications.
  • Strong understanding of software design, architecture, development, and integration.
  • Solid knowledge of event processing models, multi-threading, enterprise integration patterns, web services, and REST.
  • Experience with algorithmic trading systems, investment banks, hedge funds, trading firms, or brokerages is a strong plus.
  • A degree in Computer Science, Engineering, or a Mathematics/Algorithm-related field is a bonus.
  • Flexible with working hours to attend to production emergencies.
  • Fluency in English is required to be able to coordinate with overseas partners and stakeholders.

lists.content:
• Responsible for pricing, risk management and agency trading strategies ideation, design, back-testing, and implementation
  • Interact directly with the development team to ensure a smooth and agile implementation process into the trading platform
  • Participate in all the stages of the development of new products. Including: ideation, modeling, risk management and parameter tuning

• 4+ years of experience in a quantitative researcher/analyst position
  • Master degree or higher in mathematics/statistics or similar relevant area of study required
  • Proven track record of good academic achievement and great learning skills, love to solve challenging problems and work in a fast-paced environment
  • Familiar with at least one programming tool for analysis. Python is strongly preferred
  • Experience with hedge/mutual fund, trading house, brokerage or investment banks is advantageous
  • Familiar with trading data processing, price prediction etc is advantageous
  • Experience with Machine Learning algorithms is advantageous
  • Understanding of DEX trading is advantageous
  • Fluency in English is required to be able to coordinate with overseas partners and stakeholders. Additional languages would be an advantage

• Identify and evaluate partners who will share our vision 
  • Negotiate brand partnerships to meet business goals and objectives
  • Set, build and execute partnership strategy and activation plans 
  • Collaborate with cross-functional and regional teams (brand marketing, comms, insights, design, content, data, product, social media, legal) to set and align on annual plan (e.g., product-market fit, setting goals, budget, channels)
  • Use a data-driven model to set up goals, and evaluate short and long term campaign performances
  • Control complex global budgets and drive ROI 
  • Share thought leadership and market/product intelligence 
  • Guide key regional/local branding teams to positively impact our overall marketing operational excellence
  • Own and lead complex projects and challenges
  • Be proactive, resourceful and action-oriented

• 8+ years of experience in brand partnerships and marketing, including sports, music and/or entertainment partnerships and sponsorships 
  • Excellent project management, strategic planning, relationship building and storytelling abilities
  • Experience managing partners, internal teams and agencies across global projects 
  • Strong grasp of brand culture/vision and partnerships relevance 
  • Creative and data driven mindset 
  • Concise writer and speaker
  • A background in Crypto or an understanding of Web3 Products (NFTs, Fan Tokens) would be a plus 
  • Thrive in a fast-paced environment 
  • High level of intellectual curiosity

lists.content:
• Execute all marketing efforts with a hands-on approach. Work on integrated campaigns, starting with strategy and brief, and work on executing and measuring performance.
  • Constantly work on new content, channels, creatives and other ideas for experimentation, optimization and acquisition growth.
  • Structuring, managing and growing our community via various Local Social Channels. Increase reach, engagement and conversion through social media and content marketing strategies.
  • Moderate local forums, social platforms and chat groups to interact with the community and increase positive engagement.
  • Identify additional avenues to build community, KOL/Affiliates Management.
  • Designing and implementing incentive programs to promote engagement and growth with existing and potential networks.
  • Coordinating inter-department cooperation between the Angels and the Binance team (including BD, Marketing, collecting leads, market research, data requests, etc.).
  • Brainstorming and implementing online/offline event plans and concepts.
  • Management of budgeting, invoicing, liaising and negotiation with vendors for event management, marketing inventory management and program finance management.

• Proven community management experience with strong ownership and emotional intelligence. Strong passion for working in a start-up environment.
  • 2+ years experience launching community initiatives (e.g. building an online forum, launching an ambassador program, creating an event series and writing an email newsletter, managing social media: Instagram, Facebook, Telegram).
  • 1+ year experience in managing online/offline events. Proven track record in managing and engaging communities via Telegram or similar channels.
  • Understanding of cryptocurrency related terminologies and trends.
  • Be able to work flexible and stretched hours to interact with the crypto community as frequently as possible.
  • Fluency in English is required to be able to coordinate with overseas partners and stakeholders. Additional languages would be an advantage.
  • Excellent organizational skills, ability to multitask with great time management skills.

lists.content:
• Provide expert legal guidance on U.S. regulatory and law enforcement expectations, particularly those relating to crypto and financial regulations,  AML, sanctions, securities laws, commodities laws, and other relevant regulatory frameworks.
  • Coordinate with members of the Legal Department and management regarding regulatory litigation matters and relationships with  U.S. government agencies and regulatory bodies.
  • Advise on the company’s response to regulatory investigations, enforcement actions, and compliance reviews, particularly as they relate to and impact  AML and sanctions compliance programs.
  • Communicate with U.S. regulatory agencies, and their agents, ensuring effective communication and collaboration.
  • Provide guidance and counsel in coordination with cross-functional teams to effectively comply with legal obligations.
  • Partner closely with internal stakeholders, including compliance, risk, and business teams, to address complex legal and regulatory matters of significant sensitivity and impact within the U.S. jurisdiction.
  • Provide advice on evolving U.S. regulatory developments affecting the crypto and financial sectors, advising the business on potential risks and compliance strategies.
  • Support regulatory filings, investigations, remediation efforts and enforcement matters as needed.

• Demonstrated expertise assisting with legal issues, including experience with litigation and contentious regulatory matters, preferably involving U.S. financial regulators such as FinCEN, SEC, CFTC, OFAC, and state regulators.
  • Strong knowledge of U.S. AML and sanctions compliance programs, with practical experience supporting or advising on these frameworks.
  • Deep understanding of U.S. financial products, including spot trading, margin trading, futures, and options, especially within the crypto industry.
  • Excellent analytical skills with strong attention to detail and the ability to manage complex legal issues proactively.
  • Proven ability to work independently and collaboratively within cross-functional teams.
  • Exceptional written and oral communication skills, capable of conveying complex legal concepts clearly to diverse audiences.
  • In-house legal experience and experience with internal remediation efforts are a plus.

lists.content:
• Provide comprehensive legal and regulatory support to local business teams in Korea, including general legal advice, contract review, and negotiation assistance across a broad range of legal areas such as local commercial law, corporate law, labor law, intellectual property, and regulatory compliance.
  • Proactively identify regulatory and legal risks, propose solutions, and anticipate support needs to deliver strategic and practical legal guidance to local teams.
  • Monitor, interpret, and maintain up-to-date knowledge of Korean laws, regulations, and regulatory developments relevant to the business, providing strategic advice to ensure compliance and mitigate risks.
  • Draft, review, and negotiate contracts and agreements, providing holistic risk assessments and recommendations that balance business objectives with regulatory compliance and risk mitigation.
  • Lead the development, implementation, and management of local legal and compliance programs, including ongoing regulatory strategy and engagement with Korean regulatory authorities.
  • Support internal stakeholders in regulatory filings, licensing, and responding to regulatory inquiries or investigations in Korea.

• 5-8 years of experience in regulatory legal roles, preferably within the payments, fintech, or cryptocurrency sectors.
  • Experience in legal and regulatory practices relevant to Korean financial regulations. Involvement in licensing or direct interaction with Korean regulatory bodies.
  • In-house legal experience within Financial Services, Fintech, Technology, or related regulated industries is highly preferred.
  • Strong expertise in Korean regulatory and compliance frameworks, with a solid understanding of local laws affecting financial and technology sectors.
  • Demonstrated ability to provide pragmatic legal advice balancing regulatory requirements and business needs.
  • Proven track record of working independently in a fast-paced, global environment, collaborating effectively with cross-functional teams across multiple locations.
  • Excellent problem-solving skills with the ability to deliver clear, actionable counsel under tight deadlines.
  • Experience conducting risk assessments, compliance reviews, and enhanced due diligence in a regulated environment.
  • Hands-on approach with strong project management skills, capable of managing complex legal and regulatory projects independently.

As a Regulatory Counsel for Turkey, you will assist with a broad range of legal and regulatory matters related to financial products and services in the FinTech, crypto, and blockchain sectors within Turkey. You will provide expert legal and regulatory support to local and global business teams, ensuring compliance with Turkish laws and regulations, and help drive the company’s strategic initiatives in this rapidly evolving market.
