About the role:
You'll join one of the largest feature team on the Binance iOS client, responsible for the modules that millions of users interact with daily. The team owns the core user-facing experience — from home feed and markets discovery, to account and identity, and the platform's server-driven UI framework. Given the breadth of ownership, you will work across teams and collaborate closely with engineers from infrastructure, finance, payments, fiat, and other feature teams on a daily basis. You will build and maintain production-scale Swift features across many modules, shipping to one of the most downloaded finance apps worldwide.

About the role:

The team owns the core user-facing experience — from home feed and markets discovery, to account and identity, and the platform's server-driven UI framework. lists.content:
• Leveraging AI, you will design, develop, and maintain high-quality iOS applications using Swift, ensuring clean, efficient, and scalable code.
• Lead end-to-end iOS development cycles, from requirements gathering and design through to testing, deployment, and App Store submission.
• Drive code quality initiatives including code reviews, refactoring, and enforcement of iOS development best practices across the team.
• Collaborate cross-functionally with product, design, and backend teams to translate requirements into robust iOS solutions.
• Own and maintain technical documentation, ensuring development processes, architecture decisions, and implementation details are clearly captured.

• 3+ years of professional iOS development experience with strong proficiency in Swift and the Apple ecosystem.
• Hands-on experience with AI-assisted development, continuously adopting AI tooling to improve productivity and code quality
• Strong understanding of iOS architecture patterns (e.g. MVVM, MVC) and experience building scalable, maintainable iOS codebases.
• Solid grasp of SDLC processes, with hands-on experience contributing across all phases of software development.
• Proficiency with version control systems, particularly Git, and familiarity with modern iOS development tooling such as Xcode and TestFlight.

• Experience with SwiftUI in addition to UIKit.
• Exposure to iOS CI/CD pipelines and automated testing frameworks such as XCTest.
• Proven track record of shipping iOS applications to the App Store.

We leverage the power of digital assets and blockchain to build an inclusive financial ecosystem to advance the freedom of money and improve financial access for people around the world.

Join the Exchange Service team at Binance, the world's leading cryptocurrency exchange serving over 250M+ registered users across 100+ countries. As dedicated software engineers, we are responsible for developing and maintaining the core trading platform, ensuring seamless and efficient operations. Our work solidifies Binance as the preferred choice for crypto enthusiasts worldwide.

lists.content:
• Development and implementation of crypto-related products, including but not limited to fiat gateway, futures, margin, lending, etc.
  • Build large scale software system, which can impact daily life of millions of customers
  • Underlying infra/arch upgrade
  • Performance tuning, online incidents troubleshooting, and system refactoring
  • Write high-quality, clean, and maintainable code using engineering best practices
  • Guide junior engineers’ daily work and do knowledge share, etc.

• Bachelor's/Master's degree in computer science, engineering, or equivalent industry experience
  • Proficient in core java, and familiar with spring framework
  • Proficient in MySQL, and familiar with at least one NoSQL DB
  • Proficient in distributed system design, and familiar with at least one messaging middleware and the underlying design principles
  • Capable to cope with stress, and quickly learn new knowledge
  • Good cross-team communication skills

About the team
Binance Cloud is a comprehensive exchange infrastructure solution that enables qualified entities to effortlessly deploy and launch a crypto exchange. Leveraging Binance’s cutting-edge technology, Binance Cloud provides top-tier liquidity, strong regulatory compliance, and system stability, with ample room for customization.

About the team
Binance Cloud is a comprehensive exchange infrastructure solution that enables qualified entities to effortlessly deploy and launch a crypto exchange. Leveraging Binance’s cutting-edge technology, Binance Cloud provides top-tier liquidity, strong regulatory compliance, and system stability, with ample room for customization.

We are seeking a mid to senior level Java Engineer with a robust background in developing our trading systems. The ideal candidate will possess expertise in designing high-concurrency, high-availability systems.

lists.content:
• Design, develop, and maintain high-performance Java-based applications for spot or futures trading systems
  • Architect and implement scalable, low-latency, and fault-tolerant systems to handle high-concurrency workloads
  • Optimize system performance to ensure high availability and reliability under demanding conditions
  • Collaborate with cross-functional teams, including product managers, DevOps, and other developers, to deliver robust solutions
  • Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code following best practices
  • Troubleshoot and resolve complex technical issues in production environments
  • Stay updated on industry trends and emerging technologies to continuously improve system capabilities
  • Participate in code reviews, mentoring junior developers, and fostering a culture of technical excellence

• Bachelor's/Master's degree in Computer Science, Engineering or a related field
  • 5+ years of experience with backend development
  • Strong expertise in designing and implementing high-concurrency, high-availability systems
  • Proficiency in Java frameworks and tools (e.g., Spring, Hibernate, Maven)
  • Deep understanding of multithreading, concurrency patterns, and distributed systems
  • Experience with messaging systems (e.g., Kafka, RabbitMQ) and database technologies (e.g., SQL, NoSQL)
  • Familiarity with microservices architecture and cloud platforms (e.g., AWS, Alibaba Cloud)
  • Strong problem-solving skills and ability to work under pressure in a fast-paced environment
  • Adaptive mindset with a willingness to learn and embrace new challenges
  • Excellent communication skills and ability to collaborate effectively in a remote, international team

job_detail_fetch.descriptionPlain:
Calling top-tier AI and Web3 innovators from around the globe!  Binance is building the world’s foremost crypto and Web3 platform—and we’re just getting started. We’re assembling a lean, elite LLM Algorithm & Data Science Team (3–5 members) to pioneer next-generation AI solutions in finance, blockchain, and beyond. If you’re young, passionate, and driven by cutting-edge research, this is your moment to make history. 

What You’ll Build: 

We’re not here to retrofit yesterday’s models—we’re here to invent tomorrow’s:

-Web3 Data Lake LLM
Ingest and reason over massive on-chain and off-chain datasets to power real-time insights.

-Trading System LLM
Design intelligent trading agents, signal generators, and strategy-optimization engines.

-Compliance and Regulatory LLM 
Automate compliance, travel-rule enforcement, and on-chain forensics at scale.

.…and beyond
From customer-service agents and personalized navigation experiences to completely new AI-powered Web3 applications.

Your creations will underpin multiple internal products—customer support bots, trading-signal dashboards, compliance workflows, user-experience agents—while also bootstrapping entirely new AI-Web3 innovations.
job_detail_fetch.description:
Calling top-tier AI and Web3 innovators from around the globe!  Binance is building the world’s foremost crypto and Web3 platform—and we’re just getting started. We’re assembling a lean, elite LLM Algorithm & Data Science Team (3–5 members) to pioneer next-generation AI solutions in finance, blockchain, and beyond. If you’re young, passionate, and driven by cutting-edge research, this is your moment to make history.

What You’ll Build:

We’re not here to retrofit yesterday’s models—we’re here to invent tomorrow’s:

-Web3 Data Lake LLM
Ingest and reason over massive on-chain and off-chain datasets to power real-time insights.

-Trading System LLM
Design intelligent trading agents, signal generators, and strategy-optimization engines.

-Compliance and Regulatory LLM 
Automate compliance, travel-rule enforcement, and on-chain forensics at scale.

.…and beyond
From customer-service agents and personalized navigation experiences to completely new AI-powered Web3 applications.

Your creations will underpin multiple internal products—customer support bots, trading-signal dashboards, compliance workflows, user-experience agents—while also bootstrapping entirely new AI-Web3 innovations.

lists.content:
• Model R&D: Architect and train custom foundation LLMs optimized for trading, compliance, and Web3 data.
  • Agent Development: Build next-gen multi-agent systems that blend search, RL, and LLM reasoning for real-world tasks.
  • Data Engineering: Collaborate on Web3 data-lake design—ETL pipelines, vector stores, real-time feeds.
  • Cross-Functional Impact: Partner with product, compliance, and customer-support teams to deploy models in production.
  • Innovation Pipeline: Surface new AI-Web3 use cases, prototype MVPs, and shepherd them toward scale.

• Academic Excellence: Master’s or PhD in ML, AI, Computer Science, Mathematics, or related field.
  • Research Prodigy: Published in top conferences/journals (ICLR, NeurIPS, ACL, etc.) on foundational LLMs, agent frameworks, or reasoning architectures.
  • Reinforcement & Reasoning: Deep expertise in reinforcement learning, reasoning algorithms, or related paradigms—bonus if you’ve built or extended agentic frameworks.
  • Polyglot Coder: Fluent in Python; experience with PyTorch, TensorFlow, JAX, or similar. You can prototype new model architectures end-to-end.
  • Crypto & Web3 Curious: Enthusiasm for finance engineering, blockchain protocols, on-chain data, DeFi mechanics, or regulatory landscapes.

lists.content:
• Lead marketing spend, planning and evaluation across marketing areas (eg performance marketing, PR & Branding, user campaigns, affiliates & KOLs, events & sponsorships).

  • Analyze the effectiveness of marketing investments, derive insights on ROI, and develop high-impact recommendations for executive business leaders.

  • Partner with Accounting to ensure accurate monthly financial reporting of marketing activities.

  • Provide key data insights to help marketers shape new or existing campaigns, continuing to identify growth opportunities, and data-driven recommendations (including guidance on spend) to improve ROI and user growth.

  • Work with complex datasets, ensuring that our marketing activities are being tracked and measured appropriately by working with cross-functional stakeholders.

  • Build relationships and collaborate with leaders across Marketing, Data, Regions and Finance team to find solutions to challenges

  • Drive continuous process improvement, standardization, simplification and reporting enhancements

• 8+ years of experience in an FP&A or strategic finance role supporting Marketing function or in a Marketing role supporting analytics & strategy with Finance background at a large internet company (B2C) Analytical problem solver with extensive experience building complex financial and/or operating models

  • Ability to craft executive-level presentations and develop succinct narratives outlining the key points of a deliverable and next step action items

  • Demonstrated abilities to ask the right questions and to use sound business judgment when collaborating with a wide-range of stakeholders

  • Proficiency in using AI / experience in automation is an added advantage.

  • Proven proclivity for quickly identifying and methodically resolving potential road-blocks

• Belong to the Growth Department with the core objective of acquiring Chinese users at scale and being accountable for growth metrics; 所属增长部门，核心目标是华语用户规模的批量获取，对增长指标负责
  • Expand and manage various types of internet traffic channels. Candidates with one or more of the following growth resources are preferred; 负责拓展各种互联网流量类型的渠道，希望你具有下述一个或多个增长资源
  • Exposure to domestic and international mobile phone manufacturers and major media resources (e.g., Android, Apple Store, Facebook, TikTok, etc.), with direct cooperation channel resources highly preferred; 海内外手机厂商和大媒体资源（安卓苹果商店/Facebook/ttk等），有相关可以直接合作渠道资源优先
  • Exposure to App store promotion resources, familiarity with user acquisition methods in app stores and ability to develop channel partnerships to drive user acquisition on Apple and Android stores; 应用商店马甲包/功能包/非标/ASA优化资源，熟悉应用商店的获客方式，可以开发在苹果/安卓商店获客的渠道合作 
  • Familiarity with mid- and long-tail channel resources such as tools, games, and other verticals; 包括但不限于熟悉工具类、游戏类等中长尾的渠道资源
  • Independently research and develop various growth models based on business needs, maintain sensitivity to traffic trends, and proactively seek and explore new partnership and growth opportunities; 根据业务结果需要，自主研究各种增长模式，对流量敏感，积极寻找和挖掘新的合作资源

• Marketing experience in finance, gaming, or third-party applications is preferred, with relevant channel resources being a plus; 有过金融，游戏，第三方应用市场推广经验，有渠道资源优先
  • At least 3 years of experience in user growth, with access to traffic resources such as download sites, webmaster networks, app store user acquisition, and a solid understanding of growth strategies and methodologies; 3年以上用户增长工作经验，有下载站/站长站群/应用商店获客等相关流量资源，对增长工作有体系化的认识和理解
  • Strong self-motivation, team spirit, and a collaborative mindset. Demonstrates humility and kindness when working with others; 自主驱动力强，有团队精神和集体精神。与人协作懂得和善谦逊
  • Bilingual English/Mandarin is required to be able to coordinate with overseas partners and stakeholders; 必须具备中英文双语能力，能够有效协调海外合作伙伴及内部多方利益相关者

lists.content:
We are looking for a senior Product Manager to rebuild and scale our payment product in LATAM.

This role goes beyond feature delivery — you will be responsible for defining product architecture, improving merchant and user experience, and driving real business growth in a complex payment ecosystem.

You will play a key role in solving current gaps in product strategy, execution quality, and market fit.

• Drive the localization and growth of Big Pay products in LATAM, ensuring the product experience aligns with local user behavior, payment habits, and market dynamics.
  • Define and continuously refine the end-to-end product architecture for payment flows, including user journey, merchant lifecycle, transaction routing, and fund movement, ensuring scalability and system consistency.
  • Identify user pain points and merchant integration challenges through direct engagement with local users, merchants, and regional teams, and translate insights into structured and high-impact product improvements.
  • Redesign and optimize merchant onboarding and integration experience, improving API usability, documentation clarity, and integration success rate to accelerate merchant acquisition and activation.
  • Improve user onboarding and payment experience, reducing entry barriers across KYC, deposit, and transaction flows, and building a product that aligns with user trust and mental models in LATAM markets.
  • Conduct in-depth market research and competitor analysis to ensure product strategy is grounded in real market dynamics, not just internal assumptions or short-term KPIs.
  • Design and iterate product solutions including user flows, wireframes, and product requirements, with clear user stories and strong attention to detail in execution quality.
  • Work across the full product development lifecycle, ensuring high standards in UI/UX, development coordination, test case validation, production launch, and post-launch optimization.
  • Analyze product performance using data-driven approaches, build and maintain performance dashboards, and drive improvements in key metrics such as conversion rate, transaction success rate, merchant activation, and user retention — while balancing data with real user insights.
  • Collaborate closely with engineering, operations, compliance, and business teams to deliver scalable, reliable, and compliant payment products, ensuring smooth operational processes across markets.
  • Ensure product design incorporates risk management, compliance requirements, and operational efficiency, particularly in areas such as payment flows, settlement, and regulatory constraints.
  • Understand and optimize key payment processes including transaction lifecycle, reconciliation, settlement, PSP integrations, and merchant flows, ensuring robustness and scalability.
  • Act as a bridge between LATAM markets and global product teams, ensuring local insights, user needs, and business priorities are effectively translated into product roadmap decisions.

• 8+ years of Product Management experience, with strong background in payments, fintech, or transaction platforms.
  • Solid understanding of payment systems, including:
  • Payment flows (on/off-ramp, routing, authorization)
  • Reconciliation and settlement
  • Merchant integration (API-based)
  • PSP / acquirer ecosystem
  • Experience designing or owning end-to-end payment or card products (not just growth or front-end features).
  • Strong product architecture thinking — able to structure complex systems, not just deliver features.
  • Proven ability to improve merchant experience or user conversion in payment products.
  • Strong data sense, but not KPI-driven only — able to combine data with real user insight.
  • Ability to work closely with engineering and understand technical constraints (API, system design, integration).
  • Ability to balance business growth with product quality and user experience
  • Fluency in English is required to be able to coordinate with overseas partners and stakeholders. Additional languages like fluent Spanish or Portuguese would be an advantage.
  • Strong understanding of LATAM markets and user experience.
  • Strong ownership mindset — someone who fixes problems, not just executes tasks

lists.content:
• Translate business and technical requirements into concrete performance test plans.
  • Design and implement architecture-level and code-level optimizations to enhance system throughput and stability.
  • Work closely with DevOps to ensure production-level high availability across distributed systems.
  • Build and execute performance testing strategies covering load, stress, scalability, and reliability.
  • Independently troubleshoot real-time performance issues, identifying root causes and delivering solutions end-to-end.
  • Develop internal tools for automated performance monitoring, testing, and issue analysis.

• Strong ability to identify performance bottlenecks at system, service, and code levels, with actionable solutions.
  • Hands-on experience troubleshooting microservice performance issues.
  • Deep expertise in Java performance tuning, profiling, and JVM-level optimization.
  • Proficiency with relational and NoSQL databases (MySQL, MongoDB).
  • Familiarity with performance analysis for middleware such as Kafka, Redis, RabbitMQ.
  • Practical experience setting up performance test environments.
  • Experience with containerization and orchestration (Docker, Kubernetes).
  • Solid Linux skills, both command-line and system-level troubleshooting.
  • Strong passion for building systems that excel in performance, scalability, and reliability.
  • Practical experience using performance engineering tools such as K6 or JMeter.
  • Programming language requirement: Java (must). Rust experience is a plus.
    • Nice-to-have
  • Hands-on experience with public cloud platforms (AWS, Azure, GCP, AliCloud).
  • Experience setting up monitoring/observability stacks (Prometheus, Grafana).
  • Prior experience conducting performance tests in production environments.
  • Experience triaging and resolving production performance incidents.
  • Linux kernel or OS-level performance analysis skills.
  • Experience working within distributed, remote teams.
  • Ability to leverage APM tools effectively for performance troubleshooting.

• Operations / Project Management
  • Evaluate both internal and external requests (e.g. ROI analysis).

  • Experience in using tools such as Dune analytics, Flipside, Nansen, etc.

Binance is seeking a Senior PR Manager to lead and execute public relations strategy across Asia.
 
This role is responsible for shaping Binance’s public narrative in key growth markets, managing media relationships, navigating regulatory sensitivities, and ensuring consistent, credible communications across both active and restricted markets.
 
The ideal candidate is a seasoned PR leader with strong regional media networks, experience in regulated industries (finance, fintech, tech), and the ability to balance proactive storytelling with risk-aware communications.

Binance is a leading global blockchain ecosystem behind the world’s largest cryptocurrency exchange by trading volume and registered users. Binance is seeking a Senior PR Manager to lead and execute public relations strategy across Asia.
 
This role is responsible for shaping Binance’s public narrative in key growth markets, managing media relationships, navigating regulatory sensitivities, and ensuring consistent, credible communications across both active and restricted markets.
 
The ideal candidate is a seasoned PR leader with strong regional media networks, experience in regulated industries (finance, fintech, tech), and the ability to balance proactive storytelling with risk-aware communications.

lists.content:
• Regional PR Strategy & Leadership:
  • Develop and execute an integrated PR and communications strategy for Asia, aligned with Binance’s global positioning and local market realities.
  • Prioritize APAC as core growth markets, ensuring deeper media engagement, stronger visibility, and sustained brand credibility.
  • Adapt messaging and approach for restricted or smaller markets, focusing on compliance-safe communications and reputation management.


  • Media Relations & Thought Leadership:
  • Build, maintain, and expand strong relationships with top-tier, business, financial, and tech media across the region.
  • Secure consistent, high-quality media coverage including interviews, op-eds, commentary, and feature stories.
  • Position Binance spokespeople as credible thought leaders on crypto, blockchain, financial innovation, and regulation-aware growth.
    •  
  • Regulatory-Sensitive Communications:
  • Work closely with Legal, Compliance, and Policy teams to ensure all external communications are accurate, compliant, and risk-appropriate.
  • Support communications around regulatory developments, market restrictions, and compliance milestones in a clear and responsible manner.
  • Act as a key communications partner during issues management or crisis scenarios.
    •  
  • Campaigns, Launches & Corporate Announcements:
  • Lead PR planning and execution for product launches, partnerships, corporate announcements, and regional campaigns.
  • Ensure announcements are localized appropriately while maintaining a consistent regional narrative.
  • Coordinate with global PR teams to align timing, messaging, and spokesperson strategy.
    •  
  • Agency & Stakeholder Management:
  • Manage and guide local PR agencies where applicable, ensuring clear briefs, high standards, and measurable outcomes.
  • Collaborate cross-functionally with Marketing, Social, Community, Partnerships, and Global Comms teams.
  • Provide senior-level counsel to internal stakeholders on media strategy and public positioning.
    •  
  • Measurement & Reporting:
  • Track and analyze PR performance using key metrics (share of voice, sentiment, message pull-through, tier-1 coverage).
  • Deliver clear monthly and quarterly reports with insights, risks, and recommendations.
  • Continuously refine strategy based on data, market feedback, and regulatory context.

• Experience & Background:
  • 8–12+ years of experience in public relations, communications, or corporate affairs.
  • Strong background in financial services, fintech, technology, crypto, or regulated industries.
  • Direct, hands-on experience managing multi-market or regional PR strategies in Asia (Japan/Korea).
    •  
  • Skills & Competencies:
  • Excellent media instincts with strong storytelling and message framing skills.
  • High level of regulatory awareness and risk sensitivity.
  • Ability to operate strategically while remaining execution-focused.
  • Strong stakeholder management and cross-cultural communication skills.
  • Confident advisor to senior leaders and spokespersons.
  • Fluency in English is required to be able to coordinate with overseas partners and stakeholders. Additional languages would be an advantage.
    •  
  • What Success Looks Like:
  • Binance is viewed as a credible, responsible, and authoritative voice in the Asia markets.
  • Clear, consistent, and compliant communications across all Asia markets.
  • Strong media relationships that translate into sustained, high-quality coverage.
  • Effective navigation of regulatory sensitivities with minimal reputational risk.

job_detail_fetch.descriptionPlain:
Binance is a leading global blockchain ecosystem behind the world’s largest cryptocurrency exchange by trading volume and registered users. We are trusted by 300+ million people in 100+ countries for our industry-leading security, user fund transparency, trading engine speed, deep liquidity, and an unmatched portfolio of digital-asset products. Binance offerings range from trading and finance to education, research, payments, institutional services, Web3 features, and more. We leverage the power of digital assets and blockchain to build an inclusive financial ecosystem to advance the freedom of money and improve financial access for people around the world.


Binance is seeking a Senior PR Manager to lead and execute public relations strategy across Southeast Asia.
 
This role is responsible for shaping Binance’s public narrative, managing media relationships, navigating regulatory sensitivities, and ensuring consistent, credible communications.
 
The ideal candidate is a seasoned PR leader with strong regional media networks, experience in regulated industries (finance, fintech, tech), and the ability to balance proactive storytelling with risk-aware communications.
job_detail_fetch.description:
Binance is a leading global blockchain ecosystem behind the world’s largest cryptocurrency exchange by trading volume and registered users. We are trusted by 300+ million people in 100+ countries for our industry-leading security, user fund transparency, trading engine speed, deep liquidity, and an unmatched portfolio of digital-asset products. Binance offerings range from trading and finance to education, research, payments, institutional services, Web3 features, and more. We leverage the power of digital assets and blockchain to build an inclusive financial ecosystem to advance the freedom of money and improve financial access for people around the world.

Binance is seeking a Senior PR Manager to lead and execute public relations strategy across Southeast Asia.
 
This role is responsible for shaping Binance’s public narrative, managing media relationships, navigating regulatory sensitivities, and ensuring consistent, credible communications.
 
The ideal candidate is a seasoned PR leader with strong regional media networks, experience in regulated industries (finance, fintech, tech), and the ability to balance proactive storytelling with risk-aware communications.

lists.content:
• Regional PR Strategy & Leadership:
  • Develop and execute an integrated PR and communications strategy for Southeast Asia, aligned with Binance’s global positioning and regional considerations.
  • Prioritize SEA, ensuring deeper media engagement, stronger visibility, and sustained brand credibility.
  • Adapt messaging and approach where appropriate, focusing on compliance-safe communications and reputation management.
    •  
  • Media Relations & Thought Leadership:
  • Build, maintain, and expand strong relationships with top-tier, business, financial, and tech media across the region.
  • Secure consistent, high-quality media coverage including interviews, op-eds, commentary, and feature stories.
  • Position Binance spokespeople as credible thought leaders on crypto, blockchain, financial innovation, and regulation-aware growth.
    •  
  • Regulatory-Sensitive Communications:
  • Work closely with Legal, Compliance, and Policy teams to ensure all external communications are accurate, compliant, and risk-appropriate.
  • Support communications around regulatory developments, market restrictions, and compliance milestones in a clear and responsible manner.
  • Act as a key communications partner during issues management or crisis scenarios.
    •  
  • Campaigns, Launches & Corporate Announcements:
  • Lead PR planning and execution for product launches, partnerships, corporate announcements, and regional campaigns.
  • Ensure announcements are localized where appropriate while maintaining a consistent regional narrative.
  • Coordinate with global PR teams to align timing, messaging, and spokesperson strategy.
    •  
  • Agency & Stakeholder Management:
  • Manage and guide local PR agencies where applicable, ensuring clear briefs, high standards, and measurable outcomes.
  • Collaborate cross-functionally with Marketing, Social, Community, Partnerships, and Global Comms teams.
  • Provide senior-level counsel to internal stakeholders on media strategy and public positioning.
    •  
  • Measurement & Reporting:
  • Track and analyze PR performance using key metrics (share of voice, sentiment, message pull-through, tier-1 coverage).
  • Deliver clear monthly and quarterly reports with insights, risks, and recommendations.
  • Continuously refine strategy based on data, market feedback, and regulatory context.

• Experience & Background:
  • 8–12+ years of experience in public relations, communications, or corporate affairs.
  • Strong background in financial services, fintech, technology, crypto, or regulated industries.
  • Direct, hands-on experience managing multi-market or regional PR strategies in Southeast Asia.
    •  
  • Skills & Competencies:
  • Excellent media instincts with strong storytelling and message framing skills.
  • High level of regulatory awareness and risk sensitivity.
  • Ability to operate strategically while remaining execution-focused.
  • Strong stakeholder management and cross-cultural communication skills.
  • Confident advisor to senior leaders and spokespersons.
  • Fluency in English is required to be able to coordinate with overseas partners and stakeholders. Additional languages would be an advantage.
    •  
  • What Success Looks Like:
  • Binance is viewed as a credible, responsible, and authoritative voice in Southeast Asia.
  • Clear, consistent, and compliant communications across Southeast Asia.
  • Strong media relationships that translate into sustained, high-quality coverage.
  • Effective navigation of regulatory sensitivities with minimal reputational risk.

lists.content:
• AI Product Strategy: Lead the roadmap for AI-powered agent assistance tools. Drive the evolution of internal service tools to enhance agent capabilities through intelligent features (e.g., smart suggestions, automated workflows).
  • Workflow Optimization: Identify bottlenecks in customer service operations. Leverage LLM and automation technologies to streamline complex processes, reduce manual repetitive work, and improve overall service consistency.
  • Knowledge & Retrieval Experience: Optimize the internal information retrieval architecture. Ensure agents can access accurate knowledge base articles and case history efficiently to support rapid decision-making.
  • Efficiency Impact: Ownership of key operational efficiency metrics (e.g., AHT, Resolution Rate, Operational Cost). Design rigorous experiments to quantify the business impact of AI implementations.
  • Cross-Functional Collaboration: Partner with Algorithm, Engineering, and Operations teams to bridge the gap between technical capabilities and actual business scenarios, ensuring smooth adoption of new features.

• Experience: Bachelor’s degree or above. 4+ years of Product Management experience, with a strong focus on B2B products, CRM, or Internal Efficiency Tools.
  • AI Application: 2+ years of experience in applying AI/LLM technologies to real-world business problems (experience in Customer Service or SaaS domains is a plus).
  • System Thinking: Strong ability to analyze complex workflows and design scalable system solutions. Capable of balancing standardized products with flexible operational needs.
  • Data-Driven: Proficiency in data analysis. Ability to define success metrics for efficiency tools and drive product iteration based on usage data and feedback.
  • Communication: Excellent communication skills to manage expectations across various stakeholders in a global environment.

lists.content:
• Develop product lifecycle (end-to-end) for global Fiat On Ramp and Marketplace Solution and e-Commerce.
  • Develop product strategies ensuring alignment with global business goals.
  • Drive data-driven decision-making — translate insights into actionable  product initiatives.
  • Collaborate with cross-functional teams (engineering, design, compliance, risk, BD, and marketing) to ship high-impact global features and ensure operational excellence.
  • Support market research and competitor analysis across regions to identify emerging trends, regulatory nuances, and local product opportunities.
  • Partner with business operations to design solutions that enhance, product conversion, and engagement.
  • Leverage AI and automation tools to improve operational efficiency and product experience quality.
  • Work independently as an individual contributor (IC), demonstrating strategic ownership, execution discipline, and proactive leadership in a fast-paced environment.

• 8+ years of experience in product management, ideally with exposure to payments, trading, or Web3 ecosystems.
  • Proven track record in managing complex, global product launches with measurable business impact.Strong analytical mindset — experienced in using data and experimentation (A/B tests, funnels, cohorts) to guide strategy.
  • Solid technical understanding; comfortable working with backend, API, and app engineers.
  • Strong stakeholder management and communication skills across regions and time zones.
  • Self-driven, outcome-oriented, able to handle multiple projects with minimal supervision.
    •  
  • Nice to have:
  • Experience in Ecommerce platform for product list, trading and dispute handling, Web 3 and AI is a plus.
  • Familiarity with Web3 and DeFi ecosystems, protocols, and compliance frameworks (AML/risk).
  • Hands-on experience with AI-enabled product growth or data analytics tools.

lists.content:
• Work in a global team to collaboratively design and develop a platform that provides world class Compliance tools and services that is compliant and able to provide best user experience and stick to the regulatory requirements
  • Review the business requirement and come out with Product Requirements Document (PRD) to ensure the project is executed according to schedule to meet the deadlines
  • Communicate with Engineers / Designers as well as internal stakeholders like Compliance and Customer Service to ensure the products offer the greatest value are prioritized
  • Track and analyze key metrics to solve issues and drive continuous improvements
  • Constant refinement on workflow design to ensure the system is intuitive for seamless operation to drive the efficiencies and user experience
  • Support the Regional/Global Heads and work with different stakeholders to coordinate the implementation of product
  • Articulate new features and enhancements to users and internal stakeholders

• 5–8 years of proven experience as a Product Manager, preferrably in the tech, fintech, finance or blockchain industry
  • Strong background or hands-on experience with Compliance processes such as AML, Transaction Monitoring etc. is a significant advantage
  • Proven ability to lead complex projects and deliver scalable solutions in fast-paced dynamic environments
  • Expertise in product lifecycle management, preferably within an agile framework
  • Exceptional time-management and organizational skills, with the ability to prioritize objectively
  • Logical thinker with a talent for identifying and articulating rationale, assumptions, and risks
  • Excellent collaboration and communication skills, capable of working effectively across diverse teams and stakeholders
  • Self-starter who thrives in a fast-paced, cross-functional, and results-driven environment.

lists.content:
• Responsible for the product lifecycle for equities/tradfi trading product, from ideation to launch and iteration.
  • Drive product enhancements for traditional financial instruments integrating on Binance’s platform.
  • Develop and execute product strategies aligned with Binance’s vision and market trends.
  • Collaborate closely with cross-functional teams including engineering, design, risk, compliance, and marketing.
  • Analyze market data, user feedback, and competitive landscape to identify opportunities and optimize product performance.
  • Define clear product requirements, user stories, and acceptance criteria.
  • Monitor product KPIs and implement data-driven improvements.
  • Stay abreast of regulatory developments and ensure product compliance.

• Bachelor’s degree in Finance, Business, Economics, or a related field; MBA or advanced degree preferred.
  • At least 3-4 years of experience as a Product Manager/BA, preferably in the tradfi industry
  • Strong knowledge of traditional financial markets like Stocks, ETFs etc.
  • Experience working with trading platforms or stock exchanges is highly desirable.
  • Excellent analytical, problem-solving, and communication skills.
  • Bilingual English/Mandarin is required to be able to coordinate with overseas partners and stakeholders.

• Independently own the product strategy and execution for products related to KYB and other compliance-related projects end to end
  • Collaborate with global KYB vendors to build the state-of-the-art KYB and verification platform using cutting-edge technology
  • Work closely with compliance and operational teams to enable superior KYB onboarding experiences for our corporate users
  • Work closely with Product Managers, engineers, and designers to ensure a high quality product is built
  • Prioritize feedback from users/internal stakeholders (e.g. compliance, legal, operation, data etc.), make difficult trade-offs, and drive the product roadmap
  • Define and analyze key product metrics to inform decision-making and measure success
  • AI/ML Integration: Collaborate with engineering and data science teams to design and deploy scalable AI models streamline KYB process

• At least 5+ years of relevant experience as a Product Manager
  • Understanding of AI/ML concepts
  • Experience in building products for international markets
  • Experience in product lifecycle management
  • Strong communication/presentation skills 
  • Strong stakeholder management skills
  • User-focused and product-driven mindset
  • Ability to operate under tight deadlines while maintaining multiple projects
  • Fluent spoken and written English & Mandarin is a plus to liaise with overseas partners and stakeholders
  • Familiarity with Blockchain technology or fin-tech sector is a plus

lists.content:
• Work in a global team to collaboratively design and develop a platform that provides world class KYC service that is compliant and able to provide best user experience and achieve best KYC conversion rate
  • Create and review Product Requirements Document (PRD) for easy tracking within the project group
  • Ensure the project is executed according to schedule to meet the deadlines
  • Communicate with Engineers / Designers as well as internal stakeholders like Compliance and Risk to ensure the KYC flow offer the greatest value are prioritized
  • Track and analyze key user metrics to solve issues and drive continuous improvements
  • Constant refinement on workflow design to ensure the platform is intuitive for seamless operation to optimize conversion rate in the designated markets
  • Support the Regional/Global Heads and work with different stakeholders to coordinate the implementation of product
  • Articulate new features and enhancements to users and internal stakeholders

• 5–8 years of proven experience as a Product Manager, preferrably in the tech, fintech, finance or blockchain industry
  • Strong experience with KYC processes is a significant advantage
  • Expertise in product lifecycle management, preferably within an agile framework
  • Exceptional time-management and organizational skills, with the ability to prioritize objectively
  • Logical thinker with a talent for identifying and articulating rationale, assumptions, and risks
  • Excellent collaboration and communication skills
  • Self-starter who thrives in a fast-paced, cross-functional, and results-driven environment.
  • Proficiency in both written and spoken English is essential

About the Role

We are looking for a self-driven, results-oriented Senior Product Operations Manager to join the Binance Square team. You will drive product requirement development and execution based on user feedback and business growth objectives, and continuously improve product performance through growth strategies and operational initiatives.

lists.content:
• Identify product optimization opportunities and define product requirements based on user feedback, data analysis, and business growth objectives.
  • Collaborate closely with Product, Design, and Engineering teams to drive end-to-end product delivery.
  • Own GTM strategy for new feature launches, including user communication, launch promotion, and performance tracking.
  • Plan and execute product campaigns to boost user engagement and activity.
  • Develop and implement growth strategies to drive core metric improvements.
  • Define, track, and analyze core product metrics and surface actionable insights for optimization
  • Handle day-to-day operations including content governance, user experience monitoring, and cross-functional coordination.

• 5+ years of experience in product operations or a related role; crypto/Web3 industry experience required (trading product experience is a strong plus).
  • Strong data analysis skills with hands-on experience using analytics tools (SQL is a plus).
  • Fluent in both written and spoken English as a working language.
  • Excellent cross-functional collaboration and communication skills; able to drive projects effectively in a fast-paced environment.
  • Proven ability to independently plan and execute growth initiatives.
  • Experience with social or content platforms is a plus.

lists.content:
• User Acquisition & Lifecycle: Own the Futures FTD funnel end-to-end. Design and run lifecycle campaigns (Trade & Win, vouchers, pay tasks) that drive first-time deposits, retention, and active trader growth.

  • Growth Product Design: Own the design of growth instruments — position vouchers, trade-to-earn mechanics, onboarding tools. Write BRDs, define parameters (leverage, margin, expiry), coordinate with Product/Engineering to ship, and benchmark against competitors.

  • User Acquisition & Lifecycle: Own the Futures FTD funnel end-to-end. Design and run lifecycle campaigns (Trade & Win, vouchers, pay tasks) that drive first-time deposits, retention, and active trader growth.

  • Campaign Operations: Run a high-cadence campaign calendar (2+/month). A/B test mechanisms, track ROI, iterate on retention cohorts. Zero incidents through rigorous QA.

  • Product Marketing: Collaborate with CMKT to plan and execute go-to-market for new Futures features and asset classes — CRM, social, KOL, user education. Drive adoption from awareness to first trade.

  • Data & Reporting: Use funnel analytics and user segmentation to find growth levers. Set KPI targets from benchmarks, report weekly on FTD, WAU, retention, and CP contribution.

  • Cross-functional Coordination: Bridge Growth Ops, Product, Central Platform, Marketing, BD, and Regional teams. Unblock voucher infra, reward distribution, and tooling dependencies.

  •

• Experience: 5+ years in product operations or growth marketing at a crypto exchange, fintech, or trading platform. Track record running campaigns that move user acquisition metrics. Derivatives experience (perps, options, structured products) strongly preferred.

  • Campaign Expertise: Designed and scaled high-frequency campaigns. Comfortable with A/B testing, multi-channel GTM (CRM, push, social, KOL), and campaign QA at pace.

  • Analytical: Can do cohort analysis, funnel diagnostics, and ROI calculations independently. Sets targets from data, not intuition.

  • Product Sense: Can write a BRD, define UX requirements, and work with engineers. Understands how tool design (voucher mechanics, reward logic) drives user behavior.

  • Execution: Outcome-oriented, high ownership. Manages 3+ cross-team workstreams simultaneously without dropping balls. Weekly delivery cadence is normal, not stressful.

lists.content:
• Work closely with team members (Developers, Product Manager and Partners) to develop, test and deliver high quality software products
  • Create detailed, comprehensive and well-structured test plans and test cases
  • Prevent, collect, analyze and track product defects
  • Design, develop and execute Automation scripts
  • Hands-on Manual investigation and reproduction of functional Backend (Java) software issues
  • Root cause analysis of existing test script failures
  • Identification of current test script deficiencies and candidates for additional scripted coverage
  • Investigatory testing of unreleased features including defining requirements, behavior and impact
  • Documentation and design of candidate test scenarios for the above

• At least 7-8 years experience in software testing methodologies, both Automation (*Must have) & Manual (General)
  • Strong ability to to write clear, concise and comprehensive test plans and test cases
  • Strong ability to handle Backend services such as APIs, Databases, distributed services
  • Familiar with Linux and database operation: Mysql, SQLServer, Oracle and test environment construction by CICD, Spring Boot
  • Good programming: Master in Java coding (Must have)
  • Strong analytical and trouble-shooting skills
  • Experience working in an Agile/Scrum development process and using collaboration tools, such as Jira, Trello, Slack, etc
  • Excellent interpersonal, consultative and communication skills
  • Self-managed, proactive work style. Able to work independently within a team centric environment

• Work closely with team members (Developer, Product Manager, Customer Support and Partners) to develop detailed, comprehensive Automation test cases and deliver high quality products.
  • Prevent, analyze and track product defects/issues + Root cause analysis of test script failures.
  • Hands-on Manual investigation and reproduction of functional Backend software issues.
  • Find out test script deficiencies and solutions for additional scripted coverage.
  • Investigatory testing of unreleased features including defining requirements, behavior and impact.
  • Documentation and design of test scenarios for all of the above*.
  • Stay ahead with latest technology, consistently enhance team's testing process, methodologies, and efficiency.

• At least 6 years of experience for the above Responsibilities listed.
  • Strong knowledge of Software QA Automation methodologies, Backend Testing, Auto frameworks and design processes.
  • Solid knowledge of SQL, hands on solid coding / writing script capability (Java preferred).
  • Proficient in conducting root cause analysis to identify and address underlying issues impacting software quality.
  • Strong analytical and trouble-shooting skills, able to work independently.
  • Enjoy breaking things and solving problems - not only figuring out 'what', but also the 'why'
  • User-Focus mindset, with good logical thinking.
  • Fluency in both English & Chinese - Good communication skill with stakeholders.
  • Bonus: Prior knowledge in blockchain and exchange related domain would be highly advantageous.
  • Bonus: Experience in Functional testing for Web and Mobile applications.

About the Role
We are seeking a highly skilled QA Automation Engineer with strong Rust / Java programming knowledge to join our Futures team. In this role, you will play a key part in ensuring the quality and reliability of our products across web, desktop, and mobile platforms. You will collaborate closely with engineers, product managers, designers, and operations teams throughout the entire software development lifecycle, contributing to test strategy, execution, and continuous improvement of our processes.

Proficiency in Rust / Java is essential, as you will leverage it to design, develop, and maintain automated test frameworks and tools that ensure our systems meet the highest standards of performance and stability.

This is an exciting opportunity to work with cutting-edge technologies, drive testing excellence, and help deliver world-class solutions in a fast-paced, global environment.

About the Role
We are seeking a highly skilled QA Automation Engineer with strong Rust / Java programming knowledge to join our Futures team. In this role, you will play a key part in ensuring the quality and reliability of our products across web, desktop, and mobile platforms. You will collaborate closely with engineers, product managers, designers, and operations teams throughout the entire software development lifecycle, contributing to test strategy, execution, and continuous improvement of our processes.

Proficiency in Rust / Java is essential, as you will leverage it to design, develop, and maintain automated test frameworks and tools that ensure our systems meet the highest standards of performance and stability.

This is an exciting opportunity to work with cutting-edge technologies, drive testing excellence, and help deliver world-class solutions in a fast-paced, global environment.

lists.content:
• Participate in the Futures team’s entire software development lifecycle, encompassing all stages from requirements analysis to test planning, execution, defect tracking, product delivery, and maintenance with a strong emphasis on Rust/Java-based systems.
  • Work closely with fellow software engineers, product managers, user experience designers, and operations engineers to provide insights and feedback on Rust/Java code design, testing strategies, and system implementation.
  • Set up and manage Rust/Java testing environments, developing detailed, comprehensive, and well-structured test plans and cases using Rust/Java testing frameworks and tools.
  • Perform extensive testing including black-box, white-box, security, automated, and performance testing across multiple Rust/Java-based platforms and components.
  • Stay current with the latestRust/Java technologies and ecosystem advancements, continuously improving the team’s testing processes, methodologies, and efficiency.

• At least 3 years of professional experience in QA Testing (Automation), ideally within a leading technology or software engineering firm.
  • Strong programming skills in Rust/Java are required, with a solid understanding of the language’s ecosystem and experience usingRust/Java-based automation frameworks and testing libraries. Exposure to iOS/Android development is an added advantage.
  • Hands-on experience with mobile-specific testing techniques such as performance testing, Monkey stress testing, startup time measurement, frame rendering analysis, and network condition testing. Familiarity with secondary development tools or cross-platform frameworks will be considered a plus.
  • Adept at designing, implementing, and executing comprehensive test plans for complex systems and distributed architectures.
  • Proficient in root cause analysis to diagnose, debug, and resolve issues affecting software performance and quality.
  • Knowledgeable about mainstream AI models with hands-on experience applying them in real-world projects.
  • Bilingual English/Mandarin is required to effectively coordinate with overseas partners and stakeholders.

job_detail_fetch.descriptionPlain:
Binance is a leading global blockchain ecosystem behind the world’s largest cryptocurrency exchange by trading volume and registered users. We are trusted by 300+ million people in 100+ countries for our industry-leading security, user fund transparency, trading engine speed, deep liquidity, and an unmatched portfolio of digital-asset products. Binance offerings range from trading and finance to education, research, payments, institutional services, Web3 features, and more. We leverage the power of digital assets and blockchain to build an inclusive financial ecosystem to advance the freedom of money and improve financial access for people around the world.


Binance is looking for an experienced QA Engineer (mid to senior level) to support testing of our high-performance backend software stack. 
 
This entails the full life cycle of testing from designing tests to identify and understand issues, developing them into scripts and executing them for future iterations.
 
This is a full-time position which offers hybrid working in APAC region.
job_detail_fetch.description:
Binance is a leading global blockchain ecosystem behind the world’s largest cryptocurrency exchange by trading volume and registered users. Binance is looking for an experienced QA Engineer (mid to senior level) to support testing of our high-performance backend software stack. 
 
This entails the full life cycle of testing from designing tests to identify and understand issues, developing them into scripts and executing them for future iterations.
 
This is a full-time position which offers hybrid working in APAC region.

lists.content:
• Hands-on manual investigation and reproduction of functional backend software issues.
  • Design, implement, and manage automated solutions to replace manual processes in a distributed system environment.
  • Identification of current test script deficiencies and candidates for additional scripted coverage.
  • Investigatory testing of unreleased features including defining requirements, behavior and impact.
  • Documentation and write the test report for above.

• 5+ years of backend QA engineering experience.
  • Full cycle testing from designing manual tests, developing scripts and execution.
  • Strong experience with Unix/Linux (must-have).
  • Scripting ability using Bash and Python (must-have 3+ years of experience).
  • Experience testing backend services such as APIs, Databases, distributed services (non-monolithic).
  • Good to have additional DevOps knowledge or experience.
  • Enjoys breaking things and solving problems - not just able to find out the 'what', but also the 'why'.
  • Clear, logical communicator in English.

Binance is a leading global blockchain ecosystem behind the world’s largest cryptocurrency exchange by trading volume and registered users. We are trusted by 300+ million people in 100+ countries for our industry-leading security, user fund transparency, trading engine speed, deep liquidity, and an unmatched portfolio of digital-asset products. Binance offerings range from trading and finance to education, research, payments, institutional services, Web3 features, and more. We leverage the power of digital assets and blockchain to build an inclusive financial ecosystem to advance the freedom of money and improve financial access for people around the world.


About the Role
We are seeking a highly skilled QA Automation Engineer with strong Java / Rust programming expertise to join our Margin team. In this role, you will be responsible for ensuring the quality, stability, and reliability of our margin trading products and risk systems, working closely with engineers, product managers, and operations teams throughout the full software development lifecycle. You will leverage Java / Rust to design, develop, and maintain scalable automated testing frameworks and tools for complex trading workflows, risk controls, and high-concurrency systems, helping deliver secure and high-performance products to millions of users globally.

Binance offerings range from trading and finance to education, research, payments, institutional services, Web3 features, and more. We leverage the power of digital assets and blockchain to build an inclusive financial ecosystem to advance the freedom of money and improve financial access for people around the world.

About the Role

We are seeking a highly skilled QA Automation Engineer with strong Java / Rust programming expertise to join our Margin team. In this role, you will be responsible for ensuring the quality, stability, and reliability of our margin trading products and risk systems, working closely with engineers, product managers, and operations teams throughout the full software development lifecycle. You will leverage Java / Rust to design, develop, and maintain scalable automated testing frameworks and tools for complex trading workflows, risk controls, and high-concurrency systems, helping deliver secure and high-performance products to millions of users globally.

lists.content:
• Participate in the Margin team’s full software development lifecycle, from requirements analysis and test planning to execution, defect tracking, product delivery, and maintenance, with a strong focus on Java / Rust-based trading and risk systems.
  • Work closely with software engineers, product managers, designers, and operations teams to provide insights and feedback on system design, testing strategies, and implementation for margin trading products and risk control features.
  • Set up and manage testing environments, developing detailed and well-structured test plans and cases for complex trading workflows, margin calculations, liquidation processes, and high-concurrency systems.
  • Perform extensive testing including black-box, white-box, security, automation, and performance testing across web, mobile, backend, and distributed systems.
  • Stay up to date with the latest Java / Rust technologies and testing methodologies, continuously improving automation frameworks, testing efficiency, and overall product quality.

• Minimum 3 years of experience in QA Automation or Software Testing, preferably in tech, fintech, or trading platforms.
  • Strong programming skills in Java / Rust and famniliar with automated testing methodologies, distributed systems, and high-concurrency architectures.
  • Strong troubleshooting and root cause analysis skills for debugging performance and system issues.
  • Familiarity with AI tools or large language models is a plus.

Binance is a leading global blockchain ecosystem behind the world’s largest cryptocurrency exchange by trading volume and registered users. We are trusted by 300+ million people in 100+ countries for our industry-leading security, user fund transparency, trading engine speed, deep liquidity, and an unmatched portfolio of digital-asset products. We leverage the power of digital assets and blockchain to build an inclusive financial ecosystem to advance the freedom of money and improve financial access for people around the world.


We’re looking for a Senior Site Reliability Engineer Engineer to take ownership of building and evolving our internal monitoring and alerting systems that keep our high-load, real-time production systems running smoothly. If you thrive on solving complex challenges at scale and have experience in DevOps/SRE practices and monitoring performance-critical applications, this role could be a great fit.

In this position, you will design, build, and continuously improve our internal monitoring and alerting tools. Test and validate solutions in real production environments. Collaborate closely with Development, QA, and DevOps teams to ensure system reliability and performance. 

This is a full-time remote role, with a preference for candidates based in European time zones.

In this position, you will design, build, and continuously improve our internal monitoring and alerting tools. Test and validate solutions in real production environments. Collaborate closely with Development, QA, and DevOps teams to ensure system reliability and performance.

This is a full-time remote role, with a preference for candidates based in European time zones.

lists.content:
• Design, develop, and maintain robust monitoring and alerting tools for mission-critical systems
  • Automate production testing to ensure reliability and scalability
  • Proactively identify, troubleshoot, and resolve performance and software issues
  • Track, update, and drive resolution of technical problems across teams
  • Suggest and implement architectural enhancements and process improvements
  • Research, evaluate, and recommend new technologies and vendor solutions
  • Safeguard critical systems by applying best-in-class security practices and solutions

• At least 7+ years of experience as a Node.js / JavaScript developer, ideally with a background in monitoring and supporting large-scale production systems
  • Strong knowledge of REST API design and WebSockets
  • Hands-on experience with cloud platforms such as AWS or GCP
  • Solid understanding of distributed systems at scale
  • Proficiency working in a Linux environment
  • Excellent communication skills in English, with the ability to explain complex concepts clearly and logically

• Familiarity with tools such as Docker, Nginx, Prometheus, Grafana, etc.
  • Experience working with time-series databases
  • Understanding of low-level programming languages (e.g., C, C++, Rust)
  • Previous contributions to open-source projects

We are seeking an experienced Software Engineer to lead the development of scalable, high-performance backend services, with a focus on building and optimizing both traditional search and AI-powered search capabilities. You will collaborate with cross-functional teams to develop robust search systems that support core business use cases.
 
This role requires strong backend expertise and a commitment to delivering reliable, efficient solutions that drive Binance’s operational excellence.
job_detail_fetch.description:
Binance is a leading global blockchain ecosystem behind the world’s largest cryptocurrency exchange by trading volume and registered users. We are trusted by 300+ million people in 100+ countries for our industry-leading security, user fund transparency, trading engine speed, deep liquidity, and an unmatched portfolio of digital-asset products. We are seeking an experienced Software Engineer to lead the development of scalable, high-performance backend services, with a focus on building and optimizing both traditional search and AI-powered search capabilities. You will collaborate with cross-functional teams to develop robust search systems that support core business use cases.
 
This role requires strong backend expertise and a commitment to delivering reliable, efficient solutions that drive Binance’s operational excellence.

lists.content:
• Design, build, and optimize scalable backend services supporting both traditional search and AI-powered search systems.
  • Own the architecture of search-related systems to ensure high reliability, performance, and scalability.
  • Develop reusable backend frameworks and infrastructure to accelerate search and AI product development.
  • Collaborate closely with data scientists and AI engineers to enable LLM-powered search, ranking, and agent capabilities.
  • Continuously improve search performance, including indexing, retrieval, ranking, and latency optimization.
  • Translate business needs into scalable search solutions.
  • Drive execution and deliver results in complex or evolving environments.

• 5+ years of backend engineering experience.
  • Strong proficiency in Java and Python.
  • Experience designing and building large-scale distributed systems.
  • Hands-on experience with search technologies (e.g., Elasticsearch, vector search, hybrid retrieval) is preferred.
  • Experience with big data processing frameworks such as Flink or Spark for real-time or batch data processing.
  • Familiarity with AI-powered search technologies, including LLM-based search, RAG architectures, or agent frameworks (e.g., Dify, LangChain, Mastra, OpenAI Agents SDK).
  • Familiarity with cloud infrastructure and scalable system design.
  • Ability to deliver results in environments with ambiguity or evolving requirements.

Binance offerings range from trading and finance to education, research, payments, institutional services, Web3 features, and more. We leverage the power of digital assets and blockchain to build an inclusive financial ecosystem to advance the freedom of money and improve financial access for people around the world.


About the Role
We are looking for a driven and technically strong individual to join the Trading Engine team as a Senior API Solutions Engineer. This role combines hands-on software development with a client- and community-facing focus centered around the Binance Trading API. You will be part of a small, fast-moving team that works closely with some of the exchange’s largest global clients, helping them integrate and optimize their trading strategies using our APIs.
 
The ideal candidate has a solid technical background, strong programming expertise, and a deep understanding of exchange APIs. They should also enjoy engaging with developers and clients, providing guidance, and contributing to the broader API community.

lists.content:
• Develop and maintain open-source libraries used by the company’s clients for API integrations
  • Serve as a subject matter expert for REST APIs and WebSocket connectivity, supporting and advising the exchange’s largest clients
  • Work closely with clients to help them design and optimize trading algorithms, improving efficiency and performance on the exchange

• Strong programming skills, preferably in Python and/or JavaScript (Node.js); prior experience working with exchange APIs is highly valued
  • Experience contributing to open-source projects is a plus
  • Business-level English; proficiency in additional widely spoken languages is an advantage for supporting global clients
  • Excellent communication and interpersonal skills
  • Highly self-motivated, disciplined, and able to work independently in a fast-paced environment
  • Curious mindset with a strong willingness to learn, experiment, and explore new technologies

lists.content:
• Develop and implement crypto-related products such as crypto exchange, fiat gateway, futures, margin, lending and more.
  • Lead the creation of systems that will scale 100x, driving transformative infrastructure and architecture upgrades.
  • Lead and guide day-to-day development activities through hands-on involvement in architecture decisions, designs, design reviews, code reviews, and implementation.
  • Set up and maintain system infrastructure.

• Bachelor’s or Master’s degree in Computer Science, Engineering, or equivalent industry experience.
  • 9+ years of experience in the full software development lifecycle.
  • 2+ years of experience in an engineering leadership/management position.
  • Proven track record of leading teams to deliver high business impact and breakthrough results in fast-moving environments.
  • Strong proficiency in Core Java and familiarity with the Spring framework.
  • Expertise in MySQL and experience with at least one NoSQL database.
  • Proficient in distributed system design and knowledge of at least one messaging middleware and its design principles.
  • Strong cross-team communication skills.

We are looking for a Senior Talent Acquisition Specialist who'll act as a Talent Partner for several of our technical and product team globally.
 
This is a hands-on role that will imply leadership responsibilities as well: lead hiring projects, run all data, coordinate hiring priorities, etc.
 
Ultimately, the responsibilities of the Recruiter are to ensure our company attracts, hires, and retains the best employees while growing a strong talent pipeline and advising and building a close relationship with your business partners.

lists.content:
• Perform full-cycle recruiting for open positions: sourcing, interviewing, coordinating hiring process, offer negotiation, etc.
  • Provide an outstanding candidate experience, from initial introduction to onboarding
  • Be a true Talent Partner to your respective business line(s) - not just execute, but consult, advice, coach, etc.
  • Work closely with the HR team and hiring managers on constant improvement of the hiring process. Drive or take part in various HR projects and initiatives
  • Manage recruiting databases and other HR assets in structured and timely manners
  • Develop and maintain a continually stocked pipeline of quality talent through various methods, including, but not limited to, networking within the community, contacting and/or visiting universities, attending local job fairs and fostering continued contact with quality candidates who may qualify for future positions

• Minimum of 7 years of technical recruiting experience, preferably within top-tier tech or Web3 companies
  • Proven track record of successfully filling senior-level technical positions
  • Strong understanding of Web3 technologies and a genuine passion for the industry
  • Excellent communication and interpersonal skills, with the ability to build strong relationships with candidates and stakeholders
  • Demonstrated ability to manage multiple priorities and work in a fast-paced, dynamic environment
  • Data-driven mindset with experience using recruitment metrics and analytics to drive decision-making
  • Ability to quickly adapt to changing business needs and priorities
  • Strong organisational skills and attention to detail

lists.content:
• Design and develop internal testing and quality tools to support backend engineering teams.
  • Create detailed and comprehensive test cases and test plans for backend systems and internal platforms.
  • Design, develop, and execute automation solutions, combined with necessary manual investigation, to solve complex backend issues.
  • Perform root cause analysis on test failures, tooling issues, and product defects, and drive resolution.
  • Identify gaps in existing test coverage and continuously improve automation and tooling capabilities.
  • Conduct investigatory testing for unreleased features, defining requirements, system behavior, and potential impact.
  • Integrate testing tools with CI/CD pipelines to improve quality gates and delivery efficiency.
  • Maintain and evolve existing internal tools, ensuring stability, scalability, and maintainability.

• Strong programming ability in Java, Python, or Golang (at least one required).
  • Able to write code from scratch, especially in Java (live coding assessments are part of the interview).
  • Experience in building internal tools, testing frameworks, or automation platforms.
  • Solid understanding of backend testing, including APIs, services, and data validation.
  • Strong knowledge of test case design, automation framework principles, and testing methodologies.
  • Proficient in SQL, with hands-on experience in data verification and troubleshooting.
  • Familiar with software development processes, CI/CD workflows, and basic cloud concepts (e.g. AWS).
  • Strong analytical mindset with proven root cause analysis capability.

We are seeking a highly experienced Lifecycle Marketing Specialist to manage and collaborate with teams and oversee global lifecycle marketing campaigns. This individual will have a strong understanding of the general methodology of product and campaign operations, such as AB testing, funnel analysis, and lifecycle strategies. They will be responsible for providing campaign ideas and guidance to team members.
job_detail_fetch.description:
Binance is a leading global blockchain ecosystem behind the world’s largest cryptocurrency exchange by trading volume and registered users. We are trusted by 300+ million people in 100+ countries for our industry-leading security, user fund transparency, trading engine speed, deep liquidity, and an unmatched portfolio of digital-asset products. Binance offerings range from trading and finance to education, research, payments, institutional services, Web3 features, and more. We are seeking a highly experienced Lifecycle Marketing Specialist to manage and collaborate with teams and oversee global lifecycle marketing campaigns. This individual will have a strong understanding of the general methodology of product and campaign operations, such as AB testing, funnel analysis, and lifecycle strategies. They will be responsible for providing campaign ideas and guidance to team members.

lists.content:
• Activation and Conversion: Lead the optimization of the new user onboarding process by implementing product iterations, personalized marketing campaigns tailored to individual users, and targeted engagement strategies to improve new user activation and first-time transaction (FTT) conversion rates.
  • Retention and Repeat Purchase: build a comprehensive user lifecycle management system and user segmentation framework, and enhanced user engagement and repeat purchase frequency through the development of membership programs, point systems, gamification, and various other strategies including cross-selling.
  • Design and optimize user referral and viral growth mechanisms to drive product organic growth.
  • Lead A/B testing and user segmentation strategies to implement refined operations and achieve optimal allocation of operational resources.
  • Collaborate with teams across the organisation to ensure smooth execution of lifecycle marketing strategies and campaigns.
  • Utilise strong logical thinking and data analysis skills to uncover business insights, identify problems, and develop data-driven solutions.
  • Stay well-informed on each Business Unit's products, including their features, user preferences, and pain points.

• Proven track record of successful growth from zero to one or from one to a thousand users, leading initiatives in user retention, conversion, and repeat purchase with significant results.
  • Over 5 years of experience in the internet industry, with more than 3 years in senior user growth roles within transaction-based sectors such as e-commerce or fintech.
  • Experience of individually leading growth projects, operations or campaigns with systematic framework and methodology.
  • In-depth understanding of essential operational methodologies, including AB testing, funnel analysis, and custom strategies.
  • Knowledge and experiences in using marketing automation platforms/ tools.
  • Possess strong data-driven thinking, capable of establishing and improving data monitoring and analysis systems for user operations, with the ability to keenly identify issues through data and propose corresponding solutions.
  • Strong familiarity of working with various Business Unit products and the ability to comprehend user preferences and pain points.
  • Bilingual English/Mandarin is required to be able to coordinate with overseas partners and stakeholders.

lists.content:
• Build and enhance DApps and smart contracts to support a seamless client experience.
  • Collaborate closely with cross-functional teams including frontend developers, product managers to deliver high-quality decentralized applications.
  • Optimize backend services for scalability, reliability, and performance in a multi-chain environment.
  • Conduct code reviews, write comprehensive tests, and ensure best practices in security and blockchain development.
  • Stay up-to-date with the latest developments in blockchain technologies and contribute to continuous improvement of the platform.

• Familiar with Java.
  • Solid hands-on experience with smart contract development using Solidity and Rust (or Move).
  • Deep understanding of blockchain concepts, smart contract security, token standards on different mainstream blockchains.
  • Experience of designing architecture of decentralized applications (DApps).Strong problem-solving skills and ability to work in a fast-paced, collaborative environment.
  • Familiar with the principle of mainstream Defi apps like Aave, Uniswap Jupiter, and Radium.
  • Familiar with the principle of mainstream Crosschain protocols like CCIP, CCTP and circle gateway.
  • Familiar with mainstream AI tools like claude code and used to Agentic coding.

lists.content:
• Develop backend services for real-time fraud detection, transaction monitoring, and risk analysis.
  • Build and maintain scalable microservices to support risk assessment models and rule-based detection systems.
  • Integrate machine learning models and risk scoring engines into backend systems.
  • Participate in AI-assisted development initiatives, including automated code generation, intelligent alerting, and integration of LLM-powered risk operations tools.

• Proficiency in Java (Spring Boot), basic frameworks, such as multithreading and networking.
  • Understanding of distributed systems, and Spring microservices, dubbo.
  • Experience with SQL & NoSQL databases (MySQL, Redis, Hive, Starrocks).
  • Familiarity with message queues & streaming (Kafka, RabbitMQ).
  • Enthusiasm for and hands-on experience with AI-assisted development tools (e.g., Claude Code, GitHub Copilot, Cursor, or similar coding assistants); ability to leverage AI to accelerate code generation, code review, and unit test coverage.
  • Basic understanding of how LLM/Agent systems work and how they integrate into backend services; interest in building or iterating AI-powered risk automation features.
  • Familiarity with prompt engineering concepts and the ability to work alongside AI models in daily development workflows.
  • Strong analytical thinking, excellent teamwork skills, and a keen ability to learn and adapt quickly.

We are seeking a Senior DevOps Engineer or DevOps Architect (Staff) to elevate our infrastructure and configuration management capabilities.
 
In this role, you will leverage your experience in designing, implementing, and maintaining large-scale, mission-critical systems. You’ll be responsible for architecting and enhancing infrastructure solutions, driving improvements across our deployment processes, and supporting system migrations in close collaboration with our Development and QA teams. Key responsibilities include advancing our infrastructure architecture, automating operational workflows, enhancing system observability, and proactively addressing potential production issues through scalable and resilient solutions.
