job_detail_fetch.description:
Superside is looking for a Creative Director, AI Video with a strong background in filmmaking, cinematography, post-production, and AI-driven creative workflows to help shape the future of video production.

In this role, you’ll lead the development of high-impact AI-assisted video content for global brands, combining storytelling, visual craft, creative leadership, and emerging technologies to push creative quality and innovation forward.

You’ll operate as both a hands-on creative and a strategic leader, guiding teams, mentoring creatives, collaborating directly with customers, and helping define how Generative AI integrates into modern video production pipelines.

This role is ideal for someone who deeply understands cinematic storytelling and video craft, while also being highly curious, experimental, and excited about the evolving AI creative ecosystem.

lists.content:
• Lead the creative development of AI-assisted video content across campaigns, branded content, social, advertising, and experimental formats.
  • Guide multidisciplinary creative teams across concept development, visual storytelling, editing, motion, and AI-enhanced production workflows.
  • Combine traditional filmmaking, cinematography, editing, and post-production principles with emerging AI tools and workflows.
  • Generate and refine concepts using AI video, image-to-video, compositing, and editing tools while maintaining high creative standards.
  • Provide clear creative direction, feedback, and mentorship to creatives across multiple projects and workflows.
  • Collaborate directly with customers, presenting creative rationale, leading reviews, and helping shape strategic creative solutions.
  • Drive experimentation and innovation across AI video workflows, identifying opportunities to improve creative quality, scalability, consistency, and production efficiency.
  • Help define and evolve internal AI video production standards, workflows, and best practices across teams.
  • Contribute to team capability building through knowledge-sharing, documentation, mentorship, and creative leadership.
  • Balance hands-on creative execution with leadership responsibilities across multiple fast-moving projects.

• 5+ years of experience in filmmaking, video production, post-production, creative direction, or related creative fields.
  • Strong portfolio showcasing cinematic storytelling, editing, visual direction, motion, or AI-assisted video work.
  • Experience leading creative projects, mentoring creatives, and guiding multidisciplinary teams or workflows.
  • Hands-on experience using Generative AI tools for video or image creation within production environments.
  • Strong understanding of storytelling, composition, lighting, motion, pacing, editing, and cinematic language.
  • Experience integrating AI-generated assets into professional production workflows while maintaining narrative quality and brand consistency.
  • Strong understanding of modern AI video ecosystems, workflows, and experimentation practices.
  • Proficiency in Premiere Pro, After Effects, and other relevant Adobe Creative Suite applications.
  • Familiarity with motion graphics, compositing, animation, or 3D workflows is a plus.
  • Strong English communication skills with the ability to lead customer-facing conversations and collaborate across globally distributed teams.
  • Ability to balance creative excellence, operational scalability, mentorship, experimentation, and strategic thinking in fast-paced creative environments.

job_detail_fetch.descriptionBody:
Superside is looking for a Creative Director, AI Video with a strong background in filmmaking, cinematography, post-production, and AI-driven creative workflows to help shape the future of video production.

In this role, you’ll lead the development of high-impact AI-assisted video content for global brands, combining storytelling, visual craft, creative leadership, and emerging technologies to push creative quality and innovation forward.

You’ll operate as both a hands-on creative and a strategic leader, guiding teams, mentoring creatives, collaborating directly with customers, and helping define how Generative AI integrates into modern video production pipelines.

This role is ideal for someone who deeply understands cinematic storytelling and video craft, while also being highly curious, experimental, and excited about the evolving AI creative ecosystem.

job_detail_fetch.descriptionPlain:
Superside is looking for a talented Conceptual Copywriter to ideate and execute impactful creative work across digital campaigns and marketing channels. In this role, you’ll partner with designers, strategists, and performance teams to develop concept-driven copy that delivers both creative impact and measurable results.

You will work closely with enterprise-level customers helping translate complex technical ideas into clear, compelling messaging for global audiences. This role is ideal for a writer who enjoys turning strategic insights into powerful creative ideas while crafting high-performing copy across digital platforms.
job_detail_fetch.description:
Superside is looking for a talented Conceptual Copywriter to ideate and execute impactful creative work across digital campaigns and marketing channels. In this role, you’ll partner with designers, strategists, and performance teams to develop concept-driven copy that delivers both creative impact and measurable results.

You will work closely with enterprise-level customers helping translate complex technical ideas into clear, compelling messaging for global audiences. This role is ideal for a writer who enjoys turning strategic insights into powerful creative ideas while crafting high-performing copy across digital platforms.

lists.content:
• Develop concept-driven copy and campaign ideas across digital advertising, landing pages, email, and social channels.

  • Translate complex technical concepts into clear, engaging messaging for enterprise audiences.

  • Write both short-form and long-form copy tailored to different stages of the marketing funnel.

  • Collaborate closely with designers, UX specialists, and performance marketing teams to bring creative ideas to life.

  • Support the development of messaging frameworks for campaigns, product launches, and marketing initiatives.

  • Contribute to creative presentations and help shape 360° campaign concepts.

  • Iterate on copy through experimentation, A/B testing, and performance insights.

  • Manage multiple projects simultaneously while maintaining high creative standards.

• 4+ years of experience in a creative agency or fast-paced marketing environment.

  • Strong conceptual copywriting portfolio demonstrating campaign thinking and digital execution.

  • Experience writing for technical or complex products.

  • Ability to simplify complex ideas into clear, persuasive messaging.

  • Experience writing for performance channels such as paid social, email campaigns, and landing pages.

  • Strong understanding of full-funnel messaging and customer journey frameworks.

  • Experience collaborating with designers, UX specialists, and marketing teams.

  • Familiarity with experimentation, A/B testing, and performance optimization.

  • Excellent written and verbal English communication skills.

  • Ability to manage multiple projects in a fast-moving, remote environment.

job_detail_fetch.descriptionBody:

You will work closely with enterprise-level customers helping translate complex technical ideas into clear, compelling messaging for global audiences. This role is ideal for a writer who enjoys turning strategic insights into powerful creative ideas while crafting high-performing copy across digital platforms.

job_detail_fetch.descriptionPlain:
Superside is looking for a motion designer with the creativity, technical expertise, and innovation mindset to push the boundaries of motion design. You’ll work with top global brands, crafting high-impact motion graphics, animated digital ads, Lottie animations, and more, all while collaborating with a world-class, globally distributed team of creatives.
 
 
 
This is a high-ownership role where you’ll contribute to cutting-edge projects, explore new animation technologies, and help shape Superside’s creative motion capabilities.
job_detail_fetch.description:
Superside is looking for a motion designer with the creativity, technical expertise, and innovation mindset to push the boundaries of motion design. You’ll work with top global brands, crafting high-impact motion graphics, animated digital ads, Lottie animations, and more, all while collaborating with a world-class, globally distributed team of creatives.
 
 
 
This is a high-ownership role where you’ll contribute to cutting-edge projects, explore new animation technologies, and help shape Superside’s creative motion capabilities.

lists.content:
• Design engaging motion graphics for leading global brands across various formats.
  • Collaborate with dedicated account teams across different time zones.
  • Work on a number of simultaneous projects, executed with high attention to detail, on time and budget.
  • Support creative leads to help our customers achieve goals and add business value through design.
  • Take ownership of technical motion innovations, including Rive and Lottie animations.
  • Explore and integrate AI-powered tools for video, image generation, and animation enhancements.
  • Work on interactive motion projects that push the limits of storytelling and engagement.

lists.text: What you will need to succeed
lists.content:
• BA or higher in Design, Creative, Communications, or a related field.
  • Strong portfolio showcasing motion design, animation, and video expertise.
  • Mastery of After Effects, Illustrator, and Photoshop (3D and video editing a plus).
  • Experience working with Rive and Lottie animations.
  • Deep understanding of animation principles and visual storytelling.
  • Ability to always deliver pixel-perfect quality on time and within budget.
  • Excellent English verbal and written communication skills.
  • Familiarity with AI-enhanced motion tools and emerging creative tech.
  • Knowledge of working with UI design systems.
  • Preferably some understanding of HTML5.

We’re on a mission to create more equal opportunities globally. And with that in mind, we’ve built a natively remote company enabling us to reach out to the best talent no matter where they work.
 
Need more convincing? Here’s a skimmable, non-exhaustive list of reasons to join us:
 
-A global community of 200+ best-in-class creatives working from more than 60 different countries
-Flexible working hours and fully remote setup. We've been remote from day one. No weird office legacy
-A high-pace, high-energy, and high-performance environment
-Trusting, ego-free and truth-seeking team members
-Pioneering the future of work with a fair, friendly and supportive community. We’re pretty proud of this one
-The opportunity to build an international career through creative mentorship from top design leaders. We grow, you grow
-Work closely with leading global brands on a wide variety of creative projects. We’re talking about Amazon, Meta, Twitch, LVMH, Reddit, Google, and others

job_detail_fetch.descriptionPlain:
Superside is looking for a Creative with a passion for storytelling and design to create impactful, brand-aligned presentations that communicate ideas clearly and beautifully. You’ll turn complex information into simple, visually engaging narratives for leading global brands, combining your craft with an eye for clarity, structure, and flow.
 
In this role, you’ll work hands-on across PowerPoint, Google Slides, Keynote, and Figma, producing polished decks that inspire, inform, and drive results. You’ll also explore how Generative AI can enhance storytelling and streamline workflows while keeping creativity human-centered.
 
You’re detail-oriented, collaborative, and curious, comfortable working in a fast-paced, feedback-rich environment where precision and communication matter as much as creative flair.
job_detail_fetch.description:
Superside is looking for a Creative with a passion for storytelling and design to create impactful, brand-aligned presentations that communicate ideas clearly and beautifully. You’ll turn complex information into simple, visually engaging narratives for leading global brands, combining your craft with an eye for clarity, structure, and flow.
 
In this role, you’ll work hands-on across PowerPoint, Google Slides, Keynote, and Figma, producing polished decks that inspire, inform, and drive results. You’ll also explore how Generative AI can enhance storytelling and streamline workflows while keeping creativity human-centered.
 
You’re detail-oriented, collaborative, and curious, comfortable working in a fast-paced, feedback-rich environment where precision and communication matter as much as creative flair.

lists.content:
• Design clear, persuasive presentations that turn complex ideas into visually engaging stories.
  • Build and refine decks across PowerPoint, Keynote, Google Slides, and Figma, maintaining consistency and brand alignment.
  • Create and evolve presentation systems, templates, and visual frameworks to ensure scalable, high-quality output.
  • Collaborate with project managers, creative leads, and customers to clarify messaging and storytelling goals.
  • Apply best practices in layout, hierarchy, and flow to ensure each presentation communicates effectively and looks exceptional.
  • Use AI tools thoughtfully to enhance layout, visualization, and creative exploration within presentation workflows.
  • Translate data, insights, and strategies into compelling visual narratives tailored to diverse audiences.
  • Participate in open, constructive feedback loops, sharing insights and continuously refining your craft.
  • Model Superside’s values of kindness, clarity, and curiosity in every interaction, contributing to a collaborative, high-performing creative culture.

• 3–5 years of experience in presentation design, visual communication, or a related creative field.
  • Strong portfolio showcasing visually refined, story-driven presentations for brands or executives.
  • Expertise in PowerPoint, Keynote, Google Slides, and Figma; familiarity with Adobe Creative Suite a plus.
  • Demonstrated experience creating presentation systems, templates, or storytelling frameworks for global brands..
  • Ability to manage multiple projects, prioritize effectively, and deliver polished results under tight timelines.
  • Experience using Generative AI tools as part of an intentional, creative workflow.
  • Collaborative mindset, strong attention to detail, and openness to feedback.
  • Clear and confident communication in English; comfortable presenting design decisions when needed.

job_detail_fetch.descriptionPlain:
As a senior leader within the Solutions function, the Director of Deal Desk is the operational and commercial engine behind Superside's pricing, scoping, and project structuring for enterprise customers during the sales process. As part of the Solutions team, this role owns the end-to-end Deal Desk function, with a major focus on pricing and scoping support within a fully structured and commercially sound proposal. 
 
 
The Director of Deal Desk leads a team of 3 Deal Desk Associates and is responsible for their day-to-day operations of the team, output, development, and prioritization. This is a player-coach role: hands-on enough to shape the most complex or high-value deals directly, and structured enough to build the systems and standards that make the whole team fast and consistent.
 
 
Success in this role looks like sales teams feeling unblocked and well-supported on commercial questions; proposals and pricing that are accurate, competitive, and aligned to delivery reality; a Deal Desk team that operates with speed and precision; and commercial workflows that are continuously improved through AI-powered tooling and process automation, in close collaboration with the Head of Solutions Operations and Enablement. This person raises the bar on how Superside prices and scopes — with discipline, data, and creativity.
job_detail_fetch.description:
As a senior leader within the Solutions function, the Director of Deal Desk is the operational and commercial engine behind Superside's pricing, scoping, and project structuring for enterprise customers during the sales process. As part of the Solutions team, this role owns the end-to-end Deal Desk function, with a major focus on pricing and scoping support within a fully structured and commercially sound proposal. 

 

 

The Director of Deal Desk leads a team of 3 Deal Desk Associates and is responsible for their day-to-day operations of the team, output, development, and prioritization. This is a player-coach role: hands-on enough to shape the most complex or high-value deals directly, and structured enough to build the systems and standards that make the whole team fast and consistent.

 

 

Success in this role looks like sales teams feeling unblocked and well-supported on commercial questions; proposals and pricing that are accurate, competitive, and aligned to delivery reality; a Deal Desk team that operates with speed and precision; and commercial workflows that are continuously improved through AI-powered tooling and process automation, in close collaboration with the Head of Solutions Operations and Enablement. This person raises the bar on how Superside prices and scopes — with discipline, data, and creativity.

lists.content:
Deal Pricing & Scoping

  • Own end-to-end pricing and scoping support for the largest enterprise deals, ensuring commercial accuracy and alignment with Superside's service offerings and delivery capacity.

  • Review and validate your team's scopes, pricing structures, and deal configurations across the opportunity pipeline.

  • Partner closely with Account Executives and the broader Solutions team to translate discovery findings and customer requirements into commercially viable proposals.

  • Partner with internal subject matter experts to strengthen scoping and solution quality on complex, high-stakes deals.

    • AI & Process Innovation

  • Champion the use of AI tools to accelerate Deal Desk operations — from automating scope generation and pricing lookups to surfacing insights from historical deal data; in close collaboration with the Head of Solutions Operations and Enablement.

  • Identify where AI can reduce manual effort and increase speed and accuracy across the pricing & scoping workflow, and lead the implementation of the improvements.

  • Stay current on AI developments relevant to commercial operations, sales enablement, and proposal automation.

  • Model AI-forward ways of working for the Deal Desk team and the broader Solutions function.

    • Team Leadership & Operations

  • Manage and develop a team of Deal Desk Associates, setting clear priorities, quality standards, and turnaround expectations.

  • Act as the escalation point for the team on complex, ambiguous, or high-stakes deals requiring senior judgment.

  • Drive continuous improvement across Deal Desk workflows, tooling, and documentation — building a function that scales with deal volume without sacrificing quality.

  • Define and track team performance metrics, including deal velocity, pricing accuracy, and SLA adherence.

    • Reporting & Governance

  • Own Deal Desk reporting — including pricing patterns, deal velocity, win/loss trends, and scope accuracy — and surface insights to the Head of Solutions.

  • Maintain and enforce pricing governance frameworks, ensuring deals are structured within approved parameters and exceptions are handled with appropriate visibility.

  • Build and maintain playbooks, pricing guides, and reference documentation that empower the team and sales partners.

• Significant experience in Deal Desk, sales operations/strategy, or a pricing/scoping role within a creative, marketing, or professional services environment.

  • Proven track record managing or leading a team, with the ability to develop talent and maintain high-quality output in a fast-paced environment.

  • Strong commercial acumen — able to structure deals that are both competitive for customers and margin-sound for the business.

  • Analytical and data-driven, with the ability to track performance, identify patterns, and make evidence-based recommendations.

  • Genuine curiosity about and fluency with AI tools — particularly as they apply to commercial operations, proposal generation, and workflow automation.

  • Highly organized, with the ability to manage multiple concurrent deals and priorities without losing accuracy or responsiveness.

  • Strong communication skills — clear, concise, and credible with both internal stakeholders and, when needed, customers.

job_detail_fetch.descriptionPlain:
Superads is building AI agents for marketers — systems that don't just surface data but actually think through creative strategy, analyse performance, and help teams make better decisions before a single asset goes into production. We're moving fast in a space that's genuinely wide open, and we're looking for the Director of Superads to help us build the product layer on top of that ambition.
 
The person we're looking for thinks like a product manager, builds across the stack, and is genuinely curious about technology rather than protective of a specialisation. You'll be customer-facing in the truest sense — owning the experience that marketers actually touch, caring about whether they come back, and following the problem wherever it takes you, whether that's a React component, a backend service, or an LLM integration. We're not looking for a consultant who's mastered a particular layer. We're looking for an engineer who's restless until the product is right.
job_detail_fetch.description:
Superads is building AI agents for marketers — systems that don't just surface data but actually think through creative strategy, analyse performance, and help teams make better decisions before a single asset goes into production. We're moving fast in a space that's genuinely wide open, and we're looking for the Director of Superads to help us build the product layer on top of that ambition.

 

The person we're looking for thinks like a product manager, builds across the stack, and is genuinely curious about technology rather than protective of a specialisation. You'll be customer-facing in the truest sense — owning the experience that marketers actually touch, caring about whether they come back, and following the problem wherever it takes you, whether that's a React component, a backend service, or an LLM integration. We're not looking for a consultant who's mastered a particular layer. We're looking for an engineer who's restless until the product is right.

lists.content:
• Build the interfaces through which marketers interact with AI agents — conversational flows, agentic workflows, and UI that makes complex reasoning feel simple and trustworthy.
  • Own the product layer end-to-end: from the activation flows that bring new users in, to the interaction patterns that make them come back, to the feedback loops that help the AI get better over time.
  • Figure out the right patterns for making an AI strategy layer legible and useful inside a modern SaaS product — there aren't established playbooks here, and you'll be one of the people writing them.
  • Go full-stack when the problem requires it — into the API, the data layer, or the AI integration — without creating drag for the rest of the team.
  • Bring a PM-level perspective to growth: identifying which flows are losing people and why, forming opinions on what healthy usage looks like, and changing what you're building when the data says you should.
  • Represent product and design interests across teams, pushing back on decisions when the bar is slipping and being right often enough that people listen.

• 8+ years in high-performance product teams at scaleups — somewhere the engineering culture was set by engineers, not handed down as a process.
  • A strong home base in frontend (Next.js / React) with demonstrated ability to go full-stack when the problem demands it — you follow the work, not your lane.
  • Real experience building AI-powered product surfaces in production: agentic systems, LLM integrations, conversational interfaces, or retrieval-augmented workflows — and the product instincts to make them feel trustworthy rather than just functional.
  • Experience evaluating and improving AI output quality — whether through evaluation frameworks, feedback loops, or iterating on prompts and retrieval. You've thought about what good looks like when the system is reasoning, not just retrieving.
  • You think about activation and retention the way a PM would. You've looked at usage data and changed what you were building because of it — not as a process, but because it bothered you that people weren't coming back.
  • Product and design intuition strong enough to represent those interests when the PM or designer isn't in the room. You've pushed back on bad product decisions more than once and been right often enough that people listen.
  • You don't need to be managed. You take ownership of outcomes, not tasks, and you're honest about what's working and what isn't.

job_detail_fetch.additional:
Why This Role Matters
 
This role is key to how we scale Superside’s impact. You’ll help bring our services to market with greater clarity, drive AI adoption with confidence, and make sure our teams are equipped to tell the Superside story—consistently and compellingly.

Why Join us?

Superside's vision is to create equal opportunities globally by accelerating the world’s transition to online work. With that in mind, we're building a fully remote company that attracts people where they are.

Remote-first. Customer-led.
Remote isn’t just a perk; it’s how we deliver better for customers. We are fully committing to our customers by hiring top talent and collaborating seamlessly across time zones.
Global team, local impact.
Join a community of 60+ nationalities working across time zones, cultures, and disciplines, all aligned on doing great work for great brands.
High performance, low ego.
Work in a fast-paced, high-trust environment where feedback is direct, growth is constant, and kindness leads collaboration.
Impact meets opportunity.
We’re in the sweet spot — big enough to be stable, small enough for you to shape what’s next. Your ideas will matter here.
Grow fast. Lead well.
You’ll gain mentorship, take on real responsibility, and grow your career while helping us disrupt a global industry.

About Superside

Superside is the leading AI-powered creative company that quickly and cost-effectively enhances in-house functions. We help over 500 ambitious brands get great creative concepts done at scale. Built to be an extension 
of in-house teams, we unbottleneck marketing and creative teams so they can move faster and drive more reliable creative performance. 
Superside is a fully remote company with over 700 team members working across 60+ countries and 13 timezones.

Learn more at superside.com

Diversity, Equity and Inclusion

We’re an equal-opportunity company. All applicants will be considered regardless of ethnicity, appearance, religion, gender identity, sexual orientation, national origin, veteran or disability status.
job_detail_fetch.descriptionPlain:
Superside is looking for a Head of Product Marketing to lead how our services and AI-powered solutions are positioned, launched, and adopted in the market.
 
In this role, you’ll define Superside’s product marketing strategy across our core service offerings, working closely with Marketing, Product, Sales, and Customer Success to bring new capabilities to market and strengthen how we communicate our value to customers.
 
You’ll lead a small team responsible for product marketing and sales enablement, ensuring our teams are equipped with clear messaging, strong positioning, and the insights needed to win in the market.
job_detail_fetch.description:
Superside is looking for a Head of Product Marketing to lead how our services and AI-powered solutions are positioned, launched, and adopted in the market.

 

In this role, you’ll define Superside’s product marketing strategy across our core service offerings, working closely with Marketing, Product, Sales, and Customer Success to bring new capabilities to market and strengthen how we communicate our value to customers.

 

You’ll lead a small team responsible for product marketing and sales enablement, ensuring our teams are equipped with clear messaging, strong positioning, and the insights needed to win in the market.

lists.content:
• Lead product marketing strategy by defining positioning and messaging across Superside’s services and AI-powered solutions.
  • Drive go-to-market execution by partnering with Marketing, Product, and GTM teams to launch new services and capabilities.
  • Enable Sales and Customer Success teams by developing messaging frameworks, toolkits, and competitive insights.
  • Shape AI adoption by defining how Superside brings AI-powered creative solutions to market.
  • Develop market and customer insights by gathering feedback from sales, users, and competitive analysis.
  • Lead and mentor the product marketing team while driving alignment across Marketing, Product, and GTM teams.

• 7–10 years of experience in product marketing, go-to-market strategy, or related roles in B2B SaaS, AI, or technology-driven services.
  • Strong experience defining positioning, messaging, and go-to-market strategies for complex products or services.
  • Proven ability to partner cross-functionally with Product, Marketing, Sales, and Customer Success teams.
  • Experience enabling sales teams with messaging, content, and competitive insights that drive revenue outcomes.
  • Strong strategic thinking combined with the ability to execute and drive projects forward.
  • Curiosity and enthusiasm for how AI is transforming creative and marketing workflows.
  • Excellent communication skills with the ability to simplify complex ideas into clear narratives.
  • Experience managing and developing product marketing or enablement teams.
  • Experience in creative services, marketing technology, or AI-driven products.
  • Experience bringing new AI capabilities or services to market

job_detail_fetch.descriptionPlain:
Superside is seeking an experienced and driven Enterprise Account Executive to join our growing Revenue team. In this role, you’ll lead complex sales cycles with large enterprise organizations, positioning Superside as a strategic partner. You’ll clearly articulate our value relative to traditional integrated agencies while highlighting our unique differentiators.
Building on strong customer feedback and performance momentum, we’re continuing to expand our revenue team. This role will play a key part in shaping our sales processes and laying the foundation for our continued move upmarket—enabling us to win and deliver larger, more complex engagements.
job_detail_fetch.description:
Superside is seeking an experienced and driven Enterprise Account Executive to join our growing Revenue team. In this role, you’ll lead complex sales cycles with large enterprise organizations, positioning Superside as a strategic partner. You’ll clearly articulate our value relative to traditional integrated agencies while highlighting our unique differentiators.

Building on strong customer feedback and performance momentum, we’re continuing to expand our revenue team. This role will play a key part in shaping our sales processes and laying the foundation for our continued move upmarket—enabling us to win and deliver larger, more complex engagements.

lists.content:
• Generate and close opportunities across self-sourced, BDR-generated, and inbound channels.
  • Position Superside’s value to enterprise customers, clearly differentiating us from traditional integrated agencies.
  • Lead complex, multi-stakeholder sales cycles across both internal and customer teams.
  • Maintain an accurate pipeline and forecast in Salesforce and Clari.
  • Partner with BDRs and Field/ABM Marketing to drive pipeline through outbound efforts and in-person events.
  • Collaborate closely with our Enterprise Solutions team to conduct deep discovery and develop tailored creative solutions.
  • Navigate enterprise procurement processes, including RFI, RFQ, and RFPs.
  • Stay current on competitive dynamics, industry trends, and Superside’s evolving offerings.

• Extensive enterprise field sales experience selling creative services, AI solutions, or SaaS to marketing and creative teams.
  • Strong discovery, deal preparation, and sales documentation skills.
  • Proven track record of building and converting self-sourced pipeline.
  • Exceptional storytelling and executive-level communication skills.
  • Ability to develop and deliver compelling, high-impact presentations.
  • Genuine interest in design and the future of creative work.
  • Self-motivated, with a disciplined and results-oriented approach to exceeding targets.
  • Strong collaboration skills and a growth mindset.
  • Familiarity with integrated agency models and operations.

job_detail_fetch.descriptionPlain:
Superside is building a strong talent pool for future Enterprise Business Development Representative roles and is looking to connect with experienced candidates ahead of upcoming openings. This role focuses on outbound engagement with enterprise accounts across SaaS, creative, and marketing industries, driving expansion in North America.
 
As a BDR at Superside, you’ll identify and engage high-value accounts, initiate strategic conversations, and generate interest in our creative subscription services. Success in this role comes from understanding customer challenges and positioning Superside as a long-term partner, not just driving volume.
job_detail_fetch.description:
Superside is building a strong talent pool for future Enterprise Business Development Representative roles and is looking to connect with experienced candidates ahead of upcoming openings. This role focuses on outbound engagement with enterprise accounts across SaaS, creative, and marketing industries, driving expansion in North America.

 

As a BDR at Superside, you’ll identify and engage high-value accounts, initiate strategic conversations, and generate interest in our creative subscription services. Success in this role comes from understanding customer challenges and positioning Superside as a long-term partner, not just driving volume.

lists.content:
• Engage and nurture enterprise-level accounts, particularly in the SaaS, creative, and marketing industry, using a multi-channel approach (phone, email, social, and video).
  • Develop strategic and personalized outreach, leveraging account intent signals to create meaningful sales conversations. 
  • Qualify target accounts by identifying their pain points, needs, and potential for long-term engagement.
  • Position Superside as a strategic partner, articulating how our solutions can drive value for their organization beyond a transactional sales approach.
  • Create and nurture opportunities, setting yourself and Account Executives for success.
  • Leverage a world-class sales tech stack including Salesforce, Apollo, Sendspark (video prospecting), and Sales Navigator to identify and convert accounts.
  • Stay active on social platforms, positioning yourself as a trusted voice in the marketing and design industry.

• 2–3 years of outbound sales or business development experience targeting the North American market; SaaS or agency experience preferred.
  • Experience engaging enterprise-level accounts.
  • Proven track record of high performance in consultative, non-transactional sales.
  • Strong understanding of outbound techniques, including engaging cold or unresponsive prospects.
  • Hands-on experience with multi-channel outreach (phone, email, LinkedIn, video) and intent-based strategies.
  • Familiarity with tools like Salesforce, Apollo, Sendspark, and Sales Navigator, or willingness to learn.
  • Excellent English communication skills, able to engage and present to senior stakeholders.
  • Strong business acumen with the ability to understand customer challenges and position value clearly.

job_detail_fetch.descriptionPlain:
Superside is looking for a Senior Event Marketing Manager to lead the strategy, execution, and amplification of our global virtual event programs. From large-scale flagship virtual summits to focused customer roundtables and interactive webinars, you’ll design and deliver experiences that elevate Superside’s brand, generate demand, and strengthen our community.
This is a highly strategic and executional role. You’ll work across functions with content, creative, marketing, and sales teams to ensure every event is flawlessly executed, tightly integrated into our broader marketing mix, and positioned as a high-value brand touchpoint.
job_detail_fetch.description:
Superside is looking for a Senior Event Marketing Manager to lead the strategy, execution, and amplification of our global virtual event programs. From large-scale flagship virtual summits to focused customer roundtables and interactive webinars, you’ll design and deliver experiences that elevate Superside’s brand, generate demand, and strengthen our community.

This is a highly strategic and executional role. You’ll work across functions with content, creative, marketing, and sales teams to ensure every event is flawlessly executed, tightly integrated into our broader marketing mix, and positioned as a high-value brand touchpoint.

lists.content:
• Own the virtual event strategy and calendar across Superside’s marketing org, ensuring programming aligns with demand gen goals, content priorities, and brand positioning.

  • Lead planning and execution for Superside’s flagship virtual summits, digital conferences, webinars, and online community events—from concept to promotion, run-of-show, and post-event amplification.

  • Develop compelling narratives and formats that reinforce Superside’s leadership in AI-powered creative and marketing innovation.

  • Partner with content, creative, and demand gen teams to deliver integrated campaigns that maximize registration, engagement, and pipeline impact.

  • Manage speaker recruitment and preparation, building relationships with industry leaders, customers, and internal experts to deliver high-quality, engaging digital sessions.

  • Oversee all virtual event operations and logistics, including platforms, production partners, budgets, and technical delivery.

  • Measure and report performance, translating engagement and pipeline data into insights that optimize promotion and prove ROI.

  • Continuously experiment with digital formats, interactivity, and technologies to keep Superside at the forefront of virtual event marketing.

  • Collaborate cross-functionally to elevate execution standards and ensure seamless integration into the overall marketing mix.

• 5–7 years of experience in virtual event marketing or digital-first field marketing, ideally in B2B SaaS, creative services, or fast-growing startups.

  • Proven track record of planning and executing large-scale virtual summits (1,000+ registrants) as well as smaller, high-touch webinars or workshops.

  • Strong ability to translate brand positioning into standout digital experiences that resonate with target audiences.

  • Excellent project management skills—comfortable managing multiple stakeholders, timelines, and deliverables in a remote-first environment.

  • Hands-on experience with virtual event platforms (e.g. Zuddl), plus CRM/marketing automation tools and campaign analytics.

  • Exceptional communication and relationship-building skills, with confidence managing executive speakers and external partners.

  • Data-driven mindset, with proven ability to track KPIs and demonstrate ROI from virtual event marketing.

  • Passion for creative industries, marketing innovation, and exploring new AI technologies to enhance online event experiences.

job_detail_fetch.additionalPlain:
WHY JOIN US?
 
We’re on a mission to create more equal opportunities globally. And with that in mind, we’ve built a natively remote company enabling us to reach out to the best talent no matter where they work.
 
Need more convincing? Here’s a skimmable, non-exhaustive list of reasons to join us:
 
-A global community of 200+ best-in-class creatives working from more than 60 different countries
-Flexible working hours and fully remote setup. We've been remote from day one. No weird office legacy
-A high-pace, high-energy, and high-performance environment
-Trusting, ego-free and truth-seeking team members
-Pioneering the future of work with a fair, friendly and supportive community. We’re pretty proud of this one
-The opportunity to build an international career through creative mentorship from top design leaders. We grow, you grow
-Work closely with leading global brands on a wide variety of creative projects. We’re talking about Amazon, Meta, Twitch, LVMH, Reddit, Google, and others

job_detail_fetch.descriptionPlain:
Superside is looking for a Lead Creative specialized in Presentation Design to elevate how global brands communicate their most important stories. You’ll guide a distributed team of top-tier creatives to deliver visually striking, strategically grounded presentations, ranging from executive keynotes and investor decks to scalable brand templates and complex storytelling systems.
 
This role sits at the intersection of storytelling, design systems, and innovation. You’ll set the bar for visual excellence and clarity, while integrating Generative AI and emerging tools like Figma Slides to enhance creativity and efficiency. As both a maker and a mentor, you lead by example balancing craft and strategy to turn complex ideas into powerful, human-centered stories that connect and inspire.
job_detail_fetch.description:
Superside is looking for a Lead Creative specialized in Presentation Design to elevate how global brands communicate their most important stories. You’ll guide a distributed team of top-tier creatives to deliver visually striking, strategically grounded presentations, ranging from executive keynotes and investor decks to scalable brand templates and complex storytelling systems.
 
This role sits at the intersection of storytelling, design systems, and innovation. You’ll set the bar for visual excellence and clarity, while integrating Generative AI and emerging tools like Figma Slides to enhance creativity and efficiency. As both a maker and a mentor, you lead by example balancing craft and strategy to turn complex ideas into powerful, human-centered stories that connect and inspire.

lists.content:
• Lead the creation of clear, high-impact presentations that transform complex ideas into compelling visual stories.
  • Design, refine, and scale decks across PowerPoint, Google Slides, Keynote, and Figma, ensuring brand consistency and technical precision.
  • Develop and maintain presentation systems, templates, components, and visual frameworks that enable consistency and efficiency across teams.
  • Partner with project managers, creative leads, and customers to align storytelling, structure, and messaging with business objectives.
  • Translate data, strategies, and insights into visually coherent narratives tailored to diverse audiences.
  • Use Generative AI tools intentionally to enhance ideation, layout, and visualization while preserving human creativity.
  • Provide constructive feedback that sharpens visual hierarchy, storytelling flow, and overall narrative impact.
  • Coach designers to strengthen presentation craft and confidence across multiple platforms.
  • Collaborate cross-functionally with strategy, brand, and motion teams to deliver cohesive, insight-driven creative work.
  • Model empathy, composure, and inclusivity under pressure, building a psychologically safe, high-performing team culture.

• 3–5 years of experience in presentation design, visual communication, or a related creative field.
  • Strong portfolio showcasing visually refined, story-driven presentations for brands or executives.
  • Expertise in PowerPoint, Keynote, Google Slides, and Figma; familiarity with Adobe Creative Suite a plus.
  • Demonstrated experience creating presentation systems, templates, or storytelling frameworks for global brands..
  • Ability to manage multiple projects, prioritize effectively, and deliver polished results under tight timelines.
  • Experience using Generative AI tools as part of an intentional, creative workflow.
  • Collaborative mindset, strong attention to detail, and openness to feedback.
  • Clear and confident communication in English; comfortable presenting design decisions when needed.

job_detail_fetch.descriptionPlain: Superside is hiring a Lead Creative Strategist to shape how we turn insights into breakthrough creative work. You’ll combine strategic depth with creative leadership, guiding a team of strategists, partnering with customers, and driving measurable business impact across brand, digital, social, and web experiences. In this role, you’ll set the standard for strategic excellence at Superside: mentoring your team, evolving our approach to insight-driven creativity, and helping some of the world’s most ambitious brands make work that matters.
job_detail_fetch.description: Superside is hiring a Lead Creative Strategist to shape how we turn insights into breakthrough creative work. You’ll combine strategic depth with creative leadership, guiding a team of strategists, partnering with customers, and driving measurable business impact across brand, digital, social, and web experiences. In this role, you’ll set the standard for strategic excellence at Superside: mentoring your team, evolving our approach to insight-driven creativity, and helping some of the world’s most ambitious brands make work that matters.

lists.content:
• Lead and mentor a small team of Creative Strategists, providing direction, feedback, and growth opportunities.
  • Oversee strategic development across multiple projects, ensuring clarity, quality, and creative consistency.
  • Craft digital-first strategies for campaigns across social, web, display, newsletters, and emerging formats.
  • Partner with Creative Leads, Designers, and Copywriters to turn insights into compelling creative concepts.
  • Build trusted relationships with customers, uncovering challenges and turning them into strategic opportunities.
  • Champion AI in the creative process, from research and insights to ideation, concept testing, and optimization.
  • Identify and integrate AI tools and workflows that enhance the speed, quality, and scalability of strategy work.
  • Leverage data and research to uncover audience, category, and competitive insights that fuel creative effectiveness.
  • Collaborate with Sales and Account teams to expand strategic offerings and drive account growth.
  • Contribute to the evolution of Superside’s Strategy discipline, defining best practices, frameworks, and future focus areas.

• 6+ years in strategy roles within creative, advertising, or digital agencies, including experience leading or mentoring small teams.
  • Deep understanding of digital ecosystems, creative effectiveness, and platform storytelling.
  • Proven ability to turn complex problems into clear, actionable strategies and creative briefs.
  • Confident communicator and storyteller, skilled at presenting to senior clients and internal leaders.
  • Data-informed thinker who blends analytical rigor with creative intuition.
  • Organized and adaptable, able to manage multiple workstreams in a fast-paced, distributed environment.
  • Entrepreneurial mindset: proactive, resourceful, and comfortable challenging convention to improve outcomes.
  • Enthusiasm for innovation, emerging technologies, and the evolving intersection of AI, creativity, and strategy.

job_detail_fetch.descriptionPlain:
Superside is hiring a Lead Product Engineer to build AI-powered tools that transform how creative work is produced at scale. On our AI Consulting team, you’ll design, prototype, and ship automation solutions that embed AI directly into real creative workflows for enterprise customers.



This is a senior, hands-on IC role. You’ll lead through technical ownership, partnering closely with AI engineers, designers, and consultants to turn emerging AI capabilities into reliable, production-ready tools used by global brands.
job_detail_fetch.description:
Superside is hiring a Lead Product Engineer to build AI-powered tools that transform how creative work is produced at scale. On our AI Consulting team, you’ll design, prototype, and ship automation solutions that embed AI directly into real creative workflows for enterprise customers.



This is a senior, hands-on IC role. You’ll lead through technical ownership, partnering closely with AI engineers, designers, and consultants to turn emerging AI capabilities into reliable, production-ready tools used by global brands.

lists.content:
• Own the design and delivery of AI-powered automation tools that streamline creative production for enterprise teams.
  •  Translate customer problems into scalable technical solutions in close collaboration with consultants and stakeholders.
  • Integrate AI models, including LLMs, text-to-image, and text-to-voice into production-grade creative tools.
  • Architect and build microservice-based systems that balance speed, scalability, and maintainability.
  • Prototype rapidly, then harden successful proofs-of-concept into reliable production applications.
  • Partner with designers and product managers to deliver seamless integrations with tools like Figma and Adobe.
  • Identify repeatable patterns across engagements and help codify them into reusable solutions and platforms.

• 7+ years of experience building enterprise-grade software in fast-paced environments such as startups, scaleups, or consulting.
  • 1+ years of experience leading technical teams, including managing and influencing senior engineers.
  • Strong full-stack engineering background, with deep experience in TypeScript; React and/or Python experience is a plus.
  • Hands-on experience with AWS services such as S3, RDS, and Lambda.
  • Proven experience integrating AI APIs (e.g., OpenAI, Fal.ai) into real production systems.
  • Ability to move confidently from experimentation to production, managing trade-offs and constraints.
  • Experience using AI-assisted coding tools such as Claude or Cursor as part of a modern development workflow.
  • Experience integrating with creative tools (Figma APIs, Adobe Suite) is a strong advantage.

job_detail_fetch.descriptionPlain:
Superside is expanding its Production team, and we’re looking for an energized, team-focused, and solutions-oriented Producer to help us grow video production on a global scale. 
 
As a Producer, you’ll be an expert in your field and the go-to person for overall project aspects and milestones. You’ll combine a sharp understanding of multimedia production, profitability, and stakeholder management to deliver exceptional creative work. You’ll champion process, optimize team operations, and help scale Superside’s production offering across traditional and tech-enabled formats - all on time and within budget.
job_detail_fetch.description:
Superside is expanding its Production team, and we’re looking for an energized, team-focused, and solutions-oriented Producer to help us grow video production on a global scale.
 
As a Producer, you’ll be an expert in your field and the go-to person for overall project aspects and milestones. You’ll combine a sharp understanding of multimedia production, profitability, and stakeholder management to deliver exceptional creative work. You’ll champion process, optimize team operations, and help scale Superside’s production offering across traditional and tech-enabled formats - all on time and within budget.

lists.content:
• Run a range of Specialised Production Services (video, motion, 3D, AR) production projects from brief to delivery, including brand films, digital ads, and modular content for performance marketing
  • Partner with our internal Creative Leads, DOPs, editors, and scriptwriters to execute high-quality workCoordinate global shoots - onsite or remote-directed - and manage external vendors as needed
  • Support the integration of AI-powered tools for scripting, storyboarding, post-production, and asset creation when relevant
  • Manage project budgets, timelines, licensing, and deliverables across channels including social, Connected TV, and digital ads
  • Collaborate with Superside’s AR & 3D team on interactive or immersive content, understanding the basic phases of these projects
  • Build and maintain a vetted global supplier network across crew, gear, studios, and specialized production services
  • Continuously optimize production processes and identify scalable ways of working
  • Work closely with Creative Project Managers, Creative Directors, Finance, and directly with customers
  • Keep everyone aligned and informed - from scope and planning to shoot and post

• 5+ years of experience in creative production (agency, in-house, or production company)
  • Strong experience managing video shoots, post-production, and digital-first content (organic and paid)
  • Bonus if you’ve worked with performance marketing teams or optimized content for testing and iteration
  • Comfort working in global, remote, and asynchronous environments
  • A strong pulse on AI, AR, and emerging creative tools, with a curiosity to test and apply them thoughtfully
  • Proven experience managing external vendors, production budgets, and contracts
  • A process-minded approach to projects, with a love for structure and efficiency
  • Great vibes - you're a doer, problem-solver, collaborator, and communicator
  • Flexibility to work with different time zones and occasional irregular schedules

job_detail_fetch.descriptionPlain:
Superside is looking for Project Managers to strengthen our team.
 
You will craft and execute creative strategies and assets for some of the world’s most forward-thinking companies. All of this while working in a global remote community focused on shaping the future of creative work.
 
 
In this role, you’ll take ownership of key accounts from day one, navigate a steep learning curve, and embark on an exciting journey that embraces innovation and AI for creativity.
job_detail_fetch.description:
Superside is looking for Project Managers to strengthen our team.
 
You will craft and execute creative strategies and assets for some of the world’s most forward-thinking companies. All of this while working in a global remote community focused on shaping the future of creative work.
 
 
In this role, you’ll take ownership of key accounts from day one, navigate a steep learning curve, and embark on an exciting journey that embraces innovation and AI for creativity.

lists.content:
• Own project planning and timelines (including internal and client-facing milestones)
  • Creates budgets, dependencies, and define resourcing needs
  • Track progress, risks, and delivery health
  • Operationalize approved briefs into execution plans
  • Lead day-to-day execution across teams
  • Drive timelines, progress, and momentum
  • QA (in partnership with CLs for creative and brand quality)
  • Identify and mitigate delivery risks early
  • Ensure work is delivered on time, on scope, and within budget
  • Reduce errors through strong planning and process discipline

• 3+ years of experience as a Project/Account/Campaign manager or Creative producer within a brand or advertising function
  • Proven experience in managing multiple accounts simultaneously
  • Excellent understanding of creative communication and how creative content can drive business outcomes
  • Understanding of creative craft with a solid ability to scope, budget, and manage strict timelines and milestones
  • Experience with project management & collaboration software (e.g., Slack, Notion, Asana, Trello).
  • High-level understanding of Digital Advertising, Social Media platforms, Branding and Communications
  • Familiarity with the Adobe Suite (Ps, Ai, Ae, Id) and Figma
  • Interest in AI and some knowledge of the leading creative AI tools (especially Midjourney and ChatGPT)
  • An organized, customer-centric, and detail-oriented approach with an account management mindset
  • Excellent verbal and written English skills with the ability to present ideas and coordinate work in large international groups
  • Autonomy, decisiveness, and accountability

job_detail_fetch.descriptionPlain:
Superside is hiring a Salesforce Administrator to join our Revenue Operations team and own the health, scalability, and evolution of our Salesforce ecosystem. You’ll ensure our Sales Cloud instance and connected GTM tools operate as a reliable, data-driven foundation for revenue growth. 


This role goes beyond maintenance. You’ll optimize processes, improve data integrity, and build automation that enables Sales, Marketing, and Customer Success to perform at their best.
job_detail_fetch.description:
Superside is hiring a Salesforce Administrator to join our Revenue Operations team and own the health, scalability, and evolution of our Salesforce ecosystem. You’ll ensure our Sales Cloud instance and connected GTM tools operate as a reliable, data-driven foundation for revenue growth. 



This role goes beyond maintenance. You’ll optimize processes, improve data integrity, and build automation that enables Sales, Marketing, and Customer Success to perform at their best.

lists.content:
• Own day-to-day administration and optimization of Salesforce (Sales Cloud and integrated tools).
  • Design and implement scalable configurations, custom objects, validation rules, and approval processes aligned with GTM workflows.
  • Build and maintain complex automations using Salesforce Flows to streamline critical RevOps processes.
  • Manage sandbox-to-production deployments and oversee system maintenance and updates.
  • Maintain high data quality through governance standards, cleanup initiatives, and scalable process design.
  • Troubleshoot user issues and improve platform adoption through enablement and documentation.
  • Partner with Sales, Marketing, CS, and Finance to translate business needs into system improvements.
  • Support and optimize integrations with GTM tools (e.g., Apollo, Chili Piper, Gong, Clari, HubSpot).
  • Collaborate with GTM Systems, Product, and Engineering to ensure reliable data flows and reporting accuracy.

• 3+ years of Salesforce Administration experience.
  • Salesforce Certified Administrator (required).
  • Strong expertise with Salesforce Flows and declarative automation.
  • Experience managing sandbox deployments and release processes (SFDX or DevOps Center is a plus).
  • Working knowledge of Apex, APIs, and Lightning components.
  • Experience integrating Salesforce with modern GTM tooling.
  • Strong understanding of Revenue Operations and SaaS lifecycle metrics.
  • High attention to detail and commitment to data integrity.
  • Clear communication skills and ability to work cross-functionally.

Superside is hiring a Salesforce Administrator to join our Revenue Operations team and own the health, scalability, and evolution of our Salesforce ecosystem. You’ll ensure our Sales Cloud instance and connected GTM tools operate as a reliable, data-driven foundation for revenue growth. 


This role goes beyond maintenance. You’ll optimize processes, improve data integrity, and build automation that enables Sales, Marketing, and Customer Success to perform at their best.

job_detail_fetch.additionalPlain:
Why Join us?

Superside's vision is to create equal opportunities globally by accelerating the world’s transition to online work. With that in mind, we're building a fully remote company that attracts people where they are.

Remote-first. Customer-led.
Remote isn’t just a perk; it’s how we deliver better for customers. We are fully committing to our customers by hiring top talent and collaborating seamlessly across time zones.
Global team, local impact.
Join a community of 60+ nationalities working across time zones, cultures, and disciplines, all aligned on doing great work for great brands.
High performance, low ego.
Work in a fast-paced, high-trust environment where feedback is direct, growth is constant, and kindness leads collaboration.
Impact meets opportunity.
We’re in the sweet spot — big enough to be stable, small enough for you to shape what’s next. Your ideas will matter here.
Grow fast. Lead well.
You’ll gain mentorship, take on real responsibility, and grow your career while helping us disrupt a global industry.

Superside is a fully remote company with over 700 team members working across 60+ countries and 13 timezones.

job_detail_fetch.descriptionPlain:
Superside is hiring a Senior Account Manager to manage and grow a portfolio of core and growth-stage clients. You’ll own the customer experience end-to-end, driving renewals, maintaining account health, and ensuring consistent, high-quality delivery.
This role combines client partnership and operational execution. You’ll work closely with Project Managers and leadership to keep accounts stable, aligned, and positioned for long-term growth.
job_detail_fetch.description:
Superside is hiring a Senior Account Manager to manage and grow a portfolio of core and growth-stage clients. You’ll own the customer experience end-to-end, driving renewals, maintaining account health, and ensuring consistent, high-quality delivery.

This role combines client partnership and operational execution. You’ll work closely with Project Managers and leadership to keep accounts stable, aligned, and positioned for long-term growth.

lists.content:
• Own the end-to-end relationship for a portfolio of clients, ensuring retention and strong stakeholder trust.

  • Manage renewals and support moderate growth opportunities within defined commercial frameworks.

  • Guide Project Managers to ensure smooth delivery and consistent quality across engagements.

  • Monitor account health, revenue performance, and provide forecasting inputs to senior leadership.

  • Identify and resolve risks early, acting as the main point of escalation for your accounts.

  • Translate customer goals into clear, structured creative programs.

  • Use performance data and insights to support QBRs and renewal conversations.

  • Maintain a strong understanding of Superside’s services to identify value-driving opportunities.

  • Partner with cross-functional teams to ensure alignment on delivery and account strategy.

• 5+ years of experience in account management or client services within creative, digital, or professional services environments.

  • Experience managing and retaining client accounts with ownership of renewals.

  • Ability to lead commercial conversations within defined pricing and deal structures.

  • Strong stakeholder management skills, with experience working with senior clients.

  • Ability to balance strategic thinking with day-to-day execution.

  • Experience working with cross-functional teams such as Project Managers and Producers.

  • Comfort using data to inform account decisions and forecasting.

  • Strong communication skills in English, with the ability to connect delivery to business outcomes.

job_detail_fetch.descriptionPlain:
Superside is hiring a Senior Director (Strategic Alliances & Growth) to build and scale partnership-driven revenue channels. Reporting directly to the CRO, you’ll turn strategic alliances into a predictable source of enterprise pipeline and revenue, working across AI platforms, customer referrals, and marketing services partners.

This is a highly strategic and operational role focused on building repeatable partnership models, owning commercial outcomes, and driving measurable growth.
job_detail_fetch.description:
Superside is hiring a Senior Director (Strategic Alliances & Growth) to build and scale partnership-driven revenue channels. Reporting directly to the CRO, you’ll turn strategic alliances into a predictable source of enterprise pipeline and revenue, working across AI platforms, customer referrals, and marketing services partners.

This is a highly strategic and operational role focused on building repeatable partnership models, owning commercial outcomes, and driving measurable growth.

lists.content:
• Own and grow partnership-driven pipeline and revenue across strategic alliances, referrals, and partner channels.
  • Build and scale key platform partnerships (e.g. Canva), establishing Superside as a preferred enterprise partner.
  • Identify and develop new alliance opportunities with AI creative platforms and technology partners.
  • Design and launch a scalable customer referral program that generates qualified enterprise pipelines.
  • Build a partner ecosystem with marketing services firms to drive consistent deal flow.
  • Structure and close partnership agreements aligned with commercial and strategic goals.
  • Develop repeatable co-sell and co-delivery models across partnership types.
  • Partner with Sales to convert partner-sourced opportunities into closed deals.
  • Collaborate with Creative, Delivery, and AI teams to ensure successful execution of partner engagements.
  • Track, analyze, and optimize partnership performance across pipeline, conversion, and revenue.

• 10+ years of experience in partnerships, alliances, or business development.
  • Proven track record of building and scaling partnership-driven revenue channels.
  • Experience owning both partner relationships and commercial outcomes.
  • Strong experience structuring and closing enterprise partnership agreements.
  • Experience in AI, SaaS, creative technology, or enterprise consulting environments.
  • Strong understanding of enterprise go-to-market and channel strategies.
  • Ability to operate cross-functionally across Sales, Product, and Delivery teams.
  • Strong stakeholder management and executive communication skills.
  • Entrepreneurial mindset with the ability to build from zero and scale quickly.
  • Data-driven approach with a focus on measurable business impact.

job_detail_fetch.descriptionPlain:
Superside is hiring a Senior FP&A Manager to own forecasting and strategic financial modeling across our Go-To-Market organization. Reporting to the FP&A Director, you’ll partner directly with Sales, Marketing, and RevOps leaders to shape revenue strategy, validate growth assumptions, and ensure our plans reflect business reality.
 
This role matters now because GTM complexity is increasing. We need a data-savvy finance leader who can connect the dots across pipeline, hiring, incentives, and retention, turning ambiguity into clear financial direction.
job_detail_fetch.description:
Superside is hiring a Senior FP&A Manager to own forecasting and strategic financial modeling across our Go-To-Market organization. Reporting to the FP&A Director, you’ll partner directly with Sales, Marketing, and RevOps leaders to shape revenue strategy, validate growth assumptions, and ensure our plans reflect business reality.
 
This role matters now because GTM complexity is increasing. We need a data-savvy finance leader who can connect the dots across pipeline, hiring, incentives, and retention, turning ambiguity into clear financial direction.

lists.content:
• Own revenue forecasting across New Business, Expansion, and Churn, ensuring accurate MRR modeling and visibility.
  • Build and maintain scenario models that inform hiring plans, capacity planning, and investment decisions.
  • Partner with GTM leadership to define ROI metrics, profitability targets, and performance tracking frameworks.
  • Collaborate with RevOps and Data teams to improve financial reporting accuracy and data accessibility.
  • Model and validate sales incentive plans, ramp assumptions, and hiring roadmaps.
  • Track and analyze core SaaS KPIs including pipeline conversion, retention, and revenue efficiency.
  • Support Business Unit leaders with structured profitability analysis and actionable insights.
  • Drive automation and process improvements across reporting, dashboards, and planning workflows.

• Professional finance qualification (CA, CIMA, CFA, or equivalent).
  • 7+ years of experience in finance or FP&A roles within data-rich environments.
  • Strong SaaS and GTM metrics knowledge, including MRR dynamics, retention, pipeline, and revenue forecasting.
  • Advanced modeling skills in Excel or Google Sheets; experience with BI tools (e.g., Omni) and SQL is a plus.
  • Ability to move between detailed analysis and executive-level storytelling.
  • Experience partnering with senior stakeholders in fast-paced, high-growth environments.
  • Strong prioritization skills and comfort managing competing deadlines.
  • Experience in a SaaS company is strongly preferred.

job_detail_fetch.descriptionPlain:
Superside is hiring a Senior UI/UX Designer to create high-impact digital experiences across web, product, email, and scalable design systems. You’ll collaborate with cross-functional teams to deliver user-centered, enterprise-grade solutions for leading global brands.
 
 
This role requires a designer who actively integrates AI into their workflow, not as an experiment, but as a core part of how they research, design, and deliver. At Superside, AI is infrastructure. We expect you to actively integrate AI into research, exploration, production, and QA workflows and help push our collective capability forward.
job_detail_fetch.description:
Superside is hiring a Senior UI/UX Designer to create high-impact digital experiences across web, product, email, and scalable design systems. You’ll collaborate with cross-functional teams to deliver user-centered, enterprise-grade solutions for leading global brands.
 
 
This role requires a designer who actively integrates AI into their workflow, not as an experiment, but as a core part of how they research, design, and deliver. At Superside, AI is infrastructure. We expect you to actively integrate AI into research, exploration, production, and QA workflows and help push our collective capability forward.

lists.content:
• Design user-centric, visually engaging interfaces across Websites, Landing Pages, Emails, Design Systems, and Product Design

  • Translate complex processes into intuitive, user-friendly designs

  • Collaborate with cross-functional teams to define project requirements and deliver creative solutions

  • Create wireframes, prototypes, and high-fidelity designs to communicate concepts effectively

  • Leverage AI tools to streamline workflows and enhance efficiency

  • Ensure designs meet web accessibility, responsiveness, and user experience best practices

  • Contribute to building and maintaining scalable design systems

  • Present and articulate design ideas to internal teams and customers with clarity and confidence

  • Perform UX/UI audits to evaluate accessibility, responsiveness, and user journeys, providing actionable recommendations

• 5+ years of experience as a UX/UI Designer, with a strong portfolio showcasing work across multiple service areas
  • Proficiency in Figma, including active use of AI-powered plugins and emerging automation features within the platform
  • Demonstrated integration of AI tools into design workflows, covering research, ideation, layout generation, content structuring, and QA. 
  • Understanding of front-end technologies (HTML5, CSS3, JavaScript) for development-friendly designs
  • Proven experience in building and maintaining design systems at scale
  • Strong skills in creating conversion-optimized landing pages and funnel-specific emails
  • Ability to design product experiences across dashboards, web apps, and mobile apps, with a focus on atomic design principles
  • Excellent communication skills to articulate design decisions to stakeholders and customers
  • Experience conducting UX/UI audits with a focus on accessibility, performance, and user journeys
  • Working knowledge of platforms such as Webflow, WordPress, and Shopify

job_detail_fetch.descriptionPlain:
Superads is building AI agents that help marketers make better creative decisions — not by surfacing more data, but by actually reasoning through strategy on their behalf. The harder problem underneath that ambition is one we haven't fully solved yet: how do you build a system that understands a brand deeply enough that an AI can make meaningful decisions on its behalf?
 
That's the problem you'll be working on.
 
Not in the sense of parsing brand documents and calling it done. In the sense of figuring out how to represent what a brand actually is — its identity, its audience, its creative principles, the judgment calls that a senior strategist who'd worked with them for years would make instinctively — in a way that an AI system can reason over reliably. It's a harder and more interesting problem than most companies are working on in this space, and we don't think it has a clean solution yet.
job_detail_fetch.description:
Superads is building AI agents that help marketers make better creative decisions — not by surfacing more data, but by actually reasoning through strategy on their behalf. The harder problem underneath that ambition is one we haven't fully solved yet: how do you build a system that understands a brand deeply enough that an AI can make meaningful decisions on its behalf?

 

That's the problem you'll be working on.

 

Not in the sense of parsing brand documents and calling it done. In the sense of figuring out how to represent what a brand actually is — its identity, its audience, its creative principles, the judgment calls that a senior strategist who'd worked with them for years would make instinctively — in a way that an AI system can reason over reliably. It's a harder and more interesting problem than most companies are working on in this space, and we don't think it has a clean solution yet.

lists.content:
• Build the knowledge layer that sits underneath Superads' AI agents — the systems that give them genuine understanding of a brand rather than just access to its documents.
  • Design how brand knowledge is represented, stored, and continuously updated: the structures that let an agent reason about a brand the way a senior strategist would, not just retrieve what's been written down.
  • Develop agentic search capabilities — systems that let agents reason about what they don't know, identify knowledge gaps, and navigate information dynamically rather than relying on fixed retrieval pipelines.
  • Evaluate and iterate on architectures for knowledge retrieval and reasoning, identifying where current approaches break down and driving more interesting solutions.
  • Translate emerging AI research and patterns into production-ready systems that measurably improve output quality and reliability.
  • Work closely with the product and AI engineering teams to ensure the knowledge layer directly improves what users experience — staying connected to product impact even when the work takes you deep into infrastructure.

• 8+ years in high-performance engineering environments — ideally at companies pushing the frontier of enterprise AI, legal AI, or knowledge-intensive agent systems.
  • Proven experience building agentic workflows and RAG systems in production, with a focus on making AI output trustworthy and reliable — not just functional.
  • Deep understanding of how language models represent and use knowledge, well beyond prompt engineering or standard retrieval patterns. You've thought seriously about memory architectures, reasoning under uncertainty, and dynamic retrieval.
  • Experience with LangChain or LangGraph (or equivalent) for building multi-agent systems; strong Python skills, ideally with FastAPI.
  • Hands-on experience with a major cloud data platform — Snowflake, BigQuery, or Databricks — and comfort designing architectures that handle large data volumes reliably.
  • Strong opinions about where current AI approaches break down, formed through real production experience rather than theory.
  • Genuine curiosity about the brand intelligence problem — what it means to encode creative judgment, how you represent things that were never written down, how you know when a model's understanding is actually right. You don't need a marketing background, but you should find these questions interesting.
  • You take ownership of outcomes, communicate clearly when something isn't working, and follow the problem rather than your specialisation.

That's the problem you'll be working on.
 
Not in the sense of parsing brand documents and calling it done. In the sense of figuring out how to represent what a brand actually is — its identity, its audience, its creative principles, the judgment calls that a senior strategist who'd worked with them for years would make instinctively — in a way that an AI system can reason over reliably. It's a harder and more interesting problem than most companies are working on in this space, and we don't think it has a clean solution yet.

job_detail_fetch.additionalPlain:
Why Join us?

Superside's vision is to create equal opportunities globally by accelerating the world’s transition to online work. With that in mind, we're building a fully remote company that attracts people where they are.

Remote-first. Customer-led.
Remote isn’t just a perk; it’s how we deliver better for customers. We are fully committing to our customers by hiring top talent and collaborating seamlessly across time zones.
Global team, local impact.
Join a community of 60+ nationalities working across time zones, cultures, and disciplines, all aligned on doing great work for great brands.
High performance, low ego.
Work in a fast-paced, high-trust environment where feedback is direct, growth is constant, and kindness leads collaboration.
Impact meets opportunity.
We’re in the sweet spot — big enough to be stable, small enough for you to shape what’s next. Your ideas will matter here.
Grow fast. Lead well.
You’ll gain mentorship, take on real responsibility, and grow your career while helping us disrupt a global industry.

About Superside

Superside is the leading AI-powered creative company that quickly and cost-effectively enhances in-house functions. We help over 500 ambitious brands get great creative concepts done at scale. Built to be an extension 
of in-house teams, we unbottleneck marketing and creative teams so they can move faster and drive more reliable creative performance. 
Superside is a fully remote company with over 700 team members working across 60+ countries and 13 timezones.

Learn more at superside.com

Diversity, Equity and Inclusion

We’re an equal-opportunity company. All applicants will be considered regardless of ethnicity, appearance, religion, gender identity, sexual orientation, national origin, veteran or disability status.

job_detail_fetch.descriptionPlain:
Superside is looking for a Traffic Manager to ensure our creative teams are staffed effectively and projects run smoothly. Embedded within the studio, you’ll connect the right talent to the right work, balancing speed, quality, and team capacity.
You’ll partner closely with Account Managers, Project Managers, and Producers to keep workflows efficient, teams supported, and delivery on track.
job_detail_fetch.description:
Superside is looking for a Traffic Manager to ensure our creative teams are staffed effectively and projects run smoothly. Embedded within the studio, you’ll connect the right talent to the right work, balancing speed, quality, and team capacity.

You’ll partner closely with Account Managers, Project Managers, and Producers to keep workflows efficient, teams supported, and delivery on track.

lists.content:
• Assign creative resources daily based on skillset, seniority, and availability.

  • Run stand-ups to assess workload, priorities, and incoming requests.

  • Identify capacity gaps and resourcing risks before they impact delivery.

  • Partner with Resource Operations to source additional talent when needed.

  • Monitor utilization and workload distribution to ensure balanced, sustainable output.

  • Adjust allocations in real time as priorities shift or new work comes in.

  • Collaborate with Account and Project teams to align resourcing with delivery needs.

  • Maintain clear visibility on team capacity, risks, and upcoming demand.

  • Improve resourcing workflows and processes to increase efficiency and clarity.

• Experience in traffic, resource management, or project coordination within a creative or production environment.

  • Strong understanding of creative disciplines such as design, copy, and motion.

  • Ability to match the right skillsets to the right projects quickly and accurately.

  • Comfortable working in fast-paced environments with shifting priorities.

  • Experience using resourcing tools and working with utilization data.

  • Strong organizational skills with the ability to manage multiple requests simultaneously.

  • Clear communication skills when working with cross-functional teams.

  • Ability to balance business needs with team capacity and sustainability.
